name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Friend, help me end corrupt stock trading in Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Accountability and transparency in government are critical. But right now, we have a problem:
| | |
---
Friend,

Ohioans and Americans deserve accountability and transparency in government. It's what ensures that our elected officials are working _for the people_ – not corporations, special interests, or themselves.**But right now, we have a problem:**
Lawmakers often have access to private information about individual companies and entire industries – information that can directly impact stock prices – and right now, they have free reign to buy and sell stocks.**I don't own individual stocks because my job is to serve Ohioans, not a personal stock portfolio – but many members of Congress do, and it's a practice we need to end.**
That's why, for years I’ve led the fight to ban members from stock trading, and I just introduced the Ending Trading and Holdings in Congressional Stocks (ETHICS) Act. This act will strengthen government accountability and prevent members of Congress, their spouses, and dependent children from profiting off of their positions for personal gain.
**I'm fighting as hard as I can to pass this important legislation and stand up to corruption in Washington – and I need to know you're with me. I'm looking for 20,000 folks to add their voices to this fight by midnight, but your name is still missing, friend. So please:**
**[Will you sign on to my petition right now to help end corrupt stock trading in Congress? I'm counting on you to speak out before midnight tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62255772/402868442/-2030690909?code=jtk146-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=100,50,25,5&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fbrown-2023-ethics-act&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmY0ZWIxZi1mY2UyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H2gNhGv6_IWelsuIsTrGy7Dbc6ousU2R9QTDrcKuJ2k=&emci=4dc096a5-1fe2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f6f4eb1f-fce2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)**
| | [Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62255773/402868443/-2030690909?code=jtk146-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=100,50,25,5&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fbrown-2023-ethics-act&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmY0ZWIxZi1mY2UyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H2gNhGv6_IWelsuIsTrGy7Dbc6ousU2R9QTDrcKuJ2k=&emci=4dc096a5-1fe2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f6f4eb1f-fce2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)

I promise to always call out corruption when I see it and fight for you and your family. Thanks for being by my side, friend.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62255774/402868444/-2030690909?code=jtk146-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=100,50,25,5&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fbrown-2023-ethics-act&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmY0ZWIxZi1mY2UyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H2gNhGv6_IWelsuIsTrGy7Dbc6ousU2R9QTDrcKuJ2k=&emci=4dc096a5-1fe2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f6f4eb1f-fce2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)
Sherrod
**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Sherrod Brown: **Friend – thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement and for sharing our commitment to the Dignity of Work.

Fighting for workers means building an economy that prioritizes the needs of workers over tax breaks for billionaires and corporations. No matter who you are or what kind of work you do, I promise to fight for you. But I need your help: Experts say I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection and Senate control could come down to Ohio. The only way we can defend this critical seat is with grassroots contributions from supporters like you.

**[If you're with me in this fight, please chip in any amount today to win in Ohio and defend our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62255775/402868445/-1256022338?refcode=email-footer&code=jtk146-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmY0ZWIxZi1mY2UyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H2gNhGv6_IWelsuIsTrGy7Dbc6ousU2R9QTDrcKuJ2k=)**

Or what if we shared that Republicans have a more straightforward path to flipping the Senate than Democrats do to holding the majority — and we need to hold on to every single seat to defend our progress? It may also help to mention that we’re only 53% of the way toward our end-of-month goal — and _your support today could make all the difference._ **Now that you know what’s at stake, can you pitch in any amount before our deadline? clean_body: Friends, we’re just six days out from our campaign’s end-of-month deadline, and you’ve probably figured out that we’re going to ask you to contribute. = Perhaps it would help if we told you that while Republicans continue to manufacture a debt crisis and put our economy at risk, Martin is fighting for workers and families. He’s standing up to Republicans’ threats to cut critical programs like Medicare and Social Security, and he just helped pass his legislation to support local firefighters and emergency responders. Or what if we shared that Republicans have a more straightforward path to flipping the Senate than Democrats do to holding the majority — and we need to hold on to every single seat to defend our progress? It may also help to mention that we’re only 53% of the way toward our end-of-month goal — and your support today could make all the difference. Now that you know what’s at stake, can you pitch in any amount before our deadline? Your contribution will help us finalize our budget for the weeks and months ahead. Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxckT2PnDAQhn_N0LEyM3xtQbEJIkWUKFWkS4Nm8bD4DmPWmEN7vz4Cba5I-3j0Pq9n2M6j6R8VFF8AcTB6AUSgCyDeXzbr11f7_VucXCi-5z9ttj_iV0AMj1k-J58hJ7Fsxp0WdaQrzrkXHUmV5CVSiUVC0VCxlGWRnlFKxvKMRMIlpX2CkijqOxWZChWSSjFTipJUnbI8u4oqJTnrjK49Q6oO0YmTjb13zp46Z6OxGkKYl6NRA9gs0q1eTpuZvOh9ArDRbuIgwWl-ADZvvAyxs_ErT3k3OOOBmjXYdnGr7wSo3jxgvhMr2qwWqH7-8IAd25nNbQKqj75p3JvbEDYThj25PWTGTa2bg7HmQ9qrjEbeZU_j9tm9_bS3V-_exPNN2ucG0n8mNwWZAlA9dWP8wbi-vGc_7j1g3k6j0UD1f_A4JNWXP7-XX8WsI1_peTPjaJa8gFTdjv11zv4NAAD__7JEpfY)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

clean_body: Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible.

subject: Less than 2 WEEKS!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Hurry and register for the Republican Action Conferenece on May 5th and 6th in Kennewick!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: First the Dominion settlement, now this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2135%2E5257348%2EjISS_y ]Adam Schiff for Senate

BREAKING NEWS:

Tucker Carlson is OUT at Fox News, days after Fox settled their defamation
lawsuit with Dominion Voting Systems for $787 million.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=apr2023_abs_em.JyHIjA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20230424_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2135%2E5257348%2EjISS_y ]Adam has worked to hold Fox, Tucker Carlson, and the MAGA Republicans
spreading Donald Trump’s Big Lie accountable for years — and his work
isn’t over. Chip in $3 today to help Adam keep fighting for truth and
accountability in the Senate.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=apr2023_abs_em.JyHIjA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20230424_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2135%2E5257348%2EjISS_y ]DONATE $3

Derek —

Tucker Carlson is out at Fox News, days after the company settled their
defamation lawsuit brought by Dominion Voting Systems for $787 million
dollars.

Carlson’s own text messages revealed the extent to which he personally
loathed Trump, but was willing to advance the Big Lie out of self-interest
and to maintain the network’s ratings and profitability. In the end, it
appears that may have cost him his job.

But let’s be clear: Carlson attacked Adam nearly every week on his program
for years to undermine Adam’s credibility, and those attacks — from
Carlson and Fox — aren’t going to stop now that they’ve parted ways.

Carlson attacked Adam for investigating Russia’s interference in the 2016
election — interference by Vladimir Putin to help Trump defeat Hillary
Clinton.

Carlson attacked Adam for investigating Trump’s attempt to extort
Ukraine’s President Zelenskyy to smear Joe Biden, and for leading Trump’s
Senate impeachment trial.

Carlson attacked Adam’s work on the January 6th Committee and his efforts
there to advance truth and accountability.

Carlson became such an ally to MAGA Republicans that House Speaker Kevin
McCarthy released the January 6th footage exclusively to him to share a
warped narrative of that attack on our democracy with his right-wing
audience.

We say good riddance — as Adam told Carlson last time he went on his
program live in studio, maybe Tucker will have better luck at the Russian
propaganda outfit RT.

Attacking Adam’s credibility has been central to Carlson and Fox News’
programming. Trump has made these attacks central to his campaign rallies.
They will only get more ferocious in the race for 2024.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em.eR9sXr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20230424_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2135%2E5257348%2EjISS_y ]Derek, will you make a contribution of any amount to Adam’s
campaign today? While Carlson is out, the Fox News Misinformation Machine
will soon be firing on all cylinders — with more outrageous attacks
against Adam that we need to be ready for.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=apr2023_abs_em.RDZ0hA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20230424_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2135%2E5257348%2EjISS_y ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

> _**FIRST:**_ I had to teach Don Lemon a history lesson when it comes to the Second Amendment and the rights of black citizens.
>
> _**THEN:**_ Don Lemon told me I couldn't speak the truth because I am not a black American. _**I reject that.**_
>
> _**NOW:**_ Don Lemon is OUT at CNN.
Fellow American, I am not afraid to bring the debate to anyone who is willing to talk about the important issues, but I won’t back down.

I am committed to bringing fresh, radical ideas to the table that will help put America back on track. But I can't do it without your support.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c03807852ac5403cba652154ae86fb12&_e=4ypDq0Imlrnv8XUb5bz08E_YnZqZuqlIpaVdzz3uPGEuB2iPRo_Zqq0zFYCyRUEhLiXOQjtuduzLZABZOrS4Fp_y1iY2a0bk_1JTu-z99CmrlG1bzw13HH2jUqcTf_M2d_J_9mAiWsyJyeZr4dhICix85_DtiFtZnr4bq3HZyuaMov1_JpwPOIKRH5HAh2Z0e_5GS3FQMayM8e6kutZNK_KhnOgXvMeUG4DpTemjRRepuOEnuj1caDRpse1p7WBQpAFfXqCqx9Knr_zG1JochMAwUpTXvowZ02Dcu4u5mN1BxlvZUC3zdvN5bb-cMIzOMKo1PAeW6pBSWVlBXL2p2TIxVSnB61LdQaDsG6NsHnA40Kzm-48mg7aQx3NId27cYyeuRCazUWRlGELf7pVa4g%3D%3D)

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Help me defeat MAGA Jim Jordan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [I’m Tamie Wilson, and I’m running for Congress to unseat ultra-MAGA Congressman Jim Jordan. But I need your help -- Jim Jordan is already building his WAR CHEST to keep this seat in 2024. Can you split a $10 donation between my campaign and Voter Protection Project to help me defeat MAGA Jim Jordan? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43972?t=6&akid=7309%2E878179%2EGe5irW) | [RUSH $10 TO DEFEAT JIM JORDAN »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43972?t=7&akid=7309%2E878179%2EGe5irW)
---
It’s undeniable: Jim Jordan is not fit to represent the American people in Congress.

He betrayed our Democracy. He betrayed his constitutional oath of office. He put Trump ahead of our Democracy — and even 16 years later, he continues to.

Look, I’m not a lifelong politician. In fact, I’m not a politician at all. But I know what it means to stand up for what’s right.

**But the only thing Jim Jordan knows what to stand for is himself, Donald Trump, and his failed Presidency.**

We have a shot to win this and kick Jim Jordan to the curb for good. Together, we can vote him out of office. This is our best shot, but I need your help, friend.

[Make an IMMEDIATE $10 donation split between my campaign and Voter Protection Project to help me defeat Jim Jordan for good »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43972?t=8&akid=7309%2E878179%2EGe5irW)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Tamie Wilson and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43973?t=9&akid=7309%2E878179%2EGe5irW)
---

Thank you,

Tamie Wilson

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7309%2E878179%2EGe5irW). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7309%2E878179%2EGe5irW).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=7309%2E878179%2EGe5irW) to request fewer emails. Friend, I've seen what Nikki is made of... For over 3 years, I spent every day by Nikki's side. I traveled the country and the world with her. I was in the room when no one else was, and I've seen Nikki in moments no one else gets to see. I want to tell you a story of what I've seen up close, on a trip to Israel when Nikki was UN ambassador. After a long and exhausting day where Nikki saw first-hand Israel's many threats, we headed home. As our military helicopter landed, we noticed a group of teenage girls who’d gathered on the ground. They had heard Nikki was coming. Our security team warned us to go straight to the car, but I had no doubt what would happen next. Nikki was determined to see the girls waiting to meet her. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=58700af8354f3859ee6d8002448906ee76a24e98d9c73af1e90f6855b1b5c32688664ca532aa4df1cbc6bfac3d34f08df8a08179bebb2c244d42d9d3895bc4ea She ran over, took selfies, and said how proud she was of them. She never takes a single one of you for granted.I have no doubt she will be the same way as our country’s president—because YOU are why she's running. The proudest moments of my career have been when I was by Nikki's side, watching her stand up for our country and our American values. She’s served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America’s ambassador to the United Nations…and she’s a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country. Nikki Haley is running for President because our country is on a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction, and we need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people. For over 3 years, I spent every day by Nikki's side. I traveled the country and the world with her. I was in the room when no one else was, and I've seen Nikki in moments no one else gets to see. I want to tell you a story of what I've seen up close, on a trip to Israel when Nikki was UN ambassador. After a long and exhausting day where Nikki saw first-hand Israel's many threats, we headed home. As our military helicopter landed, we noticed a group of teenage girls who’d gathered on the ground. There is nothing more important to her than getting to know her supporters—people like you. name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zamcagvea9b7odbhih7j3d5cg4b605lb7oag48ag_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5i66o76c5h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo12afgoqovibg3s85pfvbkm4rmt13gcbjkmner0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5i66o76c5h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpao6md9hvke2oe133d7pgs1nhcisg428i342i90_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5i66o76c5h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8b8uuqd7p2kp7i80ad5nqq20gk4dnp1681cpij8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5i66o76c5h2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf7a65to6nchi4t4m851ikv772sjkuqr0clou5f8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5i66o76c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdvp2kl41a0mu3lmhg1r8icoud04ev4uag65ku0g_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5i66o76c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zao25qk80qdqi75bsstue83ben0m29p20laef7d8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5i66o76c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5ubq485gng7jmhr43v0vb6kdcmr145k0oob6810_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5i66o76c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztdmpvm8it4adqnkags56cpn5oncmdik9mqvdri8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5i66o76c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjksh84b6t3e5keim029d3fe1k4pmh0rmrgmvhf8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5i66o76c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4djlf6jav46fh88m5l1enonuh5mhs5g9sutdbv8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5i66o76c5h2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zst8sdnpdvikpl2ovjiooteb2cbaeettrpjupfao_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5i66o76c5h2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z03ii1if80lukjdq8ohqsshj782cv8fvf16cnuao_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5i66o76c5h2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6t86p7tp93gqbt6rqcub10bai5q90fc5qgmd35o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5i66o76c5h2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg88ljs8647edd717c9uh5ep4fvo66a61ka7n4dg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5i66o76c5h2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

American Defense News

body:

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18798%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q%2boMdF5JJYkt38SsKMNr9Q&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18798%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q%2boMdF5JJYkt38SsKMNr9Q&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18799%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mZlZPA16pEF3XJDLY2knWw&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18790%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IW1Ph7Ee51KFxtvgFLNs2g&sysid=1)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18791%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pYGYkPrtfz9zqrdjOvnk0w&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18792%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3NB3i%2bgAQGuz0DbIbyfowg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18793%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YszDHjqJOUQVvYczvmnXAg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18794%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VfzfSqv8msFMYbrVwRazuA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18705%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jnu0G2i%2b8PIaQZa%2fRGSaMQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18706%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CKua3%2bhReC1VazSm51ZKUg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18707%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bG61W0zmybze7%2fYW722ZUQ&sysid=1)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18708%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r0CxEKWTWRRu7aHaBX33Pw&sysid=1)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18709%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EejtH8E1E0LUGRaNyelufA&sysid=1)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18700%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lntSeymN3dr1E5inqW5YvA&sysid=1)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18701%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NbAyxmNUVNxDpjLQspJHIQ&sysid=1)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. Friend,

We wanted to reach out **ONE LAST TIME** and invite you to renew your 2023 sustaining membership. After today, you will be **REMOVED** from our membership roster.
**You’ve fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.**

body:

I need patriots I can trust, Friend.

My Senate Republican colleagues and I just left a BIG 2024 Election meeting, but we ran into a problem - we needed more up-to-date information to make better strategic decisions.

I'm entrusting YOU with completing the **[Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsdvt9g5s1fon7r8ks39u0jgmd21htj737pk3578_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5h60ob5c1h2bs)** because of your excellent track record of providing valuable input for the Conservative movement.

Your opinions, concerns, and interests are CRITICAL to formulating our 2024 campaign platform. We can only **WIN** in 2024 when we create an agenda __that best represents the will of the American people.__

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Can you guess how many Democrats voted against this?

|
---
| | | |
---

Friend, House Republicans just passed a bill to keep men out of women’s sports. While we should celebrate this major step to protect women, we’re shocked and disturbed that **ZERO** **Democrats voted for the bill!**

That means that Democrats don’t care that **MEN** could potentially:
* Ruin competition for your daughters and granddaughters
* Use the same shower and locker room as your daughters and granddaughters
* Crush the dreams of top female athletes

While Democrats have gone too woke for their own good, we know that real Americans like you want to protect girls’ sports.

That’s why if you make a donation of over $10 to House Republicans today, you can claim a “Save Women’s Sports” Sticker to show people that you have common sense!

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I am bringing the debate to CNN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Don Lemon was WRONG on this.

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3m4fid5svamobgmebq3o0fto0u4pqr55la82k00_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5h60ob5chh2bs)
Fellow American,

Things got a little heated on CNN.

While debating post Civil War history, Don Lemon preposterously claimed that "black people still aren't allowed to enjoy their freedoms."

**That's an insult to the progress we've made over the last 160 years.** His comments embody what's wrong with the dialogue about race in America. I told him so without apology.

My exchange with Don Lemon and CNN that has sparked controversy and anger from some in the mainstream media.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuh2tbs3aglh4e4dn2slqvgjgieabkqrhet4jcfo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5h60ob5chh2bs)
I spoke passionately about the importance of the Second Amendment and the need for civil discourse in our country. I stand by my words, but of course, some in the media have chosen to twist them and attack me.

**I refuse to back down, Fellow American.** I believe that we need to have honest, open discussions about the issues that matter most to Americans. That's why I am running for office. That's why I am working every day to make sure I have a prime spot on the debate stage in August.

In order to continue my campaign and fight for the values and principles that set this country into motion, I need your support. I can't do it alone. **[Any amount will bring us closer to our unique donor goal. I need your help to continue spreading my message of freedom and progress.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0q8625cetrsrtocg0v3eqobs47eshp6af1etqbg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5h60ob5chh2bs)**

**[Please consider making a small donation to my campaign today. Your contribution will help me continue my fight to revive the values that this nation was founded on: free speech. The rule of law. Excellence over grievance.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zterc1q8k241ktciebb5gjeerhr8sg0cd8duh3i0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5h60ob5chh2bs)**

Thank you for your support. Together, we can make a difference.

Sincerely,

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znbpn09a36jn2ecf9oj84ng14evms708id708tg8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5h60ob5chh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. I am committed to bringing fresh radical ideas to the table that will help put America back on track. But I can't do it without your support. **[Please chip in $1 or more to help me continue this fight.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zibipqijc4dm68hp8dteadvcud938uoljpm24td0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5h60ob5chh2bs)**

| [** WATCH NOW -> **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8ebs99ise57ia02khjrsprqofcu85v11cite5ro_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5h60ob5chh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztahikaudn5m471fnkk0og93eqdbg4th7105s1e0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5h60ob5chh2bs)

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0ro2mvlng6rc7fini8p87phmsritk4j1j9dg0vo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5h60ob3c9h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbld303ce0j90en7ff845fiebh5vqlv9gg1dpgj0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5h60ob3c9h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo5b86g22ral0k3tghj0c5sm68r0ocf0i65rmhmo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5h60ob3c9h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdh08c2s3migl5kgou911oj1mdu6tmrpegbrv16o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5h60ob3c9h2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb424f2femvaocnr8skv0i9tdeq6chaokh3us98o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5h60ob3c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0hophm112mi2568sf66jiof4jj57p85spmn1g30_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5h60ob3c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaopo8r7ogsfkmlleftelt9stkn78s5qqjt21pp0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5h60ob3c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z19a9k3uno746iblv7c4ns061ai3qd7dad9gm1u0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5h60ob3c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4e91f62na7do2r1b1aqos9sj9cren2l7t54vbqg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5h60ob3c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn2sisae6csudugmk2hbu0nii4qble3qoomkgqgo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5h60ob3c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkl4rbfsoha1u9i8pepahurot0gf0jle85849hc0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5h60ob3c9h2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsrjghgd7ble21jol0s2iinagvctgmeeedjdkme8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5h60ob3c9h2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuub5djen1jva0d1mvim2tmh6occ44kn57ri78co_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5h60ob3c9h2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdjcep52am0nbc8h24g7vn2hb0injrq64a1rh79g_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5h60ob3c9h2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbvpufunmrbetknva3mi09qfinor7db1mrtn7e6o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5h60ob3c9h2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

American Action News

name: Al Franken via Blue Amp Action
subject: Here are five reasons why 2022 was a seriously hard year to win in New York as a Democrat, and why my friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley can win in 2024.
body:
Flippable 2024 House district
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb8497905-5cbf-486c-8a85-53cf21c904ca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | _Hi! Cliff here, and we have a special guest who'd like to speak with you! A_ _s they say in the business Al used to be in, Senator Franken, take it away!......._ [__](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9004ed35-de54-4583-9d4e-9f69253f8a5d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Dear Person Who Opens My Email, My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley just made a BIG announcement. Josh is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District — a key district to taking back the House in 2024. He ran for the seat last cycle in his first political race, nearly defeating a 30-year career politician and Republican Marcus Molinaro – losing 50.8% to 49.2% in a district where some Democrats at the top of the ticket lost by more than 6 points. Josh will win this time! And I will give you five reasons why 2024 promises to be better than 2022. **[But first, let’s help Josh’s 2024 campaign get off to a great start. Will you join me right now by splitting a contribution of $10 or more between Josh Riley and Blue Amp Action right now? He’s not taking corporate PAC money and he’s counting on individual supporters like you and me, Peter.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4cc6f583-f951-4c90-9373-56ac5fdb201b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc8799fa7-74f9-44dc-8dbb-a752100afb07/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Here are five reasons why 2022 was a seriously hard year to win in New York as a Democrat, and why it’s so impressive Josh came as close to winning as he did:
1. **Redistricting**. Last cycle, the New York State Legislature drew a congressional map that the New York State Courts deemed too partisan — so they threw it out and redrew it themselves. Unfortunately, for five months Josh had been running in the wrong damn district! The only good part is that the working-class town Josh grew up in remained in the newly formed 19th District. But Josh had a whole bunch of new territory in which to make himself known.
2. **Primaries**. Josh had to win an expensive primary challenge in late August against a strong opponent. Still, Josh won the primary by a nearly two-to-one margin. By working his butt off, not that he had much of a butt to start with—have you seen this guy? Beanpole!
3. **Marc Molinaro**. Josh’s Republican opponent in the general election had already been a State Assembly Member, County Executive and GOP candidate for governor in 2018, losing to then-Governor Cuomo. Molinaro gained wide name recognition and had no challengers in his 2022 primary. But now he has a record to run on–and it’s not a good one. He’s voting 95% of the time with Marjorie Taylor-Greene!
4. **Crazy GOP Attack Ads**. Republicans had momentum statewide, and they ran tons of deeply dishonest dark money ads that said crap like, “Josh Riley’s allies want to defund the police.” I don’t know who Josh’s “allies” are but Josh and I funded the police—getting crisis intervention training and bullet proof vests for local police departments across the country. It was completely false, and it was sickening.
5. **Midterm vs. Presidential Years**. 2024 will not be a midterm! Ultimately, too many New York Democrats didn’t show up in a number of races this past cycle. But this time, not only is the presidency on the line – so is the Supreme Court. You can bet Democrats will turn out!

So now that you know how tough 2022 was — and how CLOSE Josh came to pulling it off — are you ready to join me in supporting Josh for 2024? **[Split a contribution to support Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign — he’s going to win one of the most important races in America for 2024 and I want you to be a part of it.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a9931ac-9924-42b3-85d9-1b9d29cb06af/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thanks, Al [**P.S. I like the P.S. because it’s one more opportunity to ask for a donation. So donate now!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3dbd2737-1233-4864-9781-8f851a0d466d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf7964ebf-b302-42fb-a453-9dd5006ac895/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62277485/402929228/1454100140?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDM4YTg0Mi02ZGUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LV1i1WcgxiovMus_o3zipSjfw5qPZRR3E3x_T1SPg9g=&emci=8335b36c-50a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=3038a842-6de3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172) Friend, **Today, President Biden announced his candidacy for the 2024 presidential election.** In the past two years, young voters have seen so many of our hopes for the future materialize as President Biden and Democrats in Congress champion the youth agenda. **And because of that progress, we know that President Biden is the best candidate to continue to move our country forward.** **[Join us in support: Pledge to vote in 2024 to help us show the country that the youth vote isn’t going anywhere — in fact, we’re just getting started.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62277487/402929231/-2084694605?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDM4YTg0Mi02ZGUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LV1i1WcgxiovMus_o3zipSjfw5qPZRR3E3x_T1SPg9g=&emci=8335b36c-50a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=3038a842-6de3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172)** By re-electing President Biden, we’re not just voting for a politician. We’re voting for continued progress on student debt relief, historic climate action, long overdue marijuana reform, and more. Under the Biden administration, Democrats have been able to deliver real action for young voters. **We can keep that going, but we’ve got to keep those who want to fight for us in office. ** It may seem early to be talking about the 2024 presidential election, but don’t underestimate the importance of 2023. Now is the time to grow the foundation that we’ve built and ensure young voters are ready to make history (again) in 2024. [**_There’s no better time than right now. Pledge to vote in 2024 and help us gear up for the fight._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62277489/402929233/644188750?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDM4YTg0Mi02ZGUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LV1i1WcgxiovMus_o3zipSjfw5qPZRR3E3x_T1SPg9g=&emci=8335b36c-50a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=3038a842-6de3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172) Thank you, NextGen PAC

## Tucker Carlson, Don Lemon Out
Fox News is parting ways with [Tucker Carlson,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1v8yAURn8NbEQ3lw_jgeFdvOVdO1rYXGJaMBamTfPvq3Tu_DxHRzpvt_nmU077_b8v5Hqs89HqOYMSqAXKWfPgIhGS5OSuxqKSYAfgm4tqsNpauVyvcdA0GCKlAIeFFmODX3hyCChBoYZRa40XHJUB8ONqbQzRjEwBhdRru7zXtPeNYn7WL2qXtRae3db7cTL5j-HEcOobbSnn18Zw2mqhnR4nw6lQSJ7hJEdjJIDon-sHNbH6ls-6C78HEeu3eL3F4VsXD_98cb4cDCfeXDgeKed0moEpuBeffiW8_1XjJwAA__8S719s) the highest-rated pundit on TV. The announcement came yesterday afternoon, and Fox Corp stock dropped nearly $1 billion on the news. Neither side commented on the decision, though Fox did thank Carlson for his service. Earlier that morning, CNN anchor Don Lemon was fired--ending his 17 years with the network. [Lemon said](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszzFv8yAQgOFfA1uiywFnGBi-xVu-taNFzBFTYWPZ10b995XatfMrvdLzdp_uqba6Pf-nlaOUPu1HPyewF3QXNJPTORZmZKM53sijNeAH0Ev0xmCeh4CZLcAjW1_84NkaTzOER9I1IqABiw6Ccw6vGCwBpDB7X3KhoCxwrtKP63uvmyxc2lf_5OM691W3uIjspzL_FI4KR3lVkd-mcMx9a7z2TeF4SpKPU-F4IwfOGLoNZCgQWQB9xLy_amv1pEFZeK6ptp-9_GX9DgAA__-JflGC) he was stunned by the news, although insiders [are not](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1u9CAQAJ8Gd1j7LdhnCoqvcXdpU1ocLHcb8XMCFCdvH13q1CONRvN-Pa6OE5f7m8tkR6zHs9V-gJa4SFTHMgUbiZDURPbfuqFWsF1gelgXwQDRFlwkExQqFdYIPkLQTt_MNrFFQAUaFzDLsuCMRq8AzvhtiyGuRmigwKO2-aNyGQ-K6bt-Upt9zVOyjzGeXaj_AneB-3mec6xfhc7-4gL3TIGdwD3UIhPlWuSNvMskKd9ca653LncZuI_m_OBapC9FptqHfFlarVlSCYl6l64M9l1y6Ryo9anZ8Dw5Je7rRWi4Z8fpN2v89egnAAD__-PBa-A). It was Carlson's departure that riveted the media. Speculation was rife as to what was behind the unexpected news, which came just after Fox News paid nearly $800 million to settle a defamation lawsuit over allegations of 2020 election fraud. Carlson had been set to testify before the settlement was reached. For now, Fox plans to air an interim show, "Fox News Tonight," in Carlson's time slot until a new host is named. Carlson's future is up in the air, but former Senator Claire McCaskill said she ["wouldn't be shocked"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uhDAQhJ_GdId8i_krKNLQXdqUK2Mvx-YMRmtzKG8fkTrNaIqRRt_39cCH5cDb89OuNOQ54i4xoTY3qG9QYV34YSYCqgoa7k0HptJdq4tlMK4j31pyznST7icAf_etb9rKV36a6oIH0FBpA7Xu67qGEnrTaG1713Wzn5teGU2ec5TyO_KWF5rDT3yTlC6uRRiWnPekqg8Fo4LxPM9SyAYXyMoeA2d26VoqGN_sKSoYrz8FozZXv8IFy0K4OmfTi0NAxjMewW8ZJ8K0RPcijzxjPtyLBJ2VkOKGcmwJ5yi4CyX2tGVknChjlmPdkROeUYTJl0teQyGD308OgVPTKqOfq-XwB5H_M_obAAD__3upfO8) to see him run for president.
## Rodgers Leaves Green Bay
Aaron Rodgers is [officially headed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DGO6yAUheHV4A4LXwOGguI1dHntlBYxl4QEGwRkrOx-lKmnPV9z9H9d1ouLKR63_25H00NeS81tZZyCoDCvYvAmIALOA5pJKuAzUwsb7mZapFPAASa4IsJVT0Et-qrVIjS6AEM0wGBmHATTQggYQXPJmNObUsEHqQln6GPPdXzkePQ7hvTO31jHLe9DMvfeSyPzPwKWgD3Pc8RWjg8SsEdIBGzrub4J2JWAjZ6AnSUo4FJ8LL_qho0Wtz2xNtqr80idq_mgNfvbZ3tgb3R_pR5LQlri9mxDNb6cMaXY5EI4u-0upt9H_a88PwEAAP__JMdlUg) to the New York Jets. It's the second time in 15 years that a superstar quarterback has left Green Bay to spend the twilight of his career at the Meadowlands, and the Jets [are hoping](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQxvGnsTes82GIGRi6ZEvXjhaBIybFPhdQK799lc7df5_06f9xW24u5bQ_3t1GtkVejsJ1gUmgEigX1QcbiZBkT3bUM04S5gv0q6VIUYEeZw8GQM6awhjU3RsjPYK-98kioIQJFRilFA5oJg3gjJ_nGKI23QQUUuMyPDntbaWYT_6mMnje-mzX1o7aybcOrx1e68Gl1eF0K_MLdHiNaXc5n-Jw_pNKFYVehkI-heftyNRItOICicai0h7E1104V3gXhcPjNWksntSqQMAR9QjjsLYt98WG4yflnKq-dBM8Npfy36v2X6LfAAAA__9u3mi9) this time around works out better than Brett Favre's tenure. Rodgers announced his desire for the trade in February, and the two franchises began negotiating a deal that is now finalized--pending a passed physical from Rodgers. Green Bay [will receive](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQgOGngS3W-TgwDAxZvKVLh44WtbmYCgfLvjbq21dq187_8Ot7u023VGp53F_SlqNwm_ajnRPQBe0FzWT1EjlnzEbn2DuPZMAPoNfoHKFJEAY7M-M8mBACJCDz3rPpmXWJCGiA0EKw1mKHgRxACrP3vLALiiAvRdrRfbTykDVz_W5f-ejmtukaV5H9VOaqcFQ4yrOI_DWF43VJ2-u8ZpZ8KBxPSfJ5Khx7Z8EGCgDQozfkDekjLvuz1FpONyiC-5ZK_V3If96fAAAA__-oB1KP) three draft picks (including a 2023 first-rounder) and New York gets a 1st and 5th-rounder, along with their new QB.
## Montana State House Erupts
Riot police were called in yesterday to quell a [disturbance](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2SnDAQBp8GMlHaQeInIHBCtk4dUlppgHEJDSWNrbu3v9qLL_y-Trr6z3N7OoqUjt_uwkV23u7MZdNGgVXQb7YNy44I2Le4PIYJTK-nUbfnMuvRgnm5MJkX6Jcfgxumx-j7wbvZ27GlBTT02oDVs7UWOpjNoLWb_TTtYR_mxmgMJJy7v0xJTtzjJ__H3Hm-2ricIndp-l8NrA2stdZu54-Etbx5A-vNkYR8aWDNxKLe26O6OIlLTnl3k3BUEXdRldKh7syCRTgXVc5_ogLX9D49YqB0lDYv4a4UI5VhbIw-LkfxW0Z-KvMVAAD__xPKZ5k) in Montana's state House. Protesters shut down proceedings in support of Zooey Zephyr, a transgender Representative who was censured last week for comments that other members called "hateful." During a floor debate about banning transgender medical work on minors, Zephyr had this to say: _" The only thing I will say, is if you vote yes on this bill and yes on these amendments, I hope the next time there's an invocation when you bow your heads in prayer, you see the blood on your hands."_ After consulting with other lawmakers, House Speaker Matt Regier [denied](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGSpCAQgOGnwQwLW1EICC4xm0svtJihGblToOie8fbtt3bjjf_kr-_Pbbv5dKT8_O1PdBzLVluhTU0StIRx011wERFw7NANs4FpVGZR3e7AhMGY-a5ssI8h2LgM6JcBFzXYAe-6Sw4UjGoCrazWGnqw06yUtw9jYoizFZPCkLi0_m9JmXeMx0d5Y-sf5ewOtzNXEuMvAauA9bqu_l_1_7-igDXjRQLW2fAuCYlSyQJWwjdm6VtDYgzSR8YmayuMxDIkaq_KJM-S2Wcv9_IilCXKhrUhYWbP6Y3UNRfqlY4j0byIST1Pn47vKf5J6DMAAP__5H9p3w) Zephyr the right to speak, citing his responsibility to maintain civility and order in the chamber.

clean_body: Fox News is parting ways with Tucker Carlson, the highest-rated pundit on TV. The announcement came yesterday afternoon, and Fox Corp stock dropped nearly $1 billion on the news. Neither side commented, though Fox did thank Carlson for his service. Fox News is parting ways with Tucker Carlson, the highest-rated pundit on TV. The announcement came yesterday afternoon, and Fox Corp stock dropped nearly $1 billion on the news. Neither side commented, though Fox did thank Carlson for his service. | | | | | | Tuesday, April 25, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today we're covering Tucker Carlson’s departure from Fox News, a new home for Aaron Rodgers, and riot police in Montana’s state House. Is this your first time reading The Flyover? and never miss a thing. How did our Editor do today? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover and tell us exactly what you liked or didn't like in today's edition. Want to hear more news? and stay in touch. | Tucker Carlson, Don Lemon Out Fox News is parting ways with the highest-rated pundit on TV. The announcement came yesterday afternoon, and Fox Corp stock dropped nearly $1 billion on the news. Neither side commented on the decision, though Fox did thank Carlson for his service. Earlier that morning, CNN anchor Don Lemon was fired--ending his 17 years with the network. he was stunned by the news, although insiders . It was Carlson's departure that riveted the media. Speculation was rife as to what was behind the unexpected news, which came just after Fox News paid nearly $800 million to settle a defamation lawsuit over allegations of 2020 election fraud. Carlson had been set to testify before the settlement was reached. For now, Fox plans to air an interim show, "Fox News Tonight," in Carlson's time slot until a new host is named. Carlson's future is up in the air, but former Senator Claire McCaskill said she to see him run for president. Rodgers Leaves Green Bay Aaron Rodgers is to the New York Jets. It's the second time in 15 years that a superstar quarterback has left Green Bay to spend the twilight of his career at the Meadowlands, and the Jets this time around works out better than Brett Favre's tenure. Rodgers announced his desire for the trade in February, and the two franchises began negotiating a deal that is now finalized--pending a passed physical from Rodgers. Green Bay three draft picks (including a 2023 first-rounder) and New York gets a 1st and 5th-rounder, along with their new QB. Montana State House Erupts Riot police were called in yesterday to quell a in Montana's state House. Protesters shut down proceedings in support of Zooey Zephyr, a transgender Representative who was censured last week for comments that other members called "hateful." During a floor debate about banning transgender medical work on minors, Zephyr had this to say: " The only thing I will say, is if you vote yes on this bill and yes on these amendments, I hope the next time there's an invocation when you bow your heads in prayer, you see the blood on your hands." After consulting with other lawmakers, House Speaker Matt Regier Zephyr the right to speak, citing his responsibility to maintain civility and order in the chamber. ➤ Anthony Blinken , now US Secretary of State, was the source behind the infamous letter from US intelligence officials claiming Hunter Biden's laptop was part of a Russian disinformation campaign, according to the House Judiciary Committee. () ➤ Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis met with the Japanese prime minister in the first stop of a four-nation overseas trip that will include visits to South Korea, Israel, and the U.K. The trip is seen as an opportunity for DeSantis to build his foreign policy credentials. () ➤ Susan Rice , White House domestic policy advisor, is leaving the position after two years. Rice has come under fire at times for her role in overseeing Biden's domestic agenda, particularly immigration policy. () ➤ NYC Mayor Eric Adams and Chuck Schumer were captured on video with a man accused of running a secret Chinese police station in the heart of NYC. The video shows Lu Jianwan, charged last week with conspiracy, standing at a local event with the two Democrats. () ➤ Kyle Busch won at Talladega, his first victory in a superspeedway points race in 15 years. The win came as his two closest competitors ended up colliding on the last lap. "I got lucky," Busch said. () ➤ The NBA is looking into an incident involving Hawks guard Dejounte Murray making contact with a referee at the end of Game 4 between the Hawks and the Celtics. A decision on disciplinary action is expected before tonight's game. () ➤ The Tennessee Titans have reportedly lost faith in their 3rd round quarterback from last year's draft, Malik Willis. The team may trade up to the 3rd overall pick this year and attempt to draft Ohio State standout, C.J. Stroud. () Market Report 4/24/23 | ▼ | Nasdaq Natl. () ➤ Officials from California and Nevada are asking the federal government to pay for a high-speed rail line between LA and Vegas. It's a rare bipartisan effort that may result in a private company building the line for $10 billion. () ➤ Sleeping glass frogs are very difficult to see because of their see-through skin. Now, scientists have discovered another of the animal's tricks: they hide red blood cells inside their livers to mask the color of their blood. There’s a choice ahead of us. Do we continue to build a future full of opportunities for you and families like yours? Or will we turn the clock back? But here’s the honest truth: I’m more optimistic than I’ve ever been. And it’s because I’ve seen what this team can do when it comes together.
**In 2020, more than 6 million grassroots supporters just like you helped propel our campaign to victory.**
I’m so proud of the progress we made. We took our economy back from the brink, helping create more than 12 million jobs. We took aggressive action to bring costs down for working people -- all while making corporations pay their fair share. We took the strongest action on climate in our nation’s history -- I’m not kidding.
But there’s still so much left to be done. Where we passed the first major federal legislation on gun violence in decades, we now need to finish the job and ban assault weapons. Where we capped insulin at $35 for Medicare recipients, we need to cap it for everyone. And where we finally made the wealthiest corporations pay their fair share, we need to do the same for billionaires.
**We’ve got a lot of work to do and a lot of progress we’ve got to make in the second term._W_ _e’ve got to finish the job._ And I can only do that with you behind me. **
**[It’d mean the world to me to have you with me in this fight. If you’re in, will you pitch in $25 or even just a few bucks in support of my campaign today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zwt2ZjhvUXOZbVTv3WSve4fJ1wNKC6-M6pLg2F212UKyzSeiPDuGIYCaHVwO9vvqVT7LVk70IaAhIVm5zzvlk1W0vzexXIzdnEhLqfkVkGSX3sluezlb5sE_rZBEs4w1OzMeQ3O-2Mp1Va_6uUAJvShnIE3pecgjOUQ5MzVmqkuPzy27W_7m0Bm4BssjOmnHBv5dJ6pJJXdvgAC9N5GYsdiMD0bDnVrx6KoRvCnpZftgSRlDldBg2D4vNjxyMMOy-qnfAXVcgYcxW4twlLsKr96nL--oUAlINVsYH0dtvan0Bzk1JNlHCmkhcirQQy7GwXXKll4OLfdCOa62XnMF4hN3U-89MI4m9kGvRKhzu0_ZAR_aeFYMWx-8Tb0MOKvB8/3vn/TxEfOfKLQFu6IWIsUTpllw/h8/SoIBH_Dz4GeaKOZ5Am5KmjuEgWLEVGdpFgf6KZKUB5k)**
Thank you for standing with us. I’ll see you on the campaign trail.
-Joe

They’re trying to raise prices on prescription drugs and repeal the cost-saving measures we’ve put in place for the hardworking families, all while saying we have enough money to cut taxes for the rich. They’re telling women what health care choices they’re allowed to make. They’re telling you what books should be in your kids' schools. And if you don’t like it, tough luck: They’re going after your right to vote, too. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | There’s a choice ahead of us. Do we continue to build a future full of opportunities for you and families like yours? Or will we turn the clock back? But here’s the honest truth: I’m more optimistic than I’ve ever been. And it’s because I’ve seen what this team can do when it comes together. In 2020, more than 6 million grassroots supporters just like you helped propel our campaign to victory. I’m so proud of the progress we made. We took our economy back from the brink, helping create more than 12 million jobs. We took aggressive action to bring costs down for working people -- all while making corporations pay their fair share. We took the strongest action on climate in our nation’s history -- I’m not kidding. But there’s still so much left to be done. Where we passed the first major federal legislation on gun violence in decades, we now need to finish the job and ban assault weapons. Where we capped insulin at $35 for Medicare recipients, we need to cap it for everyone. And where we finally made the wealthiest corporations pay their fair share, we need to do the same for billionaires. We’ve got a lot of work to do and a lot of progress we’ve got to make in the second term.W e’ve got to finish the job. And I can only do that with you behind me. Thank you for standing with us. I’ll see you on the campaign trail. -Joe | If you would like to unsubscribe from emails like these, Paid for by Biden for President.

But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

Dear Friends,

Join us this Saturday at 10am at our campaign office, located at 1108 Courthouse Rd. North Chesterfield, VA 23236. We plan to meet at the office before heading out to hit the neighborhoods.

We need support. I am the most conservative candidate in this race and we need to let Republican primary voters know that. Also, the later date of June 20th has created some problems for some voters, so we need to reach them now to let know that early voting starts May 5th.

And you don't have to wait until Saturday to help. Our campaign office is open during the week. [Please email us](mailto:chris@chaseforva.com) to let us know you can help.

We look forward to seeing you this week.
For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

HUGE NEWS, friend!
**It's 100% official: Joseph Robinette Biden is running for reelection in 2024!!!**
Friend, the race for the White House is officially on, and it's likely to be a 2020 rematch.

**In case you missed it, Trump has already raised over $18 MILLION to support his campaign. **Now that he's facing criminal charges, we know he and his MAGA minions will work even harder to get him back into power so he can avoid accountability.
**It's simple, friend: Joe Biden is the president we need and deserve, but we're going to have to fight like hell to make sure he stays in office. And for that, we need ALL HANDS ON DECK. **

clean_body: | | | HUGE NEWS, friend! It's 100% official: Joseph Robinette Biden is running for reelection in 2024!!! Friend, the race for the White House is officially on, and it's likely to be a 2020 rematch. In case you missed it, Trump has already raised over $18 MILLION to support his campaign. Now that he's facing criminal charges, we know he and his MAGA minions will work even harder to get him back into power so he can avoid accountability. It's simple, friend: Joe Biden is the president we need and deserve, but we're going to have to fight like hell to make sure he stays in office. And for that, we need ALL HANDS ON DECK. | | Friends, They're coming after our kids! We learned during the pandemic the power that engaged parents and great teachers can have on a generation. I was and am humbled by the love and care my wife, Makenze, gives to her students in the classroom, like so many other great Kentucky teachers. And yet others put their extreme agenda first before our children. [_**We must put a stop to the bad actors and the politicians who stand by these repulsive policies!**_](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/d8568827eff4324d/80007ac055c37252c3d6b838967d376c/40933) A teacher in Louisville is pushing for teachers to push gender fluidity studies and LGBTQ+ lessons into the classroom for students as young as 3 to 8 years old!!
