name: Charles Harper, Evergreen Action
subject: Our health can’t wait
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Tell EPA to finalize the strongest possible MATS rule
| | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-go-further-to-protect-us-from-toxic-air-pollution/?utm_source=ema_2023-04-25_MATS_rule_comments&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fff&t=2&akid=13306%2E53494%2Eo2DZpN)
---
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-go-further-to-protect-us-from-toxic-air-pollution/?utm_source=ema_2023-04-25_MATS_rule_comments&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fff&t=3&akid=13306%2E53494%2Eo2DZpN)
Friend,
Mercury air pollution can be lethal. This potent neurotoxin has been linked to cancer, asthma, developmental problems in children, neurological issues, and more. It has been found in the food we eat and the water we drink. And the biggest source of this pollution? Coal-fired power plants.
**Fortunately, EPA has a proven tool—Mercury and Air Toxics Standards (MATS)—to regulate this type of deadly pollution.** But despite its track record of success, coal plants are still emitting dangerous levels of toxins, and EPA's most recent MATS proposal doesn't go far enough to cut pollution and protect lives.
**We must call on EPA to finalize a stronger standard for all coal-fired power plants.[Submit a pre-filled comment today to urge EPA to go further to protect us from toxic air pollution.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-go-further-to-protect-us-from-toxic-air-pollution/?utm_source=ema_2023-04-25_MATS_rule_comments&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fff&t=4&akid=13306%2E53494%2Eo2DZpN) **
[SIGN ON](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-go-further-to-protect-us-from-toxic-air-pollution/?utm_source=ema_2023-04-25_MATS_rule_comments&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fff&t=5&akid=13306%2E53494%2Eo2DZpN)
---
Addressing mercury pollution from coal-fired power plants can mean the difference between sickness and health, and often even life or death, for tens of thousands of people—**especially those in the historically disadvantaged and low-income communities where coal-fired power plants are too often built.** And, importantly, regulating MATS pollution will also benefit the climate.
**[Our public health can't wait. Join us and tell EPA to finalize the strongest possible MATS rule now.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-go-further-to-protect-us-from-toxic-air-pollution/?utm_source=ema_2023-04-25_MATS_rule_comments&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fff&t=6&akid=13306%2E53494%2Eo2DZpN)**
[SIGN ON](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-go-further-to-protect-us-from-toxic-air-pollution/?utm_source=ema_2023-04-25_MATS_rule_comments&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fff&t=7&akid=13306%2E53494%2Eo2DZpN)
---
Onward,
Charles Harper
Power Sector Policy Lead
Evergreen Action
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=13306%2E53494%2Eo2DZpN). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

name: Team Granite Solutions
subject: JUST IN - Biden Launches 2024 Campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
Help us stop him and the Democrats in New Hampshire

| | | | | [](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/1/01000187b84b04e2-41c91497-db79-4d89-8b36-e043ef291afe-000000/70DRbg_oQX440_Y_ktzkmjgDJ20=319)
---
| | Derek,

**BREAKING NEWS:** Joe Biden has announced his campaign for President again. This makes it even more important for us to come together and work towards securing New Hampshire's 4 electoral college votes for the Republican Nominee and next President of the United States.

---
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/2/01000187b84b04e2-41c91497-db79-4d89-8b36-e043ef291afe-000000/cMm-t-jM-crBF9kLtGE4BOgP3tc=319)
---
We don't need to tell you that Fiscal Conservatives have many concerns about Joe Biden's policies and actions during his time in office. Here are just three things that have caused us heartache since his Presidency started over two years ago:

* **Biden's $5 trillion spending spree:** This massive spending spree that taken place under President Biden's watch, over and above our regular federal government expenditures, has put our economy in a tailspin, caused massive increases in inflation, and have accelerated our debt and deficit crisis.

* **Canceling the Keystone XL pipeline:** This decision, made on Day 1 of the Biden Presidency, signaled to the world that America was no longer going to be energy independent as long as Democrats were in power. Since January 20th, 2021's average price of $2.46, the average price of a gallon of gas peaked at $5.01 per gallon last summer and is still 52% higher than the average at the start of the Biden Presidency.

* **Immigration policy changes:** Biden's reversal of some of Trump's immigration policies and his proposal of a pathway to citizenship for undocumented immigrants have been viewed as potentially incentivizing illegal immigration.

We know that with your support, we can make a meaningful impact in our community and help elect fiscally conservative candidates who share our values. [Your contribution will help us fund critical programs and services, reach more voters, and support candidates who share our vision for a prosperous and thriving New Hampshire.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/3/01000187b84b04e2-41c91497-db79-4d89-8b36-e043ef291afe-000000/vdOo0Jp53k-L482mWkTI9RuBhAY=319)

We believe that every donation counts towards achieving our mission. [Whether you can donate a small or large amount, your contribution will make a difference in helping us achieve our goal of delivering 4 electoral college votes for the Republican party in New Hampshire and elect fiscal conservatives up and down the ballot in 2024.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/4/01000187b84b04e2-41c91497-db79-4d89-8b36-e043ef291afe-000000/D5oqAp9i9E5KdPyIpWelanqrm6k=319)

Please consider making a donation to Team Granite Solutions today. [Your support will help us continue to promote conservative policies and elect candidates who share our vision for a prosperous and thriving New Hampshire.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/5/01000187b84b04e2-41c91497-db79-4d89-8b36-e043ef291afe-000000/ldkXJ_ZkiZ-1vRGGpCg5-NOpSEg=319) Together, we can make a difference and secure a Republican victory in the upcoming election cycle.

Thank you for considering our organization and joining us in our mission. We appreciate your support and dedication to our cause.

\- Team Granite Solutions

clean_body: Help us stop him and the Democrats in New Hampshire | | | | | | | Derek, BREAKING NEWS: Joe Biden has announced his campaign for President again. This makes it even more important for us to come together and work towards securing New Hampshire's 4 electoral college votes for the Republican Nominee and next President of the United States. We don't need to tell you that Fiscal Conservatives have many concerns about Joe Biden's policies and actions during his time in office. Here are just three things that have caused us heartache since his Presidency started over two years ago: Biden's $5 trillion spending spree: This massive spending spree that taken place under President Biden's watch, over and above our regular federal government expenditures, has put our economy in a tailspin, caused massive increases in inflation, and have accelerated our debt and deficit crisis. Canceling the Keystone XL pipeline: This decision, made on Day 1 of the Biden Presidency, signaled to the world that America was no longer going to be energy independent as long as Democrats were in power. Since January 20th, 2021's average price of $2.46, the average price of a gallon of gas peaked at $5.01 per gallon last summer and is still 52% higher than the average at the start of the Biden Presidency. Immigration policy changes:** Biden's reversal of some of Trump's immigration policies and his proposal of a pathway to citizenship for undocumented immigrants have been viewed as potentially incentivizing illegal immigration. We know that with your support, we can make a meaningful impact in our community and help elect fiscally conservative candidates who share our values. We believe that every donation counts towards achieving our mission. Please consider making a donation to Team Granite Solutions today. Together, we can make a difference and secure a Republican victory in the upcoming election cycle. Thank you for considering our organization and joining us in our mission. We appreciate your support and dedication to our cause. \- Team Granite Solutions | | | "Donate $10" | | | "Donate $25" | | | "Donate $50" | | | "Donate $100" | | | "Donate $250" | | | "Donate $500" | | "Donate to Granite Solutions" | | Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman You received this email because you subscribed to our list. | | | | | Peter, [**Joe Biden just officially announced he's running for reelection!!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8c6c935c-6bee-44a6-b064-4170d932cdee/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td804c0ef-32c2-4f34-96d6-dfe21f2d8d6d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Joe Biden stood up to a coup. __With bare majorities and rabid Republican opposition, he's had the most impactful legislative record--Bipartisan Infrastructure Act, Inflation Reduction Act, gun safety--since LBJ._** **__Lowest unemployment in 50 years. All-time record for job creation__ _. __Led us out of COVID_ _ by_ _ putting shots in arms. __Ended the longest war in U.S. history_ _. __D_** __efeated Trump, the biggest danger to democracy we may ever face--and will do it again.__ [**_The next 24 hours are crucial--the press will report his fundraising like it's a Kardashian. Will you join us in RUSHING our President $5, $10, $15 or whatever you can to continue our path towards restoration and a progressive future?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T880b4fcb-cde8-435d-bea8-4e04aecfb492/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _THANK YOU for standing with us, and our President_. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb26e7709-b02b-4dea-b237-d32391649e90/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: American Briefing
subject: Most don't know this about Memorial Day
body:
This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z44obhv0jccuqd9frjiv0nskardf0ku709onbdv0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5j61ob6c5h2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ — but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z575r9n2d9qeiqul6kssnfnmbgrbt00tlsja6bv8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5j61ob6c5h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zavdghd6pt1jj3t0a3m4atjfh2toc3plth0g2aa0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5j61ob6c5h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zu9kba8tmbm15j56ehpsbpkj0guelg0e33jl8es0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5j61ob6c5h2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z165tu7ug2faqt56tl5nmfdjfir0d38qtf1ov7t0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5j61ob6c5h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zn51cj7th3t53jem9m557sc1rb461rs6rc1df8ao_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5j61ob6c5h2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc9j45sb3ikptdrk078d3phbhfp4ba514pk0as98_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5j61ob6c5h2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zerfbq52vfiqu7nnccpi03tihbsj2qc7ci07hp5o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5j61ob6c5h2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrkageh3eifs2hkrur2e7hi7ncdkbd5pltcd7s6o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5j61ob6c5h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjdlp92i2rf011cb2ris268aao9k0bnd979ners8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5j61ob6c5h2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

American Briefing

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z78ia0h7jihcnch7lvl0g8hqnrld9lrjjs5102d8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5j61ob6c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm8p79d9j6iprect66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni60p74clh6aoh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zesssig5d1qem8cdnj6m9hqqofr8vqme56sh712o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5j61ob6c5h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsse4kc60rtmkt6qi5d05mc85ii4ssd03csenun0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or0s9gmco71cpgm49fg)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: BREAKING: Former President Donald Trump Launches "Letters To Trump" Book
body:
Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas and Publisher Scott Kaspar attended an exclusive book launch event Monday night at Mar-a-Lago with President Trump.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/f4b377c58323/breaking-former-president-donald-trump-launches-letters-to-trump-book?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f706db849a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_25_04_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f706db849a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
MAR-A-LAGO SPECIAL EDITION

Last night at Mar-a-Lago, Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas and Publisher Scott Kaspar attended an exclusive book launch of Letters to Trump (https://www.amazon.com/Letters-Trump-Donald-J/dp/1735503754/ref=sr_1_1?crid=1D4VAQGNOLVIQ&keywords=letters+to+Trump&qid=1682398483&sprefix=letters+to+trump%2Caps%2C90&sr=8-1&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f706db849a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_25_04_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f706db849a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , the #1 bestseller on Amazon that features a letter from President Trump to former IL Gov. Rod Blagojevich.
Publisher Scott Kaspar, center, and former IL Gov. Rod Blagojevich, right, discuss the inclusion of a letter from Oprah Winfrey to Donald Trump suggesting that they would make great presidential running mates, while former NYC Mayor Rudy Guiliani sits in the background (Source: Illinois Review)
(Source: Illinois Review)

Also attending the exclusive event were former NY Mayor Rudy Giuliani, former AZ Republican gubernatorial candidate Kari Lake, and Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene.

At the event, President Trump posed with former IL Gov. Rod Blagojevich and Illinois Review Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas, a photo which has been picked up by numerous national news sources.
Former IL Gov. Rod Blagojevich, left, with President Donald Trump and Editor Mark Vargas, right, who advocated for two years with Trump for Blagojevich's commutation. (Source: Illinois Review)

Immediately following the event, President Trump interviewed live from Mar-a-Lago with Greg Kelly on Newsmax, where he reiterated his comments on former IL Gov. Rod Blagojevich.
https://youtu.be/nixiuVPsh0I?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f706db849a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_25_04_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f706db849a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Following his exclusive book launch, President Donald J. Trump sat down with Newsmax's Greg Kelly and spoke about one of the subjects of his new book: Former Apprentice contestant and IL Gov. Rod Blagojevich.

name: Rand Paul
subject: what sets us apart from China
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
Here in America, when people are accused of a crime, there’s a presumption of innocence

| | | Friend – Several Chinese Americans were recently arrested for allegedly engaging in an underground police station, spying on behalf of the CCP. It’s a good thing we’re on top of this, but we need to approach with caution. _[**_I AGREE >>_**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2b5m4jg2gg834am0a2roim4fdv0dm8dj4omple0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5gm4o36clh2bs)_ Through all of this, we need to remember something important: _we’re different than China._ **Here in America, when people are accused of a crime, there’s a presumption of innocence, which is protected under the 14th Amendment. **
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3off4rup46t4is8l311rmqdje8t26v383atiss8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5gm4o36clh2bs)
---
They will get a lawyer. They will get a trial. They will have a REAL administration of justice, not just the government deciding they’re guilty. That’s one of the most basic principles laid out in the Constitution, yet that seems to be thrown out the window when talking about the Chinese Communist Party. **_[Stand with me and protect EVERY American’s 14th Amendment rights.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z72po5hm670hct1d5dk94j7qlbu3vrjicq6i2q88_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5gm4o36clh2bs)_ **
---

---
[**$50**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdg1ct8orq7b4e2tq6nmkn75vbq7tt1vj4rha7vg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5gm4o36clh2bs)
---
| [**$75**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z77fgu8uaaiov3ad44s3lk06c7pqhp5ftkhie960_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5gm4o36clh2bs)
---
[**$35**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za9piugbco42t0l885mt8dtqtsvbs2i9vhkltm2g_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5gm4o36clh2bs)
---
| | [**OTHER**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1gd2tb0e3fokq5dchjf3p9qn9ru9bm2h05ar9mo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5gm4o36clh2bs)
---

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: A Donald Trump yes-man running against me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Hi, friend, it’s Sen. Sherrod Brown from Ohio. I’ve spent my life fighting for the Dignity of Work – and I mean all work. Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I’ll fight for you.
I’m running for reelection so I can keep fighting for workers and families in the Senate – but I need your help. As the only remaining statewide Democrat in Ohio, analysts at CNN say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot – and national Republicans are already launching attack ads against me.
The battle for Senate control could all come down to Ohio – so please, I’m personally asking: Will you give $20 or more right now – split between my campaign and Serve America – to help defend this battleground seat and keep the Senate blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-sherrod]
I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers and electricians. And I’ll be honest with you: The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. I’m fighting in the Senate every day to bring those jobs back, to build our economy by investing in the middle class, and to ensure hard work pays off for every American.
But I’m facing my toughest race yet – in a state Donald Trump won by 8 points. Last year’s Ohio Senate race was one of the most costly and competitive in the nation, and NBC News reports that this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.”
The long and short of it is, I can’t win – and Democrats simply can’t hold onto our narrow Senate majority – if we don’t have strong grassroots support from folks like you.
That’s why I’m asking for your support today, friend: Please, will you chip in $20 or more now – split between my campaign and Serve America – so we can win in Ohio and defend the Senate? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-sherrod]
With gratitude,
Sherrod Brown
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-sherrod [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-sherrod]

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Our average donation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’ve said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$28.99**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665257%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uhN1X6nhBoPnyyx1cG8U%2fA&sysid=1)
That's our average donation this month, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign less than 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665258%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZxtkE4TeZPYHhOVPyLvR2A&sysid=1)**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $1, $5, or even our average gift for this month- $28.99?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665259%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hSKSItUJgH5IKgLBckjDgQ&sysid=1)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665250%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0OSziNsudM%2f2WH8SlYGDNQ&sysid=1) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665251%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XYq2OPiZHVok1J6rl7tFCQ&sysid=1)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665252%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Kmz2X%2f5ZCTmVjOniiT5s2w&sysid=1) | | [Chip in $28.99 ➔](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665253%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FmxN7T%2fLw94pRizGqLq2Sg&sysid=1)

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665254%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d9it%2fHeXOlI1Oc12G6pH0A&sysid=1)**

**[Please add your voice to the growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665265%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jh%2bd9fBW%2bo74f5OsWMIrFA&sysid=1)**

Thanks,

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665266%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eTiFktLKzhBwAWvi%2fTlfXg&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHIP IN $28.99 → **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665267%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mDKcpYzrXSOkKlnymyGu5g&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665268%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DzZmEmd8I3%2fSrY9e4QVNKA&sysid=1)

**The path to the White House runs straight through Georgia - again - and we need your help to win at every level next November.** [DONATE $24 for 24](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62278641/402933615/-1200161212?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzliNmQzOC02ZmUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5-6lXk79ODqxfnpPXVaCsP_ZhDRXNyZIaAF3WZYyTes=) We don’t know who the Republican candidate will be, but we don’t need to. If you want to see four more years of a Blue Georgia, please chip in what you can today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62278642/402933616/-1200161212?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzliNmQzOC02ZmUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5-6lXk79ODqxfnpPXVaCsP_ZhDRXNyZIaAF3WZYyTes=) Onwards, Georgia House Democrats | The Georgia House Democratic Caucus is Georgia’s most diverse group of leaders working on the ground in Georgia every day to _flip the State House and secure a blue Georgia._ **To create the change we need, we’ll need all the help we can get. clean_body: | | | | == | BREAKING: BIDEN ANNOUNCED 2024 PRESIDENTIAL RUN Yes, you read that right, Friend. Biden has officially announced his 2024 Presidential Campaign. America has barely made it out of his first term, and yet Biden thinks we can afford another four more years. We aren't sure who told Biden this was a good idea, but we want to hear from you on the matter. == | == | Thanks for your input, GOP Alerts (Via Team Cammack) | | == | | == | | == | == == == | | | | | | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | == Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Rep. John Ray Clemmons
subject: Our colleagues at the White House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Gloria Johnson Treasurer
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Dear Peter,
First, the Republicans refused to acknowledge thousands of Tennesseans calling for immediate action following the tragedy at The Covenant School.
Then, the Republican supermajority attempted to silence us by attempting to expel three of our colleagues in the Tennessee House for standing up and speaking out against gun violence.
Big mistake. Big. Huge!
Yesterday, House Democratic Caucus members Reps. Gloria Johnson, Justin Jones, and Justin Pearson visited with President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris to discuss common sense gun laws...in the Oval Office! Our colleagues literally took Tennesseans’ resounding call for action from the People’s House to the White House.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/68714/images/IMG_0088.jpg]
We stand united with the Tennessee Three. Tennesseans overwhelmingly support policies such as “red flag” laws, background checks, responsible ownership, and other commons sense laws to prevent gun violence.
Stand with us as we work to break the Republican supermajority and restore order to the People’s House. Donate today and stand with House Democrats as we gear up for special elections and bring the fight to Republicans in 2024! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tnhousedems2023]
Rep. John Ray Clemmons
Chairman | Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tnhousedems2023]
Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Gloria Johnson Treasurer
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
P. O. Box 198082
Nashville, TN 37219
United States

clean_body: Terrible news for the future of America | Dear Fellow Republicans, Joe Biden has officially announced his plans to run for President in 2024 to keep the White House BLUE. We are reaching out to you with an URGENT request. To get America back on track, we must take back the White House in 2024. The past few years have been challenging for America. Our cherished values and conservative principles come under attack as the current administration has pursued reckless policies that threaten our economy, weaken our national security, and erode our freedoms. It's time for a change, and we must come together to stop Joe Biden and his destructive agenda. **** | Thanks for your unwavering support! | | Friend, There are many representatives elected and sent to Washington from all over the nation, but there are a select few who are the best at fighting for and making positive change in our country. **[One such representative is New Jersey’s Tom Kean, Jr., who has been a force for good in our nation’s capital, fighting to make life more affordable, create jobs, and keep our country safe.](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=409086b5e2ce4474bdc148204d1a40bd&_e=e6agWEywscaCMOjE0leVS3xL1jIUB8ajuJ5lYaGc2T2SIzDTzlg9uxj4EAXM8bfhlCusN5NsvnfuKrTPalr080YveNRVI8o1fbgF0uoRNzpkRZkKVSH0YiOtvbAfy1f77SigueLJS_zddXgmKldxayq2AVz_OlZoVnlZrZHZYVluPhHEi8DDVQ02IgXEcxw-wulZ3XgFtkyeT5zSCJ0PeoRR4Al5T7S8c5t75Yo7ISIwusNhFE9-JsRD7yLzzUW7s69UVfVHcOfOy4hb3QmpCWpSYP5NcZjVNffd-FLZReznOCvX0LEMCyVL_Ap5GjEkFBoBsiwWQm3-6CAAmVAAFcXD1_H7dpNaxfnAdPnntv6oHJqYq8nKq_eqprlNz16RW-gQKZg28J47iAWL_mLSWw%3D%3D)** Unfortunately, it’s the most effective members of Congress that always have the biggest targets on their backs. clean_body: Here’s how: | | | | | Friend, There are many representatives elected and sent to Washington from all over the nation, but there are a select few who are the best at fighting for and making positive change in our country. Unfortunately, it’s the most effective members of Congress that always have the biggest targets on their backs. That’s why Tom Kean has ALREADY been on the receiving end of dishonest attack ads from radical groups across the country. In order to keep positive Change Makers like Rep. Kean in Congress, we’re calling on grassroots supporters to chip in and help protect them from future attacks. Friend, it is guaranteed that Tom Kean’s district will be a crucial battleground in the 2024 election. The best time to get ready to defend Tom’s district was yesterday. The second best time is today. Thank you, Republican Change Makers | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2023 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is: Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation. name: Rand Paul
subject: dangers of being like China
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
Here in America, when people are accused of a crime, there’s a presumption of innocence

| | | Friend – Several Chinese Americans were recently arrested for allegedly engaging in an underground police station, spying on behalf of the CCP. It’s a good thing we’re on top of this, but we need to approach with caution. _[**_I AGREE >>_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkik5kg5cmb2lomej1t6qbnpvdb1k3ue11i9d6n8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5gmaor6cph2bs)_ Through all of this, we need to remember something important: _we’re different than China._ **Here in America, when people are accused of a crime, there’s a presumption of innocence, which is protected under the 14th Amendment. **
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8mvtrvl4dbd5842coj1u3ijn2no8u04e9hs8b0g_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5gmaor6cph2bs)
---
They will get a lawyer. They will get a trial. They will have a REAL administration of justice, not just the government deciding they’re guilty. That’s one of the most basic principles laid out in the Constitution, yet that seems to be thrown out the window when talking about the Chinese Communist Party. **_[Stand with me and protect EVERY American’s 14th Amendment rights.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztjiqjq39cadbuhtgcrqcavhulhcovr48iko95co_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5gmaor6cph2bs)_ **

name: Katie Porter
subject: Big news from Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
No Trump scare tactics, just thinking about what we can accomplish in Biden's second term.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=21783%2E3422442%2E2CDtGc)
President Biden officially announced he's running for re-election! [**Can you make a donation today that will be split between our campaigns?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230425-1?refcode=EMAG25_1_BID_20230425_V1_F&refcode2=21783_3422442_2CDtGc&akid=21783%2E3422442%2E2CDtGc)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230425-1?refcode=EMAG25_1_BID_20230425_V1_F&refcode2=21783_3422442_2CDtGc&akid=21783%2E3422442%2E2CDtGc)**
I won't give you a lecture on the stakes of the 2024 presidential election, or a laundry list of reasons why a Trump or DeSantis presidency would be so dangerous for our country...
Instead I'll leave you with optimism for a second term of the Biden presidency. At the State of the Union earlier this year, some of my favorite moments included President Biden talking about continuing our work to hold big corporations and billionaires accountable. From cracking down on stock buybacks to creating good-paying jobs, he reminded us that we can—and we must—build an economy that works for working people. Capitalism can and should be about lifting up workers. **But we need elected leaders in every corner of government who are fighting on behalf of families, not big corporations.**
That starts with making sure we re-elect President Biden and support the work his campaign will do across the country to uplift Democrats up and down the ballot.
[**Donating to our campaigns today will help us lay the groundwork for victory in 2024. Can you donate $5 which will be split between us?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230425-1?refcode=EMAG25_1_BID_20230425_V1_F&refcode2=21783_3422442_2CDtGc&akid=21783%2E3422442%2E2CDtGc)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230425-1?refcode=EMAG25_1_BID_20230425_V1_F&refcode2=21783_3422442_2CDtGc&akid=21783%2E3422442%2E2CDtGc)**
Thank you! Onward to 2024.
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAG25_1_BID_20230425_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=21783_3422442_2CDtGc&akid=21783%2E3422442%2E2CDtGc)**

name: Kamala Harris
subject: We’re running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We are counting on your support once more. | | |
---
**It’s time, Peter. Joe Biden and I are officially running for reelection in 2024.** I’m so excited to get back on the campaign trail to make our case to the American people and I know that President Biden is too. Over the past two years we have accomplished so much together. As we kick this campaign into high gear, we need your support. Grassroots supporters like you were the backbone of our campaign to take back the White House in 2020. Your support has helped power all of the incredible progress we’ve made in the last few years. **Now, the president and I are asking for your support once more.** **[Will you make a $25 contribution to our reelection campaign today? Thanks to you and the 81 million Americans who voted for Joe Biden, we’ve helped create over 12 million jobs, lowered health care and prescription drug costs, and taken the largest action to fight climate change in the history of the United States.
But there is so much more to do, Peter.
Extremists are attempting to create division between us and are working to take away our fundamental rights.
**The right to have control over our own bodies and the right to cast a ballot in a free and fair election are all under threat.**
As vice president, I have the privilege and honor to travel across our nation to meet Americans from all walks of life working to make a difference.
And no matter where I am, I meet so many folks who are optimistic about what is possible when we work together. People who agree that we have so much more in common than what separates us.
**As Americans, we believe in freedom, liberty, and justice. And we believe that our democracy is only as strong as our willingness to fight for it. So today, I am asking you to join the president and me in the fight for the soul of this nation. It’s going to take all of us to build on the progress we’ve made and keep moving our country forward.**
**[You can use this link to donate to join our 2024 campaign today >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wQKWnG_Y5cKFA2Q0-EPQM0RIc-GdQphbrYjV13FegDtsyAcPERrinPXQAq-9D0C6-C2WBNlfeatucCRFBfjso6SXgYQsLrvbjgkKLoIBwetwbbacmHvSea0TYFVXvp_jO4qIbwAUzAh8yHpLjNpl3AKPe7Nr1lP2cUlxx91eOUQgP7PukeSYXNkhNIJEKNEsxIjcWcjnwv2lcpDn8qN0tUfGmWG2tMCl-0SmQsgRStXUjV6mV-NY1qv374NpM5zJd_OJGbs45asGGzG1zheli-ugHkVx9KYAofYs1IKQeO46zgLtREwVt7mdVT2ZhXrUMRLRqzbgO6ZbRWQHVVZSQl0GpF9fAp99k4xrDastA-sDmzlcckJ0c_9kWoG0U-EGQBOxx1HIxxc5FPJ6RQPR3RCspN31Dk1e0PWq9epJz8Sfwn9P6Ze0FGnl7obwctPER8knD2AQYP1E-0dYGmFFwajzTce8iYBbI1XuilixlYvA/3vn/0us_fNLyQZ61u6sE7LeQrg/h7/xcGjq81WwrrA-NDrjGx_lnetS4EhIKRa5WP7qeEYguc)**
Thank you for all that you do for our country. I can’t wait to see you out there on the trail.
-Kamala

subject: President Biden is running for reelection
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2136%2E5257348%2EiiQteq ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Big news, Derek:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em_biden.N3zcZ8&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC30_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2136%2E5257348%2EiiQteq ]President Biden just officially announced his reelection campaign. I
hope you’ll consider sending a donation to our campaigns today so he has a
huge day. I’ll explain more in just a moment about why your early support
matters so much:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Joe Biden and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=apr2023_abs_em_biden.gREhDk&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC30_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2136%2E5257348%2EiiQteq ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=apr2023_abs_em_biden.aDeR-s&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC30_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2136%2E5257348%2EiiQteq ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=apr2023_abs_em_biden.hCYdiE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC30_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2136%2E5257348%2EiiQteq ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=apr2023_abs_em_biden.X6v40y&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC30_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2136%2E5257348%2EiiQteq ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em_biden.N3zcZ8&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC30_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2136%2E5257348%2EiiQteq ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I’ve known President Biden for well over two decades. When I endorsed him
back in 2020, I knew that he was the best qualified to step into the
presidency and lead us out of the crises we were facing. And that he would
return a sense of normalcy to our country after four disastrous years of
Trump.

He did that, and so much more. That’s why I’m endorsing him — on Day One.

Within weeks of his inauguration, President Biden signed into law a $1.9
trillion relief package to defeat the virus and help Americans get back to
work and school — while helping small businesses and working families
navigate a once-in-a-century pandemic.

And true to his word, President Biden has fought to heal the soul of our
nation, taking meaningful action to bring people together and improve
their lives.

Thanks to his leadership, we’ve made historic investments in our nation’s
infrastructure, clean energy, science and technology manufacturing. We’ve
taken on the NRA and expanded background checks for gun purchasers under
21, while closing the boyfriend loophole to keep guns out of the hands of
domestic abusers. We’ve capped the out-of-pocket cost of prescription
drugs, ensuring that no one on Medicare will pay more than $35 for
insulin. And we’ve made the biggest investment in fighting climate change
in my lifetime.

Now we can — and must — keep building on that progress. But it’s not going
to be easy. And this is going to be a hard campaign.

We need to make sure President Biden has strong grassroots support from
Day One, so he can withstand the relentless attacks “you-know-who” and
MAGA extremists are sure to throw his way. And we need to defend
Democrats’ Senate majority — and win races like mine — to ensure that when
he starts his second term, the President has the votes to continue passing
transformative legislation and helping Americans all over the country.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em_biden.N3zcZ8&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC30_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2136%2E5257348%2EiiQteq ]I’d be incredibly grateful for anything you’re able to contribute to
that mission. If you can, split a donation between President Biden’s
campaign and mine today:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Joe Biden and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=apr2023_abs_em_biden.gREhDk&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC30_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=2136%2E5257348%2EiiQteq ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=apr2023_abs_em_biden.5M_may&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC30_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=2136%2E5257348%2EiiQteq ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=apr2023_abs_em_biden.aDeR-s&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC30_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=2136%2E5257348%2EiiQteq ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=apr2023_abs_em_biden.hCYdiE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC30_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1015&akid=2136%2E5257348%2EiiQteq ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=apr2023_abs_em_biden.X6v40y&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC30_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1016&akid=2136%2E5257348%2EiiQteq ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em_biden.N3zcZ8&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC30_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1017&akid=2136%2E5257348%2EiiQteq ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you for everything.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em_biden.N3zcZ8&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC30_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1018&akid=2136%2E5257348%2EiiQteq ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=apr2023_abs_em_biden.-6Oxf3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC30_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1019&akid=2136%2E5257348%2EiiQteq ]DONATE MONTHLY

Peter — It’s time for Cameron Sexton to step down.
_First,_ he led the racist charge to expel the two youngest, Black lawmakers in the chamber. While Reps. Jones and Pearson are back where they belong, serving the people of Tennessee, the Speaker has tried to pull every trick in the book to keep them from legislating.
_Then,_ the news dropped that the Speaker spends more of his time in Nashville than his “home” district in Crossville. According to reports, he may have overcharged the people of Tennessee as much as $78,756 since 2020.
_And it doesn’t stop there,_ it’s now come to light that Speaker Sexton may have had prior knowledge of the sexual harassment incident that led to the resignation of Republican Rep. Scotty Campbell and hid it from the public to cover it up.
Peter — Now, it’s time for Sexton to go. We won’t stand by and let the GOP sweep this repeated corruption under the rug.
[**Add your name right now to join our call to demand that Speaker Sexton resigns.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62283659/402952647/1593217285?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20230425_AM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTAyYWRiNy03NWUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FkRMJqvN3CbXTMtJpHQyqJIIBBb4-6I_sxqbyzI_GFQ=&emci=440f538e-6fe3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=4a02adb7-75e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62283660/402952648/1593217285?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20230425_AM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTAyYWRiNy03NWUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FkRMJqvN3CbXTMtJpHQyqJIIBBb4-6I_sxqbyzI_GFQ=&emci=440f538e-6fe3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=4a02adb7-75e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892)

name: Friends of Dr Bob
subject: 🌾 Gun culture in rural America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Bob Lorinser Running for Congress in the Rural Heartland to End Gun Violence in America
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1]

Living in a rural Congressional district, we're often told that firearms are essential to our 'culture.' Well, so is the safety of our children.
While I agree with and support safe ownership of firearms for sport, hunting, and sometimes protection, folks in rural America need to be mindful that the proliferation of gun violence in America is a national public health crisis.
We need to act, and there are resolutions on which we all can agree. I'm running for Congress and seeking founding donors of my campaign to end gun violence in America.
, can you contribute right now [http://bit.ly/FundDrBob] to my campaign for Congress so I can advocate for gun reform?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.
CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
CONTRIBUTE $75 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=express_lane_75]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [bit.ly/FundDrBob]
In the rural heartland, firearms can be tools, but gun violence is also the leading cause of death for children in the United States. We need to do something and the best arguments for common sense firearm reform come from districts like ours.
I'm a Democrat — a blue dot in a red sea — making waves by running for Congress to flip a seat held by a MAGA extremist Republican who recently proudly stated he isn't willing to do his job [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jbonshootings] to stop mass shootings.
"Bad guys don't care about laws," said Rep. Jack Bergman. "Bad guys don't care about rules. So we can add laws, rules, and restrictions all day long, but the bad people don't."
I shudder to think of his defeatist attitude applied to other criminal behavior. Should we not have drunk driving laws and rules because drunk drivers "don't care"?
Should we not license drivers, register vehicles, wear seatbelts, or regulate the auto industry because drunk drivers "don't care"?
The implication is that criminal legislation doesn't work, so we should throw all efforts to the wayside. The logic against the rule of law is absurd.
I need your help getting Congress [bit.ly/FundDrBob] to advocate for universal background checks, federal research, safe storage, extreme risk protection laws, high-capacity firearm regulation, closing gun show loopholes, waiting periods, and mental healthcare investments.
I'm a family doctor and a public health professional. With gun violence and healthcare being two of the top issues in America, we need a doctor in the House to solve problems with healing policy.
, will you please you stand in my corner today?
ABOUT ME [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1]
WHY IM RUNNING [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/whydrbob]
MY POSITION ON GUN VIOLENCE [https://www.votedrbob.com/search?q=gun]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/1629770877521_regional_screenshot.png]
PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER
FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: President Biden is running

Under the Biden administration’s leadership, we have taken action on climate change and gun safety, made once-in-a-generation investments in our infrastructure, and so much more.
From the American Rescue Plan that helped our nation recover from COVID-19 to the _Inflation Reduction Act_ that is already at work lowering costs, fighting climate change, and embracing a clean energy future, we have many victories to build on in the years ahead.
All we’ve accomplished is hanging in the balance as Republicans prepare to throw their full support behind Donald Trump or another extreme opponent. We can’t afford to go backward and see a flurry of federal policies that restrict abortion, put the ultra-wealthy and corporations first, or harm our public lands.
**President Biden is counting on a surge of support on Day One to start strong and build the momentum to defeat Republicans’ chosen candidate.**
**[Please, split a contribution of any amount between President Biden and my campaign to help kick off 2024 strong to hold the White House and the Senate for Democrats>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62283958/402953723/1707916124?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20230425_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWExNGM0ZS03NmUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uJXiwSFlONFA-NqwzG2s-Q0xPHyCna4q4KQvYG2zC4c=)**
Thank you — your support will help us continue building back better.
— Martin
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate

name: Team Kennedy
subject: I’m a KENNEDY Democrat and I approve this message!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
My father and my uncle had a vision for America. They envisioned a country where racial harmony, prosperity for all Americans, peace in the world, and honest government were possible.

| [ ](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=f_street_announcement_42523&n=1)
---
Peter -- Last week, **thousands gathered in Boston as I**[**officially announced my candidacy**](https://www.kennedy24.com/robert-f-kennedy-jr-historic-presidential-announcement-in-boston?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=f_street_announcement_42523&n=2)**for President**. The auditorium was buzzing with optimism and hope — hope that we can heal the nation’s divisions, [restore honest government](https://www.kennedy24.com/honest?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=f_street_announcement_42523&n=3), and reclaim America as an authentic democracy. During the Civil War, Abraham Lincoln said, “A house divided against itself cannot stand.” Both my Democratic and Republican friends speak of America’s polarization in apocalyptic terms. It is difficult for them to see a safe exit. Many Americans worry about a grim dystopian future. My mission during this campaign, and throughout my presidency, is to heal the toxic divisions that have Americans battling each other. I will spend the next 18 months on the campaign trail emphasizing the values that bring us together, rather than exploiting the issues that keep us apart. I will use my Presidency to tell Americans the truth, end our ruinous [addiction to warfare](https://www.kennedy24.com/peace?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=f_street_announcement_42523&n=4), and reinvest in [rebuilding the American middle class](https://www.kennedy24.com/revitalization?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=f_street_announcement_42523&n=5). I will reverse the merger of state and corporate power that has [subverted our democracy](https://www.kennedy24.com/liberties?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=f_street_announcement_42523&n=6), destroyed the economy, and sickened our people and our environment. As President, I will quickly dismantle the culture of corporate capture that has corrupted our regulatory agencies. My objective will be to restore the public’s faith in the democratic process, through honesty and transparency. I want our people to remember that we are all Americans and show them that it is once again safe to have faith in our government and to feel pride in our country. **Please watch and share**[**this short video message**](https://www.kennedy24.com/robert-f-kennedy-jr-presidential-campaign-launch-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=f_street_announcement_42523&n=7)**and**[**my announcement speech**](https://www.kennedy24.com/robert-f-kennedy-jr-historic-presidential-announcement-in-boston?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=f_street_announcement_42523&n=8)**with your family, friends, and neighbors, and**[**consider making a donation to my campaign**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=f_street_announcement_42523&n=9)**.** Together, we will rebuild a healthy, prosperous, honest, just, and civil nation, that will once again be a shining example of democracy for the world. **** Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. “I’m a KENNEDY Democrat and I approve this message!” #Kennedy24 Team Kennedy
[http://www.kennedy24.com/](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=f_street_announcement_42523&n=10)
* * *
PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.kennedy24.com/unsubscribe?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=f_street_announcement_42523&n=11).

body:

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Republicans lost the Pennsylvania governor’s race last year, and lost control of the state house by a one-vote margin. Now that two seats are open for special elections, they could take back the state house and keep Gov. Shapiro from keeping his promises to voters. The election is May 16, and you can help.
body:
special election May 16th
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb9ca2dfb-a9c2-41ed-8857-c4f1aae262c8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

|

| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**We must stop the Republicans from ripping the state house away from Democrats in Pennsylvania!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b10771b-6b0a-4568-a9c1-a686a4060685/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _One of the biggest victories on election night, 2022, was in Pennsylvania. We elected a Democratic Governor, Josh Shapiro, over seditionist Doug Mastriano, and Senator John Fetterman over right-wing Mehmet Oz._ **_And, in an incredible highlight of the night, we unexpectedly took back the state house by a 101-100 margin!_** **_It created opportunities to make the lives of 13 million Pennsylvanians better, and those in surrounding states and across the country. As we know, guns sold illicitly and climate-change-causing carbon don't know what state lines mean._** _**So, on May 16th, when there is a special election for two open seats in the state house, we cannot let Republicans win them and take back the chamber!**_ _Democrat Heather Boyd (District 163) is clear after the travesty of Dobbs, "protecting women's bodily autonomy" is the main reason she's running. Trevor S. Finn (District 108) says he'll stop permitless carry to protect our schoolchildren. Both GOP opponents, meanwhile, are ready to give guns to anyone and ban abortion for everyone. And they're terrible on EVERY other issue._ [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Democrats Heather Boyd & Trevor S. Finn so we keep progressing in Pennsylvania and across the country, and never return to MAGA Republican policies of pre-2020?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf861b57d-b0a6-4bbd-801a-40916263a2dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting this fight everywhere it's required! Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4015c19d-f162-4ff1-b12e-b03d0a0f2098/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: They're mutilating young girls and we have to stop them
body:
I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children

| |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbg4n2nt0jsqntekrgatur3ra301h7aueeea8nro_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5gm9oj4c3h2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh8sdv7m54gdrrgeavegvgdl4bk9jifv0lseaivg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5gm9oj4c3h2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7lfrvgr2ej8h7p2ku74t9tmeog1j4ouhijis4i8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5gm9oj4c3h2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9k5j88a217pg1vvg4qq64665h2bhecbk9mt6seg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5gm9oj4c3h2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zphc38okhqsg5k95skb3472sls288lh3ma56t3i0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5gm9oj4c3h2bs) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zm8o2hr873g4a2fa1d2aq7ruvb2pmnh7jb3vfe1g_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5gm9oj4c3h2bs)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo8qgukp7g4gr4vi5pd3kooer848bdh30dd6sjc0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5gm9oj4c3h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zocu3fnlkut0qvcpmkmkmncqs1apt2rm30e3gi68_rp22sh2s8i66o72c5gm9oj4c3h2bs)

subject: 🚨[URGENT]: Pro-Life Call to Action 🚨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Call or email your Senator before Thursday encouraging them to support The Nebraska Heartbeat Act | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f2b4b3e5472c/n41kepo7ku-476153?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=d276b3cb74&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
| Speaker Arch announced that a second round of debate on **The Nebraska Heartbeat Act** will occur this **Thursday, April 26th.**

This bill, [LB 626](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=ba37cb8401&e=25844e23a8), is likely to face another filibuster during the second round of debate, and **33 votes** are needed to advance a bill forward.

**_Every single vote counts_.**

Exactly 33 State Senators voted to advance [LB 626](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=f3c22664f8&e=25844e23a8) after the first round of debate. You can see how your Senator voted the first time around [here](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=478c6f5f2b&e=25844e23a8). It's vital that every Senator maintains their support of this bill until it can be signed by Governor Pillen.

We encourage you to share your own personal ‘heartbeat story’ with your Senator, while encouraging and thanking them for the crucial support needed for this bill to move forward.
---
| [FIND YOUR SENATOR HERE »](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=c02bea90b0&e=25844e23a8 "FIND YOUR SENATOR HERE »")
---
| We would also be grateful if you would please lift up this legislation and our efforts in personal prayer. **_Thank you for standing up for LIFE with us_!**

Our state is closer than ever to a reality where mothers and babies are protected from abortion, and it won’t happen without you.

The Nebraska Republican Party will always persevere in taking a stand for the innocent lives of our unborn.
---
| Sincerely, Todd Watson
Political Director
Nebraska Republican Party
**[NE.GOP](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=6b510ff474&e=25844e23a8)**
---
| [**P.S. We will dauntlessly fight for our shared Conservative values, and your support with a donation of even $10 strengthens our reserves as we continue to battle for just causes.**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=4da76c1463&e=25844e23a8)
---
| [DONATE TODAY »](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=4e5b84628a&e=25844e23a8 "DONATE TODAY »")

name: Nikki for Congress
subject: Nikki's next 100 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki For Congress
body:
Team, as you’ve probably heard by now, Nikki just wrapped up a truly impressive first 100 days in Congress. Not only has she sponsored key legislation addressing issues like rural healthcare access and fuel prices, but she’s been in every single part of our newly drawn district to meet directly with Illinoisans about what matters most to them.

Nikki’s energy is unstoppable, and she’s keeping her momentum from the first 100 days going strong as she continues to deliver results to central and southern Illinois. Can you support Nikki’s effective bipartisan leadership in Congress by chipping in $10 to her campaign today?

CONTRIBUTE: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nb-fr?refcode=_PT

Since she’s taken office, Nikki has demonstrated that bipartisanship is far more than a talking point for her. She’s taken the time to build meaningful relationships with members of Congress, regardless of party, to create solutions for families nationwide.

As a member of the Committee on Agriculture, Nikki is in a key position to make valuable contributions to this year’s Farm Bill, and Nikki is already hard at work with colleagues finding common ground that will benefit farmers, not special interest groups. In addition to this year’s Farm Bill, Nikki is working to grow our economy, support the right to choose, and address our nation’s gun violence epidemic – all while prioritizing working families and common ground with fellow Representatives.

The bottom line is that Nikki knows politics as usual isn’t what our communities need, and she’s working across the aisle to make actual change happen.

Bipartisan leaders like Nikki are exactly who we need working for us in Congress. Can you support Nikki’s work with a contribution of $3, $10, or whatever you can give?

DONATE: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nb-fr?refcode=_b1&amount=10

– Nikki for Congress

Paid for by Nikki For Congress

Nikki for Congress
PO Box 5171
Springfield, IL 62705
United States

Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan.

Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead.

Please, consider making a one-time contribution by clicking here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nb-fr?refcode=_PTfooter&amount=10

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Biden's Announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
President Trump brought results, Biden's brought failures | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61738691:WAPjNWDNN:m:1:877327319:B635D4F8BE0829730E2DC307A70179D1:r)
---

Fellow American,

Joe Biden announced his re-election campaign this morning, which means we could end up with another four years of dangerous and destructive Leftist leadership.

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61738691:WAPjNWDNN:m:1:877327319:B635D4F8BE0829730E2DC307A70179D1:r)
70% of Americans think our nation is going in the wrong direction, and letting Biden have four more years is the definition of madness.

Under President Trump's leadership, we were securing our borders, enforcing our laws, inflation was low, we were expanding domestic energy production, and America was safer. When President Trump was the Commander-in-Chief, we were RESPECTED.

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61738691:WAPjNWDNN:m:1:877327319:B635D4F8BE0829730E2DC307A70179D1:r)
**The best four years I had in the United States Senate was when Donald J. Trump was in the White House.** We can get back there again, but not if Joe Biden is re-elected!

If we want to bring back American greatness, we need to help elect President Trump again, and Secure the Senate in 2024. [**Today, I am asking you to get our nation back on track by making a split donation to help elect Donald J. Trump and our campaign to Secure the Senate.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61738691:WAPjNWDNN:m:1:877327319:B635D4F8BE0829730E2DC307A70179D1:r)

Thanks,

Lindsey Graham
