name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Asking you to split a donation between GIFFORDS PAC and President Joe Biden’s reelection campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
President Biden was there for me and had my back in my darkest days of recovery. Now, I’m hoping we can do the same for him on this important day.
#

Team -
This morning, President Biden announced that he is running for reelection.
I’m proud to have President Biden with us in the movement to end gun violence in our country. He is a staunch advocate for protecting our communities, and has taken actionable steps to address our nation’s gun violence epidemic throughout his career in public service.
President Biden is a trustworthy leader who also backs up his words and promises with policy and change. Last year, he signed the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act into law—the most significant package of gun safety legislation enacted in nearly three decades. Under President Biden, the ATF regulated ghost guns and stabilizing pistol braces. And President Biden also signed important executive actions to expand background checks, extreme risk protection orders (aka red flag laws), and safe storage.
While there’s still so much to be done, President Biden’s hard work in his first term has set us in the right direction towards a future free from gun violence.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr23-biden.pK3v-j&refcode=em230425-1-15&t=1&akid=5328%2E3935704%2ExiJET6)
President Biden was there for me and had my back in my darkest days of recovery. Now, I’m hoping we can do the same for him on this important day.
[**Will you split a $5 contribution between GIFFORDS PAC and President Biden’s official reelection campaign?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr23-biden.pK3v-j&refcode=em230425-1-15&t=2&akid=5328%2E3935704%2ExiJET6)

| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-apr23-biden.CfKrS8&refcode=em230425-1-15&t=22&akid=5328%2E3935704%2ExiJET6)**

Gabby Giffords

Joe Biden’s first term has been the most productive and progressive of any modern president. He’s delivered big on the promises he made to us.

He got us back on our feet with record job growth, creating more new jobs in two years than any president has in their entire term. And he’s brought back American manufacturing – creating over 750,000 manufacturing jobs since he took office.

Not only has Joe Biden built our economy back, but he’s stood as a stonewall against MAGA extremism – fighting for reproductive freedom and a greener planet.

**_But President Biden’s work isn’t done._**

The GOP is continuing to try to rip away our rights, suppress our votes, and attack vulnerable communities.

If the GOP wins the White House in 2024, they WILL pass a national abortion ban. They WILL cut funding for SNAP, Medicare, and Social Security. They WILL crack down on voting rights and make it even harder for marginalized communities to vote and gain representation. And they WILL ramp up their attacks on the LGBTQ+ community.

[**_We need to send Joe Biden back to the White House. Not only will he stand tall against the MAGA agenda, but he will continue championing progressive values. clean_body: | | | President Joe Biden just announced he’s running for re-election, and he has our support. = Joe Biden’s first term has been the most productive and progressive of any modern president. He’s delivered big on the promises he made to us. He got us back on our feet with record job growth, creating more new jobs in two years than any president has in their entire term. And he’s brought back American manufacturing – creating over 750,000 manufacturing jobs since he took office. Not only has Joe Biden built our economy back, but he’s stood as a stonewall against MAGA extremism – fighting for reproductive freedom and a greener planet. But President Biden’s work isn’t done. The GOP is continuing to try to rip away our rights, suppress our votes, and attack vulnerable communities. If the GOP wins the White House in 2024, they WILL pass a national abortion ban. They WILL cut funding for SNAP, Medicare, and Social Security. They WILL crack down on voting rights and make it even harder for marginalized communities to vote and gain representation. And they WILL ramp up their attacks on the LGBTQ+ community. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Joe Biden has gotten big things done, built America back better, and he will keep building on that progress when we re-elect him to another term. =_ – GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. * * *
It’s happening, Peter!
On the 4-year anniversary of his historic 2020 campaign launch, President Joe Biden has announced that he's running for re-election in 2024!
And here at Unite the Country, we’re _all in_ to make it happen.
President Biden has already achieved significant accomplishments during his first term — like protecting marriage equality, taking historic action to address the gun violence epidemic, and restoring American leadership on the world stage.
His historic job growth has led to the creation of twelve million jobs since he took office, making his first two years the two strongest years for job growth on record.
And he’s only getting started, Peter.
Now, with President Biden's re-election campaign officially underway, we must continue to uplift his bold agenda and vision for America.
In 2020, Unite the Country helped expose the lies and disinformation spread about President Biden with award-winning digital and television content. Now, we need to do it again, but we won’t stand a fighting chance against Donald Trump and his allies’ massive war chest without your support.
The 2024 rematch between the MAGA movement and President Biden won’t be just another election. It’s a historic fight for the soul of our nation. Abortion rights, democracy, the freedom to vote, social security, healthcare benefits, and everything our country stands for is on the line.
Over 80 million voters unified behind President Biden to defeat Trump in 2020. We can do it again if Democrats start early and overpower the GOP’s dangerous movement.
This is the most important thing we’ve ever asked you, Peter.
Are you in to help re-elect President Biden?
**[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62288542/402971509/-2090587605?refcode=em_UTC_PET_Biden2024ReelectionSeries1POLL_042523_y2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI4MzUzOTIyLTgwZTMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6bvd3RFkRj3jIaRFJE6CA-dDgNlcnLAni6UYGN24rs0=)** | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62288543/402971510/-2090587605?refcode=em_UTC_PET_Biden2024ReelectionSeries1POLL_042523_n2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI4MzUzOTIyLTgwZTMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6bvd3RFkRj3jIaRFJE6CA-dDgNlcnLAni6UYGN24rs0=)**

clean_body: Will you join the fight for the soul of our nation? | = 🚨 BREAKING: President Biden Launches 2024 Presidential Campaign 🚨 = ARE YOU IN TO HELP RE-ELECT PRESIDENT BIDEN? | = | = ---|--- It’s happening, Peter! On the 4-year anniversary of his historic 2020 campaign launch, President Joe Biden has announced that he's running for re-election in 2024! And here at Unite the Country, we’re all in to make it happen. President Biden has already achieved significant accomplishments during his first term — like protecting marriage equality, taking historic action to address the gun violence epidemic, and restoring American leadership on the world stage. His historic job growth has led to the creation of twelve million jobs since he took office, making his first two years the two strongest years for job growth on record. And he’s only getting started, Peter. Now, with President Biden's re-election campaign officially underway, we must continue to uplift his bold agenda and vision for America. In 2020, Unite the Country helped expose the lies and disinformation spread about President Biden with award-winning digital and television content. Now, we need to do it again, but we won’t stand a fighting chance against Donald Trump and his allies’ massive war chest without your support. The 2024 rematch between the MAGA movement and President Biden won’t be just another election. It’s a historic fight for the soul of our nation. Abortion rights, democracy, the freedom to vote, social security, healthcare benefits, and everything our country stands for is on the line. Over 80 million voters unified behind President Biden to defeat Trump in 2020. We can do it again if Democrats start early and overpower the GOP’s dangerous movement. This is the most important thing we’ve ever asked you, Peter. Are you in to help re-elect President Biden? = | = ---|--- Thanks for your support, Team Unite the Country | Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, we’ve been working around the clock to uplift President Biden’s message to the American electorate and elect Democrats who will continue to fight for his ambitious agenda. President Biden and the Democrats are fighting tooth-and-nail to move our country forward, but Republicans are threatening to derail everything. = | = = Follow along: | ---|--- | ** Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. body:
Get Race-Ready — Check out our bite-sized Primary Election Guide| | |
---
Hi Friend, We're back with another cheat sheet to prepare you for the PA primaries with the basics you need to vote for candidates that will protect our rights and our communities!
The republicans are pushing their cruel and inhumane agenda, trying to overwhelm us with hundreds of bills attacking every aspect of our democracy. If we're distracted by fighting for our [right to bodily autonomy](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62289284/402974468/1650564351?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4M2Y0MzM2LTgyZTMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ePNwS4zlmxcTuOuxIM3aRxgvqAXMXxYRq7lrMZmQ0rs=&emci=3f20fdd6-95df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=483f4336-82e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134), maybe we won't notice them taking away [environmental protections](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62289289/402974477/-918976670?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4M2Y0MzM2LTgyZTMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ePNwS4zlmxcTuOuxIM3aRxgvqAXMXxYRq7lrMZmQ0rs=&emci=3f20fdd6-95df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=483f4336-82e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134). If we're focused on our [children being shot and killed in school](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62289291/402974479/297019688?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4M2Y0MzM2LTgyZTMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ePNwS4zlmxcTuOuxIM3aRxgvqAXMXxYRq7lrMZmQ0rs=&emci=3f20fdd6-95df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=483f4336-82e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134), maybe we won't have the bandwidth to [fight book bans](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62289293/402974481/1528972258?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4M2Y0MzM2LTgyZTMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ePNwS4zlmxcTuOuxIM3aRxgvqAXMXxYRq7lrMZmQ0rs=&emci=3f20fdd6-95df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=483f4336-82e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134).
Don't fall for it! A powerful action with minimal time commitment is to vote for representatives and judges that we know will strengthen our democracy Today, we're going to dive into the courts! The judges elected in this election will serve for the next 6-10 years, so let's make sure they aren't fascist.
---
| | QUICK LINKS & INFO

---
| | **This is the final week to register to vote in the PA Primaries! How do I register to vote?** The deadline to register to vote in the PA Primary Elections is **MAY 1ST,** so take a minute to do it asap!It's just a quick, simple form:
---
| | [English: Register to vote here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62289294/402974483/-71211468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4M2Y0MzM2LTgyZTMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ePNwS4zlmxcTuOuxIM3aRxgvqAXMXxYRq7lrMZmQ0rs=&emci=3f20fdd6-95df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=483f4336-82e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134)

**Can I check to see if I'm already registered?** Check your registration status [**here**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62289296/402974486/88266837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4M2Y0MzM2LTgyZTMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ePNwS4zlmxcTuOuxIM3aRxgvqAXMXxYRq7lrMZmQ0rs=&emci=3f20fdd6-95df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=483f4336-82e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134). You can either use your name and address or a form of state-issued identification.
---
|
---
**When is the PA primary election?
** The Pennsylvania primary is on **May 15th**.

---
| | VOTING FOR JUDGES:WHAT'S THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN THE COURTS?

---
| | **The Pennsylvania Supreme Court: 1 open seat
** This is the big one! The Supreme Court has final authority over legal matters that affect the entire state, from criminal cases to constitutional issues. We need judges who will uphold justice and protect our bodily autonomy and other rights.Checkout Spotlight PA's [PA Supreme Court candidate guide](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62289297/402974487/1734511936?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4M2Y0MzM2LTgyZTMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ePNwS4zlmxcTuOuxIM3aRxgvqAXMXxYRq7lrMZmQ0rs=&emci=3f20fdd6-95df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=483f4336-82e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134)
---
|
---
**The Pennsylvania Superior Court: 2 open seats.
** This court hears non-government related criminal and civil cases. If one of the parties in a case before a lower court is not satisfied with the verdict they can appeal the decision to the Pennsylvania Superior Court. This court reviews the ruling and makes its own determination.
Checkout [Spotlight PA's Superior Court candidate guide!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62289298/402974488/-182686537?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4M2Y0MzM2LTgyZTMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ePNwS4zlmxcTuOuxIM3aRxgvqAXMXxYRq7lrMZmQ0rs=&emci=3f20fdd6-95df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=483f4336-82e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134#spl-sup)
---
|
---
**The Pennsylvania Commonwealth Court: 1 open seat** This court the first stop for many high profile cases, such as the state's mail-in ballot law. It oversees government regulations involving state and local agencies.**
** Checkout Spotlight PA's [PA Commonwealth Court candidate guide](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62289299/402974490/-182686537?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4M2Y0MzM2LTgyZTMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ePNwS4zlmxcTuOuxIM3aRxgvqAXMXxYRq7lrMZmQ0rs=&emci=3f20fdd6-95df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=483f4336-82e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134#spl-com)[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62289300/402974498/1734511936?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4M2Y0MzM2LTgyZTMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ePNwS4zlmxcTuOuxIM3aRxgvqAXMXxYRq7lrMZmQ0rs=&emci=3f20fdd6-95df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=483f4336-82e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134)
---
| | So there you have it — these courts may not always get the attention they deserve, but they're critical to our justice system. If you haven't already, make sure that you're registered to vote, nudge your friends, and help spread the word about why these races matter!
---

At KPEF, we're [uniting progressives across the spectrum](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62289301/402974505/-1148132282?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4M2Y0MzM2LTgyZTMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ePNwS4zlmxcTuOuxIM3aRxgvqAXMXxYRq7lrMZmQ0rs=) to show up and vote like our democracy depends on it!

Donald J. Trump April 24th, 2023
You could take the five worst presidents in American history, and put them together, and they would not have done the damage Joe Biden has done to our Nation in just a few short years. Not even close.
Thanks to Joe Biden’s socialist spending calamity, American families are being decimated by the worst inflation in half a century. Banks are failing. Our currency is crashing and the dollar will soon no longer be the world standard, which will be our greatest defeat in over 200 years. Real wages have been falling 24 months in a row—in other words, under Biden, workers have gotten a PAY CUT each and every month for two straight years. We have surrendered our energy independence, just like we surrendered in Afghanistan, which we had just a short time ago—and the price of gasoline just hit a 5-month high, and it’s going much higher than that.
Under my leadership, we had the most secure border in U.S. history, by far. Never had a border like this. Under Biden, the Southern Border has been abolished—and millions of illegal aliens have been released into our communities. What’s happening now is beyond belief. They’re coming in from mental institutions and prisons. They are all being emptied. They are being dumped into the United States of America. Many of these people are very dangerous, they are being dumped. We are like a dumping ground. Our cities have been overrun with homelessness, drug addicts, and violent criminals, who are being released from jail in mass with no retribution whatsoever, while law enforcement is weaponized against law-abiding conservatives or Republicans, or people they just don’t like. Our children are being indoctrinated and mutilated by left-wing freaks and zealots. The senior ranks of our military have gone completely woke, and our military is suffering greatly.
Biden has totally humiliated our Nation on the world stage—starting with the Afghanistan disaster, perhaps the most embarrassing event in the history of our country. It meant so much to our enemies when they watched that horrible retreat. Russia is teaming up with China. Iran is days away from a nuclear bomb—not even thinkable. Ukraine has been devastated by an invasion that would never, ever have happened if I was president—and Joe Biden has led us to the very brink of World War III. They say Trump was right about everything. Well, I’m not predicting World War III, but I will say this: we’re very close and they’re only talking about nuclear weapons.
On top of it all, Biden is the most corrupt president in American history—and that’s not even close. Nobody can believe what’s going on, with again no retribution whatsoever.
With such a calamitous and failed presidency, it is almost inconceivable that Biden would even think of running for reelection. You know what happened in the last election: they cheated, and they rigged the election. But I promise you this: when I stand on that debate stage and compare our records, it will be Radical Democrats’ worst nightmare because there’s never been a record as bad as they have, and our country has never been through so much. There has never been a greater contrast between two successive administrations in all of American history. Ours being greatness, and theirs being failure.
With your support in the election, we will defeat Joe Biden in 2024. We will rescue our economy. We will crush inflation. We will stop the invasion on our southern border. We will restore our Nation’s dignity. And we will prevent World War III from happening. Together, we will all Make America Great Again! Thank you.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: President Biden’s big announcement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=215%2E35263%2EU6BgKF ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Hi Peter —

President Biden made an exciting announcement earlier today: He’s running
for reelection!

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-biden.fQiiGs&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=215%2E35263%2EU6BgKF ]Will you split an urgent donation between our campaigns to ensure we
win Wisconsin and the White House? Donald Trump and his MAGA opponents
will unleash furious attacks against President Biden before long, so this
needs to be a big day for our campaigns.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-biden.fQiiGs&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=215%2E35263%2EU6BgKF ]DONATE NOW

I’m thrilled that President Biden is going to keep up the fight to restore
the soul of our nation. Over the last few years, we’ve made incredible
progress together. From lowering the cost of insulin to passing federal
protections on marriage equality, I’m proud of the work President Biden
and Senate Democrats accomplished recently. We still have so much
important work ahead of us, and together, I know we can keep up our
progress.

But both President Biden and I have our work cut out for us to win in
Wisconsin next year:

In 2020, Wisconsin narrowly delivered the electoral votes President Biden
needed to defeat Donald Trump. And last year, Republicans spent $77
million on the Senate race and ended up winning by a single point.

Elections are won and lost by close margins here. The GOP is already
targeting Wisconsin — in fact, they picked Milwaukee as the site of their
party convention, a signal of how badly they want to win the Badger State.

Well, we won’t let them! But we’ll need your help to show Republicans that
Wisconsin is not up for grabs.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-biden.fQiiGs&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=215%2E35263%2EU6BgKF ]I’m hoping you’ll join me in supporting President Biden by splitting a
donation between our reelection campaigns. Wisconsin is essential to
protecting our Senate majority and the White House. Any amount will help
us win next year and keep up the progress we’ve been making.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to President Joe Biden and Tammy Baldwin will go through
immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-biden.chX-Zw&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=215%2E35263%2EU6BgKF ]CHIP IN $5 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-biden.c5nNxm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=215%2E35263%2EU6BgKF ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-biden.HkOuCp&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=215%2E35263%2EU6BgKF ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-biden.0jG6uE&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&t=1010&akid=215%2E35263%2EU6BgKF ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-biden.08XM2r&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=215%2E35263%2EU6BgKF ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-biden.fQiiGs&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&t=1012&akid=215%2E35263%2EU6BgKF ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I can’t wait to join the president on the campaign trail! Here’s a photo
from the last time he joined me on the road in Wisconsin.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-biden.fQiiGs&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230425_AM1_V1_S1&t=1013&akid=215%2E35263%2EU6BgKF ]ClientTitle

Thank you so much for supporting President Biden and me.

— Tammy

P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

name: Charles Booker
subject: FWD: National support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

As we approach another fundraising deadline, I’m hoping you’ll help us
reach a $10,000 goal and help take a big step towards fully retiring our
campaign debt.

I hate to have to ask -- but we left it all on the field at the end of the
campaign, and ended up with some bills left to pay. I want to make sure
those campaign expenses get paid and I want to step into our next fight
together. First, I need your help.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18938?t=1001&akid=3177%2E346206%2EESPHc9 ]If you’re in a position to do so, please click here to rush a
contribution before midnight.

Thank you!

Charles

--- Forwarded message ---

Peter, as you know, my race was not a conventional one. The
campaign we built together was focused on reaching new voters, expanding
the electorate, inspiring people who weren’t political to invest in the
democratic process.

The issues we talked about resonated with so many people across Kentucky.
Those are issues we continue to fight for and I believe that soon we will
win.

But despite the historic progress we made and the hundreds of thousands of
donations we received, national support never came.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18938?t=1002&akid=3177%2E346206%2EESPHc9 ]That is in part why I need to ask again if you will make a contribution
so that we can close out our campaign and focus on the next chapter of our
fight together. Please, if you’re in a position to do so, click here to
make a contribution.

I’ve been asking for your help for a few weeks now and we’ve made a lot of
progress. We’ve chipped away at our debt, but we still have some ways to
go.

Thank you for anything you can contribute. I appreciate you and I’m
excited to move on to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230425-3177-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3177_346206_ESPHc9&akid=3177%2E346206%2EESPHc9

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3177%2E346206%2EESPHc9

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

I decided to run for Congress because I didn’t want any American to experience the socialist tyranny my parents did. And now, I need your help to keep America the freest country on Earth. Socialism isn’t pink infographics and #resist t-shirts. It’s violent, stifling, and all-encompassing - and that’s the truth the Democrats don’t want you to see. We CANNOT take the threat of socialism lightly. Thank you, | | | | Rep. Maria Elvira Salazar | | Paid for by Salazar for Congress | | Unsubscribe from future emails

body:
Republicans like Trump and DeSantis have a huge fundraising lead in the presidential race and President Biden needs our help to catch up.

Friends -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution directly to Joe Biden’s re-election campaign.
If you already know the stakes of making sure our president defeats Trump, DeSantis or whoever and gets to serve four more years, just use this link to contribute today:
[**https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/Joe-Biden**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden-newsom/?refcode=em230425-1-full&refcode2=1320_4767699_noNrSG&akid=1320%2E4767699%2EnoNrSG)
Otherwise, please give me a chance to explain. Because here is the truth:
Republicans like Trump and DeSantis have a huge fundraising lead in the presidential race and President Biden needs our help to catch up.
It’s a moment that reminds me of Bobby Kennedy’s eulogy of his brother, President John F. Kennedy, at the Democratic convention.
Bobby Kennedy said that JFK would have never been able to accomplish any of what he did without the support of all of you — the Democratic Party.
He said that when we’re in it together, we can accomplish a great deal.
That is true in helping President Biden catch up to Republican fundraising so he can win this race.
That is true in helping President Biden continue to pass his agenda for working people in this country for four more years.
That is true in helping Democrats win the existential struggle for our democracy against extremist Republicans who are systematically attacking the very foundations of our free society.
No one person could do all of that alone. We all have a role to play.
And today, it just so happens that the people who need our help the most are President Joe Biden and California’s own Vice President Kamala Harris. So please:
[**Use this link to contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today, directly to Joe Biden’s re-election campaign. It all adds up when we all do our part, and together we can help President Biden catch up to the Republicans fundraising advantage.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden-newsom/?refcode=em230425-1-full&refcode2=1320_4767699_noNrSG&akid=1320%2E4767699%2EnoNrSG)

body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62290550/402979367/1324874474?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230424eom1_gv_180da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjFiOWI3NC04NWUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PqQ11-sU1BJ3Czj9zFJJ8QtLddqwCXFUjflgYxH4iX4=)
---
Team, For the first time in history, the United States government might default on its debt — there’s just one month left for Congress to raise the debt ceiling. **House Speaker Kevin McCarthy and the GOP are using this opportunity to hold our government hostage and demand $4.5 TRILLION in cuts that will hurt our communities. These cuts will result in:**
* 430,000 low-income families losing public housing;
* 1 million fewer senior citizens receiving food from Meals on Wheels;
* 200,000 children losing access to Head Start programs;
* Less firefighters, police officers, and other law enforcement personnel.

Plus, they want to completely repeal the clean energy advancements made in the Inflation Reduction Act — the largest investment in clean energy and climate action in U.S. history — including more than 142,000 jobs. Whether it's rolling back our basic freedoms like reproductive choice or cutting services and jobs that people rely on, the far-right GOP are trying to force New Mexico and our country backward, and I won’t accept it. **[This Sunday, April 30, is our people-powered campaign’s next critical fundraising deadline. name: Team Beshear
subject: "Craft loaned self $7 million, other KY GOP governor candidates raised steady in first quarter"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
You can tell a lot about a candidate by their supporters. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62291068/402981226/-428057120?refcode=em23_230425_craft_fndd_gq_act_7ml_TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230425_craft_fndd_gq_act_7ml_TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=04d8c068-86e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGQ4YzA2OC04NmUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o8lySYHTaqWRiaO2TqP1Li3GNVb6CnH5yL-6zgl8LQQ=)
## "Craft loaned self $7 million, other KY GOP governor candidates raised steady in first quarter"
---
Peter,

Since the start of 2023, billionaire Kelly Craft has loaned her own campaign **$7 million** — making up nearly all of the $7.2 million she's raised this year. And she's already spent over $3 million on TV ads to try to undo the progress we've made!

Meanwhile, Kentuckians across the Commonwealth have powered Andy's campaign. His grassroots supporters, chipping in just a few dollars at a time, make up the bulk of his fundraising.

**You can tell a lot about a candidate by who is backing their campaign** , and nurses, teachers, construction workers, students, and other hardworking Kentuckians are the foundation of Andy's reelection. And she's already spent over $3 million on TV ads to try to undo the progress we've made! Meanwhile, Kentuckians across the Commonwealth have powered Andy's campaign. His grassroots supporters, chipping in just a few dollars at a time, make up the bulk of his fundraising. Friend,

**Southwest Ohioans will _always_ be the heart of our campaign. **

From the campaign trail to the halls of Congress, Greg keeps your voice at the forefront of everything he does. From fighting to lower costs, improve public education, invest in infrastructure, or bring more good-paying jobs to Ohio, Greg will never stop working to _deliver_ on the issues that are most important to you.

name: Rand Paul
subject: what sets us apart from China
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
\
It's a good thing we're on top of this, but we need to approach with caution.

| | | Friend - Several Chinese Americans were recently arrested for allegedly engaging in an underground police station, spying on behalf of the CCP. It's a good thing we're on top of this, but we need to approach with caution. _[**_I AGREE >>_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=02d3c8650466455087946a38ec056661&_e=-eMr37Eg98fVLZW-5OeFMlqYvdAgN-ypq-eyhQMv-ZANSnKEyu3MG8EYRC3LxkXQacs-BJw9RvFMbDvTW35F1ftoIWZg3EAjvoVLgcx-PWFLEC-1DXcsJi2pLfOIiMANhXLY7e_qAdAWQiwkS9RIc7JSWQufIUYCI5Es6pe2un0GD6qnCZYtyyeYW9G1xuDjtVdP4QLKN6eN2Tvpm7Z1L7KQNYvdktVBiTTyxO1Cikjy2tOOvbB-yWlo3IsI7zc8jC9J1U-ZjeAK37RvClyUfcqC_ztp3FiueEXMmGZNNqU5JYCjjwNbKxO5NwBDQPTAWQh7iQpiOIWERS8dgXDwqExNTMlBixdcNcasa7VrY5A%3D)_ Through all of this, we need to remember something important: _we 're different than China._ **Here in America, when people are accused of a crime, there 's a presumption of innocence, which is protected under the 14th Amendment. **
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=02d3c8650466455087946a38ec056661&_e=-eMr37Eg98fVLZW-5OeFMlqYvdAgN-ypq-eyhQMv-ZANSnKEyu3MG8EYRC3LxkXQacs-BJw9RvFMbDvTW35F1ftoIWZg3EAjvoVLgcx-PWFLEC-1DXcsJi2pLfOIiMANhXLY7e_qAdAWQiwkS9RIc7JSWQufIUYCI5Es6pe2un0GD6qnCZYtyyeYW9G1xuDjtVdP4QLKN6eN2Tvpm7Z1L8XZqV9SWdZdFJCc1dzOJezGao2qjazZ7bo6fjqM73BPfs10onsDAG-fxOWFe7nIWkSeCnBNqiPvSRtr7N-9HxxRjHWU51q8fSKce1mebviSGwOSs6VQFbIpRB2x3jfKIUo5QYIKZof0VnPKNm6HJPQ%3D)
---
They will get a lawyer. They will get a trial. They will have a REAL administration of justice, not just the government deciding they're guilty. That's one of the most basic principles laid out in the Constitution, yet that seems to be thrown out the window when talking about the Chinese Communist Party. **_[Stand with me and protect EVERY American's 14th Amendment rights.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=02d3c8650466455087946a38ec056661&_e=-eMr37Eg98fVLZW-5OeFMlqYvdAgN-ypq-eyhQMv-ZANSnKEyu3MG8EYRC3LxkXQacs-BJw9RvFMbDvTW35F1ftoIWZg3EAjvoVLgcx-PWFLEC-1DXcsJi2pLfOIiMANhXLY7e_qAdAWQiwkS9RIc7JSWQufIUYCI5Es6pe2un0GD6qnCZYtyyeYW9G1xuDjtVdP4QLKN6eN2Tvpm7Z1L2tZVNbgrgRFymdDDmvOS5QzVFBZvmhvag3heqfhnCcEpYUXTmpHrCcDgZ28ar9VvhmLSCUGsAMdzraZCmy6afxcNZ3fvYL5wRvBSLdYRs4BrAzel2iGtUE37D9F9YM3epurDU01CLhy0QavR8eb6LY%3D)_ **

name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht=20|=20True=20the=20Vote?=
subject: In case you missed it...they dropped the lawsuit...(KONNECH)!
body:
Major legal victory | | | | | |
---
| | Hi Friend -
Last week, we shared with you that the Konnech v. True the Vote lawsuit was headed towards discovery. Today, we share with you that Konnech has indeed dropped the lawsuit, notably after last week’s email to you in which we shared [so much evidence.](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=d9ed02e4d5&e=ad8cba7e98)
You know better than most, this was the very lawsuit that landed Gregg Phillips and I in federal prison – for refusing to name a source. Meanwhile, they had accused us of defamation, of hacking their servers, and pursuing them out of racist and xenophobic intent (none of which happened).
Think about the kinds of projects we take on - we don’t engage in these efforts because they are “low-risk” or because we expect the system to always favor justice. This time it has and for that we are very grateful.
True to form, there was no mainstream media coverage; however, the victory was memorialized [here](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=0a3a61eefe&e=ad8cba7e98) and [here](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=c3e9acc5a8&e=ad8cba7e98), and in the video below, you can hear Gregg share his firsthand account on Steve Bannon’s War Room.
---
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=8a33280ba1&e=ad8cba7e98)
We hope you have already received the press release giving notice that the Konnech suit was dropped, but ... maybe not. In the events of last week, True the Vote’s website was (again) targeted and taken offline. [(We’ve included the notice here once more).](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=820ca581c3&e=ad8cba7e98)
This is not a rare occurrence for us – the haters are going to hack, and the haters are many. While everything is smoothly up and running again, hacking attempts are made on our sites thousands of times each week. In fact, it’s actually one of our KPI’s, one of our signals that we are over the target – that we pose a material threat to these forces that are nothing less than evil. It was almost as soon as we started getting positive buzz about Konnech that our website was hit, proving yet again that the opposition is desperate to remove us from the battlefield.
Even as we celebrate this victory, we must also acknowledge that our fight is far from over. The Konnech lawsuit (and a half dozen more currently underway) have cost us millions of dollars in legal fees. It's clear that this form of lawfare is designed to drive organizations like ours into bankruptcy. And while the Konnech battle ends (for the moment), the collective opposition has delivered some very forceful blows. We need your help to continue fighting for election integrity and to stand up against those who try to silence us.
We will win, but not without you. [**The most important thing you can do right now is donate.**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=155959e129&e=ad8cba7e98)
[**Please consider supporting True the Vote today. Every contribution, big or small, makes a difference and helps us continue this critical work.**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=e956c664e6&e=ad8cba7e98)
We can’t thank you enough for your continued support and dedication to our cause. Gregg and I stood in the gap for this Konnech fight, but you were the wind in our sails - and you allowed for this beautiful victory.
Together, we will protect the sanctity of our elections and ensure that every voice is heard and every vote is counted.
As always – stay strong, stay vigilant, and stay informed.
Ever onward -

P.S. — Lest you think that lawfare is all that takes up our days, we’re still hard at work on other platforms and plans to advance our shared mission and build community around these efforts. Join us here on both [Open.Ink](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=b3058a51c6&e=ad8cba7e98) and [Onward.Social](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=97ace3b346&e=ad8cba7e98) to learn more about our adventures in freedom.
P.P.S — Buen Camino! Yes, if you just checked out the Onward.Social app, I am currently walking the Camino de Santigo in Spain. Nevertheless, it’s still my top priority that you hear directly from me – hence this note today :). Please reach out to me [on the trail!](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=3add4ae628&e=ad8cba7e98)
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=904e2c0686&e=ad8cba7e98)
| | | | |
---
_Copyright © 2023 True the Vote, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in for updates via the True the Vote website.

**Our mailing address is:**
True the VotePO Box 3109# 19128Houston, TX 77253-3109
[Add us to your address book](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/profile?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=3eebd4fa1f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=3eebd4fa1f).
|

name: Lynese, Senior Advisor for Team Cori
subject: We're angry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Content Warning: This emails contains language about sexual assault.
#
_Content Warning: This email contains language about sexual assault._
* * *
Peter,
Earlier this month, a Trump-appointed, anti-abortion judge in Texas issued a nationwide ban on Mifepristone, a pill used in medication abortions. But on Friday, the Supreme Court preserved access to this essential medication **_for now_** while the legal case on Mifepristone's future continues.
We're angry because abortion care—a life-saving and necessary form of health care—continues to be under a coordinated attack by far-right extremists.
We're angry because Mifepristone has been deemed safe and effective for over 20 years, yet the judge used blatant lies about Mifepristone to justify his decision.
As the case continues to make its way through the courts, it will likely once again end up in the illegitimate Supreme Court.
**We refuse to tolerate a handful of far-right extremists controlling what decisions we can make with our bodies.**
I don't care what one unelected, far-right, anti-abortion judge says. Its racist, sexist, classist, and ableist ruling won't stop us from accessing the care we need.
That's why earlier this year, Cori and Senator Tina Smith introduced legislation that would codify protections for access to abortion medication so that we can ensure everyone in this country can have access to abortion care—no matter where they live.
**We're not backing down in this fight, but Cori can't do the work alone, Peter.[Will you chip in $5 to help power our movement's work advocating for abortion care? It's going to take all of us working together to push back against anti-abortion extremists and defend our rights.**](https://act.coribush.org/go/2532?c0=cori-em-20230425.hmgHZ8&refcode=em20230425-2575&t=1&akid=2575%2E1082990%2ERKA27X)
**[Donate](https://act.coribush.org/go/2532?c0=cori-em-20230425.hmgHZ8&refcode=em20230425-2575&t=20&akid=2575%2E1082990%2ERKA27X)**
Although access to Mifepristone has not yet changed, we don't want to downplay what's happening. We're witnessing the most dangerous attacks on reproductive freedom in our lifetime.
This is what Republicans have been working toward for decades. We knew they would never stop attacking our bodily autonomy, even after their illegitimate Court repealed _Roe v. Wade_ last summer.
**We won't let the GOP tell us to hide or be ashamed for demanding our right to reproductive freedom.
**
That's why Cori spoke publicly for the first time — in a Congressional hearing — about getting an abortion after she was sexually assaulted at the age of 17. And although it doesn't get easier to talk about, it's an important story to share so that we can understand the urgency of this moment as the GOP heightens their attacks against access to abortion care.
We're going to continue sharing all of our stories and putting our bodies on the line until reproductive justice is a reality in every corner of our country. [**If you want to support this work, chip in $5 or whatever you can so Cori can continue advocating and legislating for abortion care?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/1238?c0=cori-em-20230425.Th56kl&refcode=em20230425-2575&t=21&akid=2575%2E1082990%2ERKA27X)
At this moment, we must show up. We must stand up. And we must care for and support our community. Make no mistake about it, this impacts each and every single one of us.
It's not over. The landscape keeps changing, but the fight is not over.
In solidarity,
Lynese, Senior Advisor
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230425?refcode=em20230425-2575-footer&t=22&refcode2=2575_1082990_RKA27X&akid=2575%2E1082990%2ERKA27X) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.coribush.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.coribush.org/signup/update-your-information?t=23&akid=2575%2E1082990%2ERKA27X)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.coribush.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2575%2E1082990%2ERKA27X)

name: Laura Friedman
subject: Yesterday’s ceremony commemorating the Armenian Genocide.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62293181/402988564/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODk4ZTJjZmEtOGFlMy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dV2Q3I56WQpAdGzRolL3y1ICL3nnuz_ww_fI8TrsY2I=) Friend,

Yesterday, we commemorated 108 years since the genocide of 1.5 million Armenians by the Turkish Ottoman Empire. I was honored to present a resolution on the Assembly Floor commemorating this dark and tragic chapter in history.

This year, Armenian Genocide Remembrance Day has taken on a heightened urgency.

Over 150,000 ethnic Armenians living in Artsakh face continued aggressions from Azerbaijan. Tens of thousands of Armenian civilians in this region are currently under blockade and have been left without access to essential goods -- including life-saving medication and health care.

We all must call out atrocities against vulnerable people who simply want their right to autonomy, peace, and justice. That includes recognition and reparations from the Turkish state. It also means standing against the anti-Armenian hate crimes that have become more frequent -- here in our community and around the world.

I commend the Armenian people for their unwavering resilience, and though your homeland is far, it is near in all of our hearts. May the victims of the Armenian Genocide, and all genocides that have come to follow it, rest in eternal peace.

Sincerely,

clean_body: | = Friend, Yesterday, we commemorated 108 years since the genocide of 1.5 million Armenians by the Turkish Ottoman Empire. I was honored to present a resolution on the Assembly Floor commemorating this dark and tragic chapter in history. This year, Armenian Genocide Remembrance Day has taken on a heightened urgency. Over 150,000 ethnic Armenians living in Artsakh face continued aggressions from Azerbaijan. Tens of thousands of Armenian civilians in this region are currently under blockade and have been left without access to essential goods -- including life-saving medication and health care. We all must call out atrocities against vulnerable people who simply want their right to autonomy, peace, and justice. That includes recognition and reparations from the Turkish state. It also means standing against the anti-Armenian hate crimes that have become more frequent -- here in our community and around the world. I commend the Armenian people for their unwavering resilience, and though your homeland is far, it is near in all of our hearts. May the victims of the Armenian Genocide, and all genocides that have come to follow it, rest in eternal peace. Sincerely, Laura | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! body:
I've said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It's run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$28.99**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a48d4f01ee7f420ea0b87933edd7aa4f&_e=Hi5_mXK11jWLqa9GnS8-jKb-7amO_7glTcMCBKMx0Bk_cObR-WkG_mO_rF9pll5gRPPK61t2tVVyu9nx_GkD6C4NaW21OChImeWvrdCEFZK2omCCBLXyOZGjg2fLFmwR8bHQVit1gg_ReQaXQaPsxcgLZEGxpcmcKdsDwOsPJ8eGQVBAUdQn0bx6dfOdR_y8nyQl7rhlldFwxZJfJpFJYz5ci8rchsT8db-cd75GtKNUZRxtC09OBdh9SbJiFnp06LULQIxnGTPjD4pKbAjrBAzwlnl89lORw13HxYMWlIaZ0ckRRVtWRq9aZpt1xUfek4hZ7xLe1RDVYq1D7Q7nxcrmr5ivLMluqBS7MCk1eMr3xcbgnGJnA-o1B7aRdVJmKTMNeBLI9nxJX6Tntbw4qP4eVhPkdJeP4o9qZ_6vDFc%3D)
That's our average donation this month, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign less than 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a48d4f01ee7f420ea0b87933edd7aa4f&_e=Hi5_mXK11jWLqa9GnS8-jKb-7amO_7glTcMCBKMx0Bk_cObR-WkG_mO_rF9pll5gRPPK61t2tVVyu9nx_GkD6C4NaW21OChImeWvrdCEFZK2omCCBLXyOZGjg2fLFmwR8bHQVit1gg_ReQaXQaPsxcgLZEGxpcmcKdsDwOsPJ8eGQVBAUdQn0bx6dfOdR_y8nyQl7rhlldFwxZJfJpFJYz5ci8rchsT8db-cd75GtKNUZRxtC09OBdh9SbJiFnp0FwsLUyJ8I8G4Fyzx7jA4Bjqz5M-9XhMIvzDeV9U01DBfkjrLhIgdayl-ZBmmn1VslpMReb_HnMnH0wvVAYkejhrMnEJ8T1V9WY3e4CPOKyXFypgqpWj15PIYB7GjC6ZhDugYZsGfLCmbQ0opYrQFAao6S0jrBL323uO3PLt-Nwk%3D)**

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a48d4f01ee7f420ea0b87933edd7aa4f&_e=Hi5_mXK11jWLqa9GnS8-jKb-7amO_7glTcMCBKMx0Bk_cObR-WkG_mO_rF9pll5gRPPK61t2tVVyu9nx_GkD6C4NaW21OChImeWvrdCEFZK2omCCBLXyOZGjg2fLFmwR8bHQVit1gg_ReQaXQaPsxcgLZEGxpcmcKdsDwOsPJ8eGQVBAUdQn0bx6dfOdR_y8nyQl7rhlldFwxZJfJpFJYz5ci8rchsT8db-cd75GtKNUZRxtC09OBdh9SbJiFnp0GTs1ErCMmlj-H6ipGFcwghyFwjyCSEpeaEXx-YsbbNhDienyc0VRpq7b5hVwIL7pmAOMLFUOLYqYTGmV59Pg0d7h-trNDZAvshyMiKI1VKOIrjr1h3i5E_Zm5l6jj4RcLXdvFlQXRVagMg7VZxwW5U_tvFR1TO638ZhZYQa6Pms%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I've said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It's run not by Washington insiders but by people like you. | That's our average donation this month, Fellow American. Since launching this campaign less than 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference. This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign. I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, | | | ---|---|--- | | This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens. As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline. I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite. We are leading this race with actual solutions. I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: The right's transphobic agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It's clear that H.R. 734 is in fact not about "defending women," it's about continuing to spread unbridled hatred towards our youth.
#
Peter,
Last month, I reached out to share an egregious effort by the far-right to further stigmatize and harm transgender students from playing on sports teams that align with their gender. And just last week, House Republicans passed the bill in attempts to further their transphobic agenda. **It's clear that H.R. 734 is in fact not about "defending women," it's about continuing to spread unbridled hatred towards our youth.**
[****](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/urge-president-bident-to-denounce-hr-734/?source=em20230425-2410&t=1&akid=2410%2E420207%2ERpVuos)
The Biden Administration has already denounced H.R. 734 and insisted that President Biden would veto the bill if it made it to his desk. **But,****Peter, we know this will not be the last attack on transgender youth from the far-right.** That's why we need to build up as much momentum and power as we can to show our opposition the true power of our movement.
There is no room for hatred or discrimination in our communities and our democracy, and now is the time to show our opposition that we have had enough. [**If you stand with us, please add your name to our petition calling on the Biden Administration to reject H.R. 734 and any other transphobic legislation like it.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/urge-president-bident-to-denounce-hr-734/?source=em20230425-2410&t=2&akid=2410%2E420207%2ERpVuos)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/urge-president-bident-to-denounce-hr-734/?source=em20230425-2410&t=3&akid=2410%2E420207%2ERpVuos)**
Peter, one in five transgender children do not have a strong level of support, and seriously consider suicide before the age of 18. And this bill is yet another attempt to exacerbate the mental health crisis of these trans kids.
**Republicans do not care about our children.** If they did, they would be reaffirming and pushing key legislation such as access to gender-affirming medical care, gun control, ensuring free lunch for students, and so much more.
When there's so much at stake for the future of our country, politicians should not be wasting their time condemning children and creating fake fires in order to grow their agenda. **Enough is enough****, Peter.**
We're standing up to these bad actors and protecting our transgender youth to ensure they can live full, happy, healthy lives the way they choose. [**Please add your name today and help us ensure that H.R. 734 will never become legislation by urging President Biden to reject this bill in it's fullness and any other legislation like it.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/urge-president-bident-to-denounce-hr-734/?source=em20230425-2410&t=4&akid=2410%2E420207%2ERpVuos)
With rage and solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230425-2410-footer&t=5&refcode2=2410_420207_RpVuos&akid=2410%2E420207%2ERpVuos)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=2410%2E420207%2ERpVuos)

Did you hear the news? Joe Biden is running for re-election in 2024. We're counting on you to send a message loud and clear that the American people want a change in leadership. Every dollar donated will help us grow our grassroots momentum and get our message out to voters across the country.

| [**HELP REPUBLICANS WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE IN 2024**](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=2930be8063514eb58ee258773f7bde28&_e=tCbvKs2RIf4KJlWxp9nH2ndNOH5HibMFMOP50dcdJPkMrKYZleqTGUlxt4hJUv2bB3JgFGgIuTenI5HcL2oue8kiuNzWiQ54wGNQ1iYeVKCHUeG577H37aV_V4wkOcxTepkhwD6Fdf7lHJtQ6AY0AthxBbJSn_jPZDZIPXlC86zJRF9dRwWxFZHKQ9MVE4ANU1WqBCt6RNq80oPjfUf8BD-0-lwvfNMBoxXEVEDX57-SKCS6BJVDZAPXIgoKhyn7b81SJyuOGfJVp37Mp2t8VnHK6fRxEqi1C66vwXzUG0CFgeV3OiYZiq9ddMwffnMmXVDinPloHaD1OW0_g-DxGNzskk4Y2dCel3EuNeX4u-TNpV7MswB_QeNa2dmja4BM3e0JqOlyRrZmDiw21GQPf_-HYX83Q0Tfs1DlQ0XRDQXXUarqPyRlvEJEGAfH9TtumkCrz8MygnXAQwuSF4iiLiCmvEDDpwP38wf9Xe4YQM2zpOX7P8UvkO7yxI0cIwrCdX8kPqXmm4DiZuOKG_yAog%3D%3D)
---

Your support is crucial to our success. Every donation, no matter how big or small, will make it loud and clear: Enough is enough. The Biden administration has put America on the wrong track with soaring inflation, open borders, and rising crime. We need Republican leadership in the White House to get America back on track.

**[_So please, make a donation today and help us win back the White House in 2024. Together, we can make a difference and bring the change that America needs._](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=2930be8063514eb58ee258773f7bde28&_e=tCbvKs2RIf4KJlWxp9nH2ndNOH5HibMFMOP50dcdJPkMrKYZleqTGUlxt4hJUv2bB3JgFGgIuTenI5HcL2oue8kiuNzWiQ54wGNQ1iYeVKCHUeG577H37aV_V4wkOcxTepkhwD6Fdf7lHJtQ6AY0AthxBbJSn_jPZDZIPXlC86zJRF9dRwWxFZHKQ9MVE4ANU1WqBCt6RNq80oPjfUf8BD-0-lwvfNMBoxXEVEDX57-SKCS6BJVDZAPXIgoKhyn7b81SJyuOGfJVp37Mp2t8VnHK6fRxEqi1C66vwXzUG0CFgeV3OiYZiq9ddMwffnMmXVDinPloHaD1OW0_g-DxGNzskk4Y2dCel3EuNeX4u-TNpV7MswB_QeNa2dmja4BMC6DmlzmbOH38jKyMKUtE_-hkKGejlM3m918KmIsulHEdNSgvahoWs9_jbPhdwc3_b1o29bj_fOyxJQDWXytDEa10V9x0p_kS5_4Zyte0WWP1AiwwKCh4n0Z_OM_-YL749h2n3qlkMhhkvam8MHJZiw%3D%3D)

Team Grassley

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: A new approach to criminal justice reform - come listen!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8133008?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
Over the last decade, the national conversation surrounding crime and criminal justice has been dominated by left-wing activists who push a dangerously false narrative. That narrative needs to be challenged.

The harshest and loudest oppositions of incarceration, policing and prosecution are typically shallow and go against data, which actually shows it is often poor, vulnerable people who pay the price for the elite's anti-police position.

**Rafael Mangual wants to offer a more balanced understanding of the American criminal justice system. **
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=6082b8d39d&e=5703353baa)
---
**_Click on the image above to reserve a ticket!_**
| Mangual will be in town next Thursday, May 4, to give his perspective on criminal justice reform and discuss his best-selling book, "Criminal (In)Justice."

He will be joined at the event by State Auditor Shad White. **Tickets are available[here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=fdc9a98e56&e=5703353baa). **

Hope to see you there!
---
|
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=88dcff8abe&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---

Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

name: =?utf-8?Q?Todd=20Watson?=
subject: 🚨DATE CORRECTION! [URGENT]: Pro-Life Call to Action 🚨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Call or email your Senator before Thursday, April 27th | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/08664ba8a1f6/n41kepo7ku-476174?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=d25cc4a7f3&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
| Speaker Arch announced that a second round of debate on **The Nebraska Heartbeat Act** will occur this **Thursday, April 27th.**

This bill, [LB 626](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=00ee589d23&e=25844e23a8), is likely to face another filibuster during the second round of debate, and **33 votes** are needed to advance a bill forward.

**_Every single vote counts_.**

Exactly 33 State Senators voted to advance [LB 626](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=ae2fd944cb&e=25844e23a8) after the first round of debate. You can see how your Senator voted the first time around [here](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=4eb5e3b343&e=25844e23a8). It's vital that every Senator maintains their support of this bill until it can be signed by Governor Pillen.

We encourage you to share your own personal ‘heartbeat story’ with your Senator, while encouraging and thanking them for the crucial support needed for this bill to move forward.
---
| [FIND YOUR SENATOR HERE »](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=91d491a86b&e=25844e23a8 "FIND YOUR SENATOR HERE »")
---
| We would also be grateful if you would please lift up this legislation and our efforts in personal prayer. **_Thank you for standing up for LIFE with us_!**

Our state is closer than ever to a reality where mothers and babies are protected from abortion, and it won’t happen without you.

The Nebraska Republican Party will always persevere in taking a stand for the innocent lives of our unborn.
---
| Sincerely, Todd Watson
Political Director
Nebraska Republican Party

clean_body: Call or email your Senator before Thursday, April 27th | | | | | | | Peter, | Speaker Arch announced that a second round of debate on The Nebraska Heartbeat Act will occur this Thursday, April 27th. This bill, , is likely to face another filibuster during the second round of debate, and 33 votes are needed to advance a bill forward. Every single vote counts. Exactly 33 State Senators voted to advance after the first round of debate. You can see how your Senator voted the first time around . It's vital that every Senator maintains their support of this bill until it can be signed by Governor Pillen. We encourage you to share your own personal ‘heartbeat story’ with your Senator, while encouraging and thanking them for the crucial support needed for this bill to move forward. | "FIND YOUR SENATOR HERE »" | We would also be grateful if you would please lift up this legislation and our efforts in personal prayer. Thank you for standing up for LIFE with us! Our state is closer than ever to a reality where mothers and babies are protected from abortion, and it won’t happen without you. The Nebraska Republican Party will always persevere in taking a stand for the innocent lives of our unborn. | Sincerely, Todd Watson Political Director Nebraska Republican Party | | "DONATE TODAY »" | | | | | | | | | | | | "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY" | | Copyright © 2023 Nebraska Republican Party, All rights reserved.

body:
Our fight for the White House and Congress starts now. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62294904/402995051/-246429796?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTcwZDdjOS04ZWUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ntwTySjkGyMVegd1u8O_maTrM-z2RV9iwLfqMVfJESg=)
Friend, **Joe Biden just announced he will seek reelection in 2024, and we must act now to ensure that he succeeds in his second-term bid.[Will you help me elect Democrats up and down the ballot in 2024 by rushing a contribution today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62294906/402995055/-1813554275?refcode=E21307-20230425-BidenAnnouncement-SL-Biden-RegTemplate-CampaignNews-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTcwZDdjOS04ZWUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ntwTySjkGyMVegd1u8O_maTrM-z2RV9iwLfqMVfJESg=)** | [I'M WITH JOE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62294909/402995057/-1813554275?refcode=E21307-20230425-BidenAnnouncement-SB-Biden-RegTemplate-CampaignNews-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTcwZDdjOS04ZWUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ntwTySjkGyMVegd1u8O_maTrM-z2RV9iwLfqMVfJESg=)

I feared after the 2020 election that it would be impossible for Biden to govern with the thinnest of majorities in the House and Senate. Instead, Biden has been on a legislative tear, tackling Democratic priorities that had been unachieved for decades.
He has already accomplished so much during his first term in office, from passing historic infrastructure legislation to making progress on climate change and healthcare reform. _I am confident that with his continued leadership, we can build a stronger, more equitable, and more just country for all._
_But we’ve still got work to do._ MAGA extremists are working overtime to roll back our rights and strip the freedoms that make this country great. **That’s why today marks the start of our fight to defend the White House and take back the House majority so we can defend our democracy.**
Between now and November 2024, we need to stay committed to reelecting President Biden and flipping districts from red to blue across the country. **I’m ready to get to work, are you?[Donate today and join me in supporting Democrats up and down the ticket in 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62294912/402995061/-1813554275?refcode=E21307-20230425-BidenAnnouncement-SL-Biden-RegTemplate-CampaignNews-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTcwZDdjOS04ZWUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ntwTySjkGyMVegd1u8O_maTrM-z2RV9iwLfqMVfJESg=)**

clean_body: Our fight for the White House and Congress starts now. | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. = Friend, Joe Biden just announced he will seek reelection in 2024, and we must act now to ensure that he succeeds in his second-term bid.= | = I feared after the 2020 election that it would be impossible for Biden to govern with the thinnest of majorities in the House and Senate. Instead, Biden has been on a legislative tear, tackling Democratic priorities that had been unachieved for decades. He has already accomplished so much during his first term in office, from passing historic infrastructure legislation to making progress on climate change and healthcare reform. I am confident that with his continued leadership, we can build a stronger, more equitable, and more just country for all. But we’ve still got work to do. MAGA extremists are working overtime to roll back our rights and strip the freedoms that make this country great. That’s why today marks the start of our fight to defend the White House and take back the House majority so we can defend our democracy. Between now and November 2024, we need to stay committed to reelecting President Biden and flipping districts from red to blue across the country. subject: Less than 2 WEEKS!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Hurry and register for the Republican Action Conferenece on May 5th and 6th in Kennewick!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

Rural progressives could transform the US.

Team, here at Movement Labs, we’re pioneering the way to a nation that works for everyone.
Through exhaustive research and experimentation, we have found the path to building back long-term Democratic support in rural areas and winning a progressive future.
Our rural county organizing program increased Democratic success in the rural counties we had the resources to invest in by three points in 2022 – **enough to flip battleground states across the country.**
Now, we’re in the process of scaling up our program to do just that by investing in rural progressives throughout six key states: Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, Nevada, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin.
**[As of today, we’ve raised one-third of the $1.5 million we need to do it, and every dollar we’ve been given by thousands of grassroots donors across the nation has helped us get there. body:
The ILGOP is now BEGGING their party to vote by mail.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/BMcWCgYM9Hr-MgcKEkr7i6SXrow6h697BHDb34QbzOI=/0jy81THwRiZN3IVMJNH9l8MgH_DjTnwvwVc1t5IT4Ag=?refcode=EM_FR_230425GOPVBM_TEAM_90DO_7_G_B_Logo)
Fellow Democrats, this is simply incredible:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/BMcWCgYM9Hr-MgcKEkr7i6SXrow6h697BHDb34QbzOI=/0jy81THwRiZN3IVMJNH9l8MgH_DjTnwvwVc1t5IT4Ag=?refcode=EM_FR_230425GOPVBM_TEAM_90DO_7_G_B_G1)
The GOP spent years telling their voters ridiculous lies about mail-in voting, convincing their followers it's rife with fraud and not to trust it, and pushing the Big Lie. **They even sued to have it restricted here in Illinois, wasting taxpayer money in the process.**

Now, the Illinois GOP have changed their tune - deciding those lies don't suit them anymore. They convinced their own voters not to use a safe, secure, and convenient voting method, so they're telling new lies to convince them it's actually an anti-fraud opportunity.

**_Ridiculous._**

Illinois Democrats and Democrats across the country have consistently worked for decades to expand voter access and fought to protect your voting rights. Expanding access to voting leads to more voter participation. Now, in 2023, the Illinois GOP is getting on board with voting by mail because they saw how effective our County Parties have been at increasing turnout with vote-by-mail.

In 2022 alone, we invested over $100k in a targeted vote-by-mail program achieving a 75% Democratic turnout rate. We're looking to do the same in 2024, and we need your help.

**[Will you pitch in $10 or more right now to help us continue this success and fight back against these hypocrites who worked to take away voting access and rights?](https://act.myngp.com/el/BMcWCgYM9Hr-MgcKEkr7i6SXrow6h697BHDb34QbzOI=/0jy81THwRiZN3IVMJNH9l8MgH_DjTnwvwVc1t5IT4Ag=?refcode=EM_FR_230425GOPVBM_TEAM_90DO_7_G_B_L1&amount=10)**
