name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: The bread and butter of my work
body:
In Congress this past month, I met with colleagues to work toward progress on paid family leave, reliable internet for all, and more.
| | |
---
Derek, in Congress this past month, I met with colleagues to work toward progress on paid family leave, reliable internet for all, and improvements in STEM education.

This is the bread and butter of my work, Derek – the reason I’m in this to begin with. My work is dedicated to you and your family, and I’m committed to building a better future for communities across PA-06 and the United States.
But the life of a representative is a precarious one. Every two years, we get put to the test at the ballot box, and my job is no different. With threats from the far right, we managed to sustain this fight in 2022, and now, as a critical member of this grassroots movement, I’m asking you if you’ll join me again.
**[_My team set a deadline of recruiting 100 Founding Members by midnight, Derek. Can I count on you to stand in this fight with me and become a Founding Member of my campaign for 2024? My ability to follow through on so many plans depends on how long I am in this office that I am honored to hold._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62296130/402999652/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk808-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWNkM2FmYy05MmUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EcxoNOJHnbbj4y_KfonBjlrRS5SejE6o_GyEdwd0ujk=)**

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: James Carville (via DLCC.org)
subject: Never too early…
body:
The fact is: If state Democrats don’t come out on top, we might as well give the GOP a blank check to push their extreme anti-abortion and anti-LGBTQ+ agenda. | | |
---
| | One of my biggest takeaways from my time in politics is that **it’s _never_ too early to start preparing for the next election. ** That’s especially true for state-level special elections, which are historically underfunded and overlooked even though they have the same implications as races that happen on Election Day in November. In fact, there’s already been 22 special elections in state legislatures this year (can you believe that?!) **and I’m proud to say that the DLCC has won 14 of those races. We need to keep it up.** [With only five days until the DLCC’s end-of-month deadline, state Democrats need a boost. clean_body: The fact is: If state Democrats don’t come out on top, we might as well give the GOP a blank check to push their extreme anti-abortion and anti-LGBTQ+ agenda. | | | | | One of my biggest takeaways from my time in politics is that it’s never too early to start preparing for the next election. That’s especially true for state-level special elections, which are historically underfunded and overlooked even though they have the same implications as races that happen on Election Day in November. In fact, there’s already been 22 special elections in state legislatures this year (can you believe that?!) and I’m proud to say that the DLCC has won 14 of those races. We need to keep it up. With so much at stake, here’s what you need to know: → The DLCC is the ONLY party committee fully dedicated to electing state Democrats – and state legislators impact your day-to-day life more than federal candidates do. → State Democrats have been outraised by Republicans quarter after quarter, jeopardizing the DLCC’s chances of expanding Democratic power. → State Democrats are the LAST line of defense against GOP extremism in the states – they decide the fate of abortion rights, voting rights, and so much more. The fact is: If state Democrats don’t come out on top, we might as well give the GOP a blank check to push their extreme anti-abortion and anti-LGBTQ+ agenda. This team has to fight back with everything we’ve got, and I’m no stranger to tough fights. body:
Right now, extremist Republicans are working every day to ban abortion, throw away voting rights, and destroy our democracy. | | |

| | State legislatures are where policies that most affect your day-to-day life are signed into law. And right now, extremist Republicans are working every day to ban abortion, throw away voting rights, and destroy our democracy. **It’s absolutely disastrous. With Donald Trump and other extreme Republicans building up their 2024 campaigns, MAGA Republicans in state legislatures will do everything they can to help him cheat and lie his way to victory.** [We can’t let GOP extremism win and have far-right legislators wreak havoc on our fundamental rights. name: PRISON for Trump?! | Left Action
subject: Sign: Tell the Georgia DA you fully support charging Trump for trying to steal the election
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Add your name: Tell the Georgia DA you support her charging Trump to the fullest extent >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0674b7a0-beb6-457a-9d74-f911f8beeb9f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tec556e3b-c97f-4cee-a9b3-7c1ee0b56bb4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis, the prosecutor leading the investigation of Trump in Georgia, said she will announce this summer whether Trump and his cronies will be charged with crimes relating to their efforts to overturn the 2020 election. And she specifically cautioned law enforcement authorities to be on alert for unrest when it happens – a sign she is ready to charge Trump himself. [We need to show her she has support for doing this. Add your name now, and join us in telling her that. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb06df4b1-469f-43d6-bf79-7b7e787acdf9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) It was in Georgia where officials received multiple calls from Trump, including the infamous one where he pressured them to "find" enough votes to overturn the results. A call was also received from Lindsey Graham, suggesting that ballots could be thrown out in Democratic areas. Trump, Lindsey Graham, Rudy Giuliani, and others involved in this scheme to steal the election deserve to have the book thrown at them, and Georgia officials have every right to do it. [We want to let DA Willis know that we have her back, and that we fully support charging Trump and his allies for their crimes. Add your name now >> ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T87c05c5c-dc9e-4007-a2a2-a7c113261ef8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---

| Peter,

President Biden’s shameful, blatantly false remarks could not be further from the truth.

The Republican Party consists of men and women who have faithfully served their country at home and overseas. To say that Republicans want to cut VA health care is a disgusting twist of the truth.
---
| [Help Jen hold Biden accountable for his lies! >>>](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=c7fdb8b68f&e=4955722b3e "Help Jen hold Biden accountable for his lies! >>>")

| As a member of the armed services, **I stand with every serviceman and woman across this country.** They dedicated their lives to our country, and we will ensure they have every benefit possible.

In an effort to gain political points, Joe Biden continues to lie about the members of the Republican Party. His actions only serve to divide the people more and more. As Americans, we have so much more to unite on. We should all agree that our veterans shouldn’t be used as political pawns.

[_**Can you stand with me today and help me hold Biden accountable?**_](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=2340994ed8&e=4955722b3e)

We know that at least [eight Biden family members](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=076902472a7440e68049f9cc35b90774&_e=t9C__33WQXz4S3aW2FJe6JVbPaRGb4BlTzsbAs-0Y5PLt98_rY2wyBarBihM0NyyLC8CNlWAP1Rd7XECxY0j2IYGx_bBuGem2iDLRhzQIq0ousoeBbOTO31CMRihSYJWkhce29wpcTcVZzepYQcOvX1LOva8PBrK-fduuUKuv62_2Y5xo9LAKzjk0uiOd1vlPS5lYGBBtaBgbPdKZuHNNG9d0jHwRJQqbFLJTphFZlAmAb_d0ODmF0KDEkcKer6fgB-nn5oKPVkyQUPuNPRlkcjIO0YjQloAVVQSQKdWS5k%3D) have profited from business dealings overseas. What’s more, there are dozens of others entangled in this web of lies to protect President Biden. **You and I know better. This corruption goes straight to the top. ** Perhaps unsurprisingly, an [IRS whistleblower](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=076902472a7440e68049f9cc35b90774&_e=t9C__33WQXz4S3aW2FJe6BZqWZtslP1LplVIvpiI5te70yfXjWCLlyniPEiXIuBlqF0I346SulPQYLBrMHHz2WuRuQqQdb-OMVszwXSiRbbeegBVyKgqK_8pNmkOcF5pimCUOoVp0xPZjEpTqaLhvlnSh5A4vmKqi2MQ9Rs0wrYHGuul-D593uRt2VQcimqLK3uEF42WL0Te2TMqt2hij8cEi42GDh7OqH9z98nF5BiN9p5fBvfO9CymX_6F8dwsPNi52XCwNgSTpg0G8DVV70afvV_KKznDQnl0qwjtjYeqaTaue7BC0j-zTvjolVZSPDPwbpZsID0E8DUXicEWaw%3D%3D) claims the Biden administration has mishandled the federal investigation into Hunter Biden. According to the agent, there are clear conflicts of interest and preferential treatment. _Color me shocked._ But what happens if all this drama does reach President Biden? I can only imagine what his defense will be. If this goes down the way it seems it will, there should be a day of reckoning. **I genuinely want to hear your thoughts, friend.**
---
**Do you think President Biden should be impeached if he’s found guilty of meddling in this corruption?**
---
| | [**YES!**](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=076902472a7440e68049f9cc35b90774&_e=t9C__33WQXz4S3aW2FJe6J6uuAp-tlMCarQkF6yo3sUUpwFbbZ5gG4KDFy6P2oQXPSUi2O-Uq2VeJ0Jt4AXFVPkSyzAMJ1lsbyqQQsESMT4gQZ4QqdvTrVz4S5bI4RUdjRcJx6Z9l00lyPYKvmVhWykfYCcemuhtyEhRoZCSZA61dKQmhSIlsuZaMVvKSmipsFr8Du_OqBI-_7P5EfgKgPYNyNRqsqlNC9F7AOHKdaPZDZwCIIjxMehVMBYWBei6V70MPdPnLQTtsSa3_VVkleIBHfU9-tqgy0upRrp58PalDcslz5Wok5t7ZmkI_sQWdhsZadNXYt1oW_Ouo16IgD-r55MpN7gD-Vl1U2LGtFu5WEmTft5weUqDKqPmxZvlENt7qR3k7UwdTR3a8GKEHfgHkLK_Dk4dOVsePj48ZgYJOFfrxNkdMnZaYxvhEV8mLicrn6g8gLfdD6sQ8bSOpzJ23mBDkacgQSd42YX7ZO8%3D)
---
[**NO!**](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=076902472a7440e68049f9cc35b90774&_e=t9C__33WQXz4S3aW2FJe6J6uuAp-tlMCarQkF6yo3sUUpwFbbZ5gG4KDFy6P2oQXPSUi2O-Uq2VeJ0Jt4AXFVPkSyzAMJ1lsbyqQQsESMT4gQZ4QqdvTrVz4S5bI4RUdjRcJx6Z9l00lyPYKvmVhWykfYCcemuhtyEhRoZCSZA61dKQmhSIlsuZaMVvKSmipsFr8Du_OqBI-_7P5EfgKgPYNyNRqsqlNC9F7AOHKdaPZDZwCIIjxMehVMBYWBei6V70MPdPnLQTtsSa3_VVkleIBHfU9-tqgy0upRrp58PalDcslz5Wok5t7ZmkI_sQW400SYVIbuIhTpf0Qr-e3vsKdIRnQdeIggvtLaiNjvzgDR6jLqNcZNh0WdCuHF4vdyewFZlNmCCQwRXevJr6ZRmH3xmPjzXm_7fzXbYvNOq2cqAGWUl_QyfHIlct4sGUzEagckDhPVWxyutwwdAeXBhvn87C488UXItobDD1p2_k%3D)
---
We must get to the bottom of this and ensure our country isn’t compromised by any more shady Biden business deals. If a good old Tennessee boy like me can see the issues in plain sight, surely our [Justice Department](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=076902472a7440e68049f9cc35b90774&_e=t9C__33WQXz4S3aW2FJe6DEtdT4WkOBHYQSWMsWNNj9JwJ9tEN86nENZuab9Rb7JmhnaPsYpA45beovCkF4r8-D6D2FaxBD2VJIHNc_MCcoXU0eT7PIKVMYplklUBjGXSgxA5rDz2MgwmnEdNl35ERN4ymmaTcd87eyTQb7XsxPB8U4lgra0WrJ4LQtlVhXLBiZHvpPFFi9Gtu6ryVtHdvH09VByzKXe-fpNuPCI8yScBVPlpErurrQ5dMlGBXDMNdOE775kS-rFFC5VNuWZMA%3D%3D) can.
---
Thank you for sharing your thoughts,

Tim Burchett **[P.S. It’s the end of the month, and we would love a strong finish for April’s fundraising. name: NDRC Battleground Update
subject: Is this the end of the GOP’s “iron grip” in Wisconsin?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
it wouldn’t have been possible without supporters like you
|
---

Since 2011, map manipulation and voter suppression have given Wisconsin Republicans an “iron grip” on power in state government. Republicans have been all but guaranteed a comfortable majority in the state legislature – even when statewide Democratic candidates win more votes.

**But those days could soon be coming to an end, team.** | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62297208/403003586/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230425_FR_4L_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3YWVhODEzLTk1ZTMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1jpxUo5fp4xEk2yqABdqcI3ZSqR6TCNhIraUjyePL3E=)
---
**In a state where elections are often decided by less than a percentage point, voters elected a fair-minded justice to the state supreme court by a _double-digit margin_.** This resounding victory could have huge implications for redistricting, voting rights, abortion access, the 2024 election, and more.
**Grassroots supporters like you helped make this victory possible, team. So as long as the GOP’s plan for maintaining power depends on restricting access to the ballot box and undermining our democratic process, they SHOULD be worried – _because we’re just getting started._

[_The NDRC is continuing our efforts to mobilize communities, fight for fair maps, protect voting rights, and so much more all across the country. name: Indiana Dems
subject: The latest attack on the right to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, The Indiana GOP has unleashed yet another serious attack on the right to vote in our state. Their latest election bill – HB 1334 – which is on the governor’s desk right now – will make it harder for disabled, elderly, and overseas Hoosiers to vote. We urge Governor Holcomb to veto this legislation. This legislation would require elderly Hoosiers and military members to jump through extra hoops to cast a ballot. It seems that they are worried about people in nursing homes or those serving our country overseas committing voter fraud. Extremist politicians like Secretary of State Diego Morales, are in search of a problem and yet another conspiracy tainted culture war as Indiana’s elections have proven to be secure and reliable year in and year out. What we do have is a voter turnout problem that is only getting worse. [**Chip in now to help us add more resources to our voter protection efforts and make sure that we can help vulnerable Hoosiers as they cast their ballots this year and beyond.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62297381/403004445/1643342139?refcode=230425-Voting&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTUyNGMzNi05NmUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ifuOhdFmAGqBpLa5cQz65ah8uXkTs14B5SiZQv3gmF4=) This undemocratic bill requires Hoosiers to provide a photocopy of their voter ID, or the unique voter identification number found on their registration to submit their absentee application. Voters will have to go through additional steps just to retrieve this number by contacting their county clerk. Moreover, this will clog up the work of hundreds of Hoosiers who work with clerks, registration offices, or conduct fair elections. This bill will negatively impact those who live in nursing homes and retirement communities who need assistance casting a ballot, with many using traveling board applications to vote. It is unreasonable to expect those populations to have access to a photocopy machine. This legislation only places even more restrictions on the most vulnerable Hoosiers. Republicans should join Democrats focused on solving Indiana’s voter turnout problem by expanding mail-in voting, adding same-day registration and keeping polling places open past 6:00 p.m. More Hoosiers voting — not less — would give us a more representative government at every level and improve the health of our weakening Hoosier democracy. [**If you can pitch in to help us boost our voter education and protection efforts this year, we would really appreciate it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62297382/403004446/1643342139?refcode=230425-Voting&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTUyNGMzNi05NmUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ifuOhdFmAGqBpLa5cQz65ah8uXkTs14B5SiZQv3gmF4=) Thank you, Indiana Democratic Party | | | [Chip in! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62297383/403004447/405560545?refcode=230425-Voting&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTUyNGMzNi05NmUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ifuOhdFmAGqBpLa5cQz65ah8uXkTs14B5SiZQv3gmF4=)

Their latest election bill – HB 1334 – which is on the governor’s desk right now – will make it harder for disabled, elderly, and overseas Hoosiers to vote. We urge Governor Holcomb to veto this legislation. This legislation would require elderly Hoosiers and military members to jump through extra hoops to cast a ballot. It seems that they are worried about people in nursing homes or those serving our country overseas committing voter fraud. Extremist politicians like Secretary of State Diego Morales, are in search of a problem and yet another conspiracy tainted culture war as Indiana’s elections have proven to be secure and reliable year in and year out. What we do have is a voter turnout problem that is only getting worse. = This undemocratic bill requires Hoosiers to provide a photocopy of their voter ID, or the unique voter identification number found on their registration to submit their absentee application. Voters will have to go through additional steps just to retrieve this number by contacting their county clerk. Moreover, this will clog up the work of hundreds of Hoosiers who work with clerks, registration offices, or conduct fair elections. This bill will negatively impact those who live in nursing homes and retirement communities who need assistance casting a ballot, with many using traveling board applications to vote. It is unreasonable to expect those populations to have access to a photocopy machine. This legislation only places even more restrictions on the most vulnerable Hoosiers. Republicans should join Democrats focused on solving Indiana’s voter turnout problem by expanding mail-in voting, adding same-day registration and keeping polling places open past 6:00 p.m. More Hoosiers voting — not less — would give us a more representative government at every level and improve the health of our weakening Hoosier democracy. = Thank you, Indiana Democratic Party | | | = | = [content goes here] Indiana Democratic Party 115 W Washington INDLPS, IN 46202 United States Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

And now, we’ve got his.
#
Derek —
By now, you’ve probably seen the news — President Biden is running for re-election.
We’re excited. Here’s why:
Joe knows the sacrifices that Military families make better than most. He knows what it’s like to send a son to war, and he understands the sacred commitment this country has to its Veterans.
From the _PACT Act_ , to making Army Vet Senator Tammy Duckworth a co-chair of his campaign, to holding the line while the House GOP pushes billions of dollars in cuts to the VA — Joe gets it. He’s got our back.
And now, we’ve got his.
We spent BIG in critical states in 2020. We helped push a critical mass of persuadable voters to Biden that cycle. In 2024, we’ll use messengers and messages other organizations can’t. We’re going to talk to millions of voters in the swing states that Biden needs to win.
But we can’t without you. So we’re asking:
**[Help VoteVets do it again in 2024. $3 will help us hold the White House, expand control in the Senate, and take back the House. name: Patrick Murphy
subject: A Good Story for America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/EhTViaue7lfto-0b1fUzDwQF68b3Xp1VAR7mGwmkFbM=/jSBRETERAYfjPerTXX2x1lr5tyapjWTOmeFo-NmQEBk=)

Friend,

Today President Biden announced his reelection on the 4 year anniversary of his Soul of the Nation announcement. Whether you like him or not, he's lowered the political temperature and the US President no longer governs via Tweet.

When you look at the numbers - job growth up 9% (12 million new jobs), GDP up 5.7% and the stock market up 8% - they tell a good story. Even inflation, which has been stubborn, is down from 9% to 4%. We should be most proud, though, of his bipartisan wins - Bipartisan Infrastructure Act (20k projects started), uniting the world against the illegal Russian Invasion of the Ukraine, & the Chips and Science Act that's invested $50 billion in American Manufacturing.

But as you know, our work is not done. Please share this link today: [https://www.foxnews.com/video/6326203940112](https://act.myngp.com/el/EhTViaue7lfto-0b1fUzDwQF68b3Xp1VAR7mGwmkFbM=/jaERoG-zQWhjP7jpMWYMlIfJ3U4Dd0Wihsu8I6nMJU4=), and join us on June 16th at the Washington Nationals game at the link below as Taking the Hill continues our work in getting more Veterans elected to the US Congress to keep our country moving on the right track.

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttharmyday](https://act.myngp.com/el/EhTViaue7lfto-0b1fUzDwQF68b3Xp1VAR7mGwmkFbM=/3bMlQqouQMTEhkcaHQCFR23DVOx8Niz2VQBkn9i6ZdM=)

Yours in the fight,
Hon. Patrick J. Murphy
Former Congressman
32nd Undersecretary of the Army
Taking the Hill PAC

Whether you like him or not, he's lowered the political temperature and the US President no longer governs via Tweet. When you look at the numbers - job growth up 9% (12 million new jobs), GDP up 5.7% and the stock market up 8% - they tell a good story. Even inflation, which has been stubborn, is down from 9% to 4%. We should be most proud, though, of his bipartisan wins - Bipartisan Infrastructure Act (20k projects started), uniting the world against the illegal Russian Invasion of the Ukraine, & the Chips and Science Act that's invested $50 billion in American Manufacturing. But as you know, our work is not done. Please share this link today: =, and join us on June 16th at the Washington Nationals game at the link below as Taking the Hill continues our work in getting more Veterans elected to the US Congress to keep our country moving on the right track. = Yours in the fight, Hon. Patrick J. Murphy Former Congressman 32nd Undersecretary of the Army Taking the Hill PAC Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC Taking The Hill PAC PO Box 2134 Bristol PA 19007 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: Kamala Harris
subject: It's time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Joe Biden and I are officially running for reelection in 2024.
| | | **It’s time. Joe Biden and I are officially running for reelection in 2024.**

I’m so excited to get back on the campaign trail to make our case to the American people, and I know that President Biden is too. Over the past two years we have accomplished so much together alongside Democratic leaders in the Senate. As we kick this campaign into high gear, we need your support to secure Senate seats and keep the White House.

As vice president, I have the privilege and honor to travel across our nation to meet Americans from all walks of life working to make a difference.

No matter where I am, I meet so many folks who are optimistic about what is possible when we work together. People who agree that we have so much more in common than what separates us.

As Americans, we believe in freedom, liberty and justice. And we believe that our democracy is only as strong as our willingness to fight for it.

**It’s going to take all of us to build on the progress we’ve made and keep moving our country forward. So, I have to ask:**

[**Will you stand with Joe, me, and Senate Democrats by splitting a $5 donation between the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee and our reelection campaign today?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/13154?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230425-KamalaHarris-SignedReelectionLaunch-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230425-KamalaHarris-SignedReelectionLaunch-Pros-sl1&akid=10582%2E9716520%2Eusmjcc)

Thank you for all that you do for our country.

-Kamala

Peter, A couple of months ago, I visited President Biden at the White House with a message: I will help deliver Democratic victories across the North Carolina ballot in 2024 — including for the presidential election. In 2020, Donald Trump won North Carolina by _just 1.3 points._ It was his smallest margin of victory anywhere. **In 2024, we will flip it blue.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62298203/403006959/676408098?amount=20.24&refcode=ea.6eae4dac-98e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.6eae4dac-98e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWFlNGRhYy05OGUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B1DGmiVL1enXTbcMLPPuVDCpM3PRzGRaaNO_T4W3uNY=) Peter, our state is truly purple. We currently have the same number of Democratic and Republican representatives to the U.S. House, and I won my races for governor in the same years Trump carried the state. name: Troy E. Nehls (iPhone)
subject: Joe’s running… does he know?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
time to fight!
| | | I’m in between border hearing meetings, and I just saw Joe Biden announced he’s running for President. Good to hear he’s at least aware he’s supposed to be working to make life better for Americans, but I guess he missed that memo. Personally, I couldn’t be happier that he’s running ... now the American people will have the distinct privilege of showing this socialist Democrat the door. Biden doesn’t have a basement to hide in this time! Send your support so we can hand him his socialist pink slip together today: [https://secure.winred.com/troynehls/e_bidenrunning](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/b1068314532cea8d/d3dcb5f8283ce4eac3d6b838967d376c/35193)
Troy E. NehlsSent from my iPhone

|
---

Voters sent a resounding message during the 2022 midterm elections -- they do NOT want election deniers in office. But as our movement prevents more and more gerrymandered maps, manipulating elections might be extreme Republicans’ only path to power.
**That's why the _Moore v. Harper_ case so important in our fight for fair maps and democracy.**
The Supreme Court heard arguments on this case last December. Now, we wait to hear the courts’ opinion on the case, which could come at anytime in the next few weeks and months...
[**Will you add your name to our petition if you think SCOTUS should side with voters and uphold the fair map?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62308435/403045012/-1462679232?refcode=20230424_AOTL_F_SCOTUS3_RedLite&source=20230424_AOTL_F_SCOTUS3_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3MTAwN2U0LWJjZTMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Rwi9tJHVvB_pimyNL151Ze4Fa8lGF4yATtHpwgzC92Q=&emci=09ff8999-ade3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c71007e4-bce3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8431045)
[SIGN ON](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62308436/403045013/-1462679232?refcode=20230424_AOTL_F_SCOTUS3_RedLite&source=20230424_AOTL_F_SCOTUS3_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3MTAwN2U0LWJjZTMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Rwi9tJHVvB_pimyNL151Ze4Fa8lGF4yATtHpwgzC92Q=&emci=09ff8999-ade3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c71007e4-bce3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8431045)
---
So here’s the situation -- Republicans in North Carolina have a long history of manipulating maps. But voters keep prevailing in overturning those maps in court.
Since they can’t get their gerrymandered maps approved by the state courts, North Carolina Republicans are resorting to a fringe theory that would take checks and balances out of the equation.
**That’s a huge red flag.**
North Carolina Republicans brought this case to the nation’s highest court because the state supreme court held them accountable for violating the law and stopped them from enacting a gerrymandered map. **The Supreme Court should see this for what it is -- an attempt to manipulate the system at the expense of voters.**
We'll keep you posted as things unfold.
\-- All On The Line

**_All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering._**

By now you've probably heard that Democrats are defending 23 Senate seats up for election this cycle compared to Republicans' 11. And let's be clear — **maintaining our single-seat majority this cycle isn't enough.**

Anti-choice House Republicans are continuing their work to ban abortion nationwide, and if they control both chambers, we know it will be full-steam ahead on obliterating our rights. Our 51-49 Democratic Senate majority is razor-thin, so we're laser-focused on not only protecting our numbers but _expanding_ them in order to stop this dangerous GOP agenda in its tracks.

Fortunately, we're already backing fierce pro-choice candidates up for reelection, like Sens. **Mazie Hirono (HI)** , **Tammy Baldwin (WI)** , and **Jacky Rosen (NV)**. And in Michigan, we couldn't be prouder to endorse Rep. **Elissa Slotkin** , who is running to defend a competitive open seat.

This is how we're laying the critical groundwork for the road ahead, Peter, and Democratic pro-choice women like these will need every ounce of support we can give to pave the way forward. ****So please, donate now to support women like Mazie, Tammy, Jacky, & Elissa in defending key Senate seats in our fight to protect and expand our Senate majority in 2024:**

name: LucasKunce.com
subject: REPORT: Senator Josh Hawley's Connections to the Abortion Pill Case
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
An explosive new report details Hawley’s direct ties to the Texas judge who ruled to ban abortion medication nationwide earlier this month
#
Peter — an explosive new report details Josh Hawley’s direct ties to Texas Judge Matthew Kacsmaryk, who decided a case this month on behalf of Hawley’s wife to ban the most commonly used abortion pill nationwide.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31681?refcode=em20230425-3043&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3043%2E614464%2ERPsur9)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31681?refcode=em20230425-3043&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3043%2E614464%2ERPsur9)**
After Matthew Kacsmaryk’s 2017 nomination to be a federal judge in North Texas stalled in the Senate, he made a donation to Josh Hawley — current U.S. Senator and fellow member of the Federalist Society, a group of corporate activist lawyers with funders like Chevron, Google, and the Kochs.
**That donation put Kacsmaryk on Hawley’s radar.** So in 2019, Hawley pushed his donor’s confirmation through the Senate — even despite bipartisan opposition over Kacsmaryk’s Big Brother views on contraceptives and personal freedoms.
Then, in 2022, a lawsuit was filed in the northern Texas district court to ban an abortion pill millions have used safely.
**The suit was led by Hawley’s wife — and Hawley’s donor was the judge.**
But that’s not all.
Earlier this month, Kacsmaryk ruled in favor of the suit — calling for a near-immediate ban on the abortion drug mifepristone in all 50 states.
And THEN, Hawley used his position as U.S. Senator to demand that the Supreme Court back _his donor’s ruling_ in _his wife’s lawsuit._
**These corrupt elites are obsessed with using their own power to control every aspect of our lives — our bodies, our families, our economic opportunities — and we can’t afford to let them keep getting away with it.**
**[It’s time to take back power for everyday people and fundamentally change who calls the shots in this country. So if you’re ready to end these attacks on abortion access, please rush a donation of absolutely any amount toward our grassroots campaign to defeat Josh Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31681?refcode=em20230425-3043&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3043%2E614464%2ERPsur9)**

clean_body: An explosive new report details Hawley’s direct ties to the Texas judge who ruled to ban abortion medication nationwide earlier this month Peter — an explosive new report details Josh Hawley’s direct ties to Texas Judge Matthew Kacsmaryk, who decided a case this month on behalf of Hawley’s wife to ban the most commonly used abortion pill nationwide. After Matthew Kacsmaryk’s 2017 nomination to be a federal judge in North Texas stalled in the Senate, he made a donation to Josh Hawley — current U.S. Senator and fellow member of the Federalist Society, a group of corporate activist lawyers with funders like Chevron, Google, and the Kochs. That donation put Kacsmaryk on Hawley’s radar. So in 2019, Hawley pushed his donor’s confirmation through the Senate — even despite bipartisan opposition over Kacsmaryk’s Big Brother views on contraceptives and personal freedoms. Then, in 2022, a lawsuit was filed in the northern Texas district court to ban an abortion pill millions have used safely. The suit was led by Hawley’s wife — and Hawley’s donor was the judge. But that’s not all. Earlier this month, Kacsmaryk ruled in favor of the suit — calling for a near-immediate ban on the abortion drug mifepristone in all 50 states. And THEN, Hawley used his position as U.S. Senator to demand that the Supreme Court back his donor’s ruling in his wife’s lawsuit. These corrupt elites are obsessed with using their own power to control every aspect of our lives — our bodies, our families, our economic opportunities — and we can’t afford to let them keep getting away with it. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thanks for standing with us, Team Lucas | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: President Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
Friends —
Today, I am asking you to join me in supporting President Joe Biden's reelection campaign.
[**If that's all you need to hear, please split a $5 contribution between the Biden reelection campaign and The Long Run using this link.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-biden-split.r3wA0I&refcode=em230425-1-t2&t=1&akid=4386%2E196590%2EbIXpJl)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be evenly split between Joe Biden and the Long Run PAC:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-biden-split.6LeeZQ&amount=5&refcode=em230425-1-t2&t=2&akid=4386%2E196590%2EbIXpJl)**
---
****
| **[OTHER](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-biden-split.6LeeZQ&refcode=em230425-1-t2&t=3&akid=4386%2E196590%2EbIXpJl)**
---
****
Over the past few years, our democracy has been challenged time and time again by MAGA extremists.
They have attacked women’s freedom of choice and access to safe abortions. They have attacked our right to participate in free and fair elections. They have flooded our nation's highest court with partisan Justices who will put their own agendas above the needs of Americans. And they have even defended the violent insurrectionists who attacked Congress for upholding the 2020 election during the treasonous January 6th insurrection.
**It’s never been more clear that we need to stand together to protect our democracy. So we must come together to support and defend the Biden presidency.**
_President Biden has made protecting our democracy a priority._
He has not only been a tremendous leader but has worked to heal the soul of our nation after a difficult few years.
President Biden has delivered for us and made historic progress for our country. He signed impactful legislation into law — including historic investments in our infrastructure, climate protection, and gun safety — and has been a consistent advocate for working families across the country.
The truth is, our democracy is on the ballot in 2024, and there is too much at stake for us to sit idle now. So as he launches his reelection campaign, he must know that he has your support to finish the job.
[**Please split a $5 contribution between President Biden's reelection campaign and the Long Run today.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-biden-split.r3wA0I&refcode=em230425-1-t2&t=4&akid=4386%2E196590%2EbIXpJl)
In 2024, we have a choice to decide which direction our country will go — whether we will protect the fabric of our nation, our democracy, or whether we will let extremists take away our rights and freedoms. And the choice is clear.
So let’s gear up and stand behind President Biden.
Thank you,
Mandela
[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-biden-split.r3wA0I&refcode=em230425-1-t2&t=5&akid=4386%2E196590%2EbIXpJl)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=4386%2E196590%2EbIXpJl). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=7&akid=4386%2E196590%2EbIXpJl)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=8&refcode2=4386_196590_bIXpJl&akid=4386%2E196590%2EbIXpJl)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
Hi there — it’s Ashley here. I wanted to reach out personally today to explain why your support is so important to me. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62299710/403012601/-227468080?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230425why_ae_actives_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGQwZGQ5YS05ZGUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P359hf66ovUVhIUmPleTyHMWzXka4yTZbMEy_vtwQAU=)
---
**Hi friend — it’s Ashley here. I wanted to reach out personally today to explain why your support is so important to me.[If you’re short on time, you can support our movement by chipping in today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62299711/403012602/-227468080?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230425why_ae_actives_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGQwZGQ5YS05ZGUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P359hf66ovUVhIUmPleTyHMWzXka4yTZbMEy_vtwQAU=)** Last election, I talked to so many people in our district who were struggling to keep up with the rise of gas prices, groceries, prescription drugs, and housing costs. Growing up in a single-parent household, I know what it’s like to live hand to mouth and barely scrape by. The choices working families have to make are often impossible — whether it’s paying for groceries or medicine, car repairs or utilities, clothes or shoes. But most of our leaders in Washington have _never_ had to make those choices. Anyone impacted by substance abuse and mental health struggles can tell you: people like us aren't supposed to end up in Congress. Joining the Army was my one-way ticket out of generational poverty, and I wouldn't be here without believing in the promise of the American dream. But the American dream is out of reach for too many people, and that’s not an accident. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62299712/403012603/-227468080?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230425why_ae_actives_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGQwZGQ5YS05ZGUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P359hf66ovUVhIUmPleTyHMWzXka4yTZbMEy_vtwQAU=)
---
**I’m running for Congress to give a voice to those left behind by a government that has failed to look out for working families like mine.** And I’m tired of corrupt, out-of-touch politicians like Brian Fitzpatrick standing in the way of progress.
In less than one week, my team faces our very FIRST fundraising deadline. We are going up against a corporate-backed incumbent with a massive war chest. Unlike my opponent, I’m counting on grassroots supporters in every neighborhood across PA-01 to fuel our campaign.
**[This is a chance for us to prove just how strong of a people-powered movement we’ve built so far. I’m respectfully asking you to donate any amount ahead of our April fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62299713/403012604/-227468080?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230425why_ae_actives_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGQwZGQ5YS05ZGUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P359hf66ovUVhIUmPleTyHMWzXka4yTZbMEy_vtwQAU=)**

clean_body: Hi there — it’s Ashley here. I wanted to reach out personally today to explain why your support is so important to me. | = Hi friend — it’s Ashley here. I wanted to reach out personally today to explain why your support is so important to me.= Last election, I talked to so many people in our district who were struggling to keep up with the rise of gas prices, groceries, prescription drugs, and housing costs. Growing up in a single-parent household, I know what it’s like to live hand to mouth and barely scrape by. The choices working families have to make are often impossible — whether it’s paying for groceries or medicine, car repairs or utilities, clothes or shoes. But most of our leaders in Washington have never had to make those choices. Anyone impacted by substance abuse and mental health struggles can tell you: people like us aren't supposed to end up in Congress. Joining the Army was my one-way ticket out of generational poverty, and I wouldn't be here without believing in the promise of the American dream. But the American dream is out of reach for too many people, and that’s not an accident. | = I’m running for Congress to give a voice to those left behind by a government that has failed to look out for working families like mine. And I’m tired of corrupt, out-of-touch politicians like Brian Fitzpatrick standing in the way of progress. In less than one week, my team faces our very FIRST fundraising deadline. We are going up against a corporate-backed incumbent with a massive war chest. Unlike my opponent, I’m counting on grassroots supporters in every neighborhood across PA-01 to fuel our campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = The only way we'll finish what we started is by building a true grassroots movement from the bottom up. Let’s finish this month strong and finish the job in 2024. Thanks for having my back day in and day out. Sincerely, Ashley | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. name: Zack Stephenson
subject: House DFL just passed cannabis legislation!
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-april23?refcode=042523 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-april23?refcode=042523]
Friend,
Exciting news – the Minnesota House of Representatives just passed my bill to legalize adult-use cannabis! This bill is long overdue and one that Minnesotans across the state support. In addition to legalizing adult-use cannabis, this bill takes the important step of expunging non-violent offenses involving cannabis. House DFLers are getting things done for Minnesota, but we need to protect our House DFL majority to keep it up.
Will you make a contribution today and show your support of the work House DFLers are doing? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-april23?refcode=042523]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nathaniel=20Moran?=
subject: The April Minuteman Nominee, Protecting Constitutional Rights, and More
disclaimer_text: paid for by Nathaniel Moran for Congress
body:
This month, we are proud to honor an Army veteran who continues to give back. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nathanielmoran/minuteman-april-17029171?e=bbce4dd6ad)
---
|
---
| | |
---
|
---
|
# Welcome to the April edition of **The Moran Minuteman**.
This monthly newsletter is our way of recognizing extraordinary efforts in Texas Congressional District 1 and providing an inside look into what happens behind the scenes in the life of a Congressman.
---
|
---
|
## Over 60 rescued Christians brought to Tyler
The week before Easter brought an opportunity to participate in an effort to help rescue Christians from persecution. Members of the Mayflower Church, who had fled China to South Korea then Thailand due to religious persecution, [were being threatened with deportation back to China](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=30439b50b1&e=bbce4dd6ad). Many churches in Congressional District 1 support the Mayflower Church and brought this situation to my attention.
---
|
---
|
---
---
| [We were able to work with the State Department, foreign leaders, and others to help bring the members of the Mayflower to Texas](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=3d1b6b9994&e=bbce4dd6ad). Special recognition and thanks go to Deana Brown and Freedom Seekers International, Bob Fu and ChinaAid, Flint Baptist Church, Grace Community Church, South Spring Baptist Church, Sylvania Church of Tyler, First Baptist Church Tyler, Rose Heights Church of God, and many more for all they did on behalf of the Mayflower worshippers. **The Mayflower congregation arrived in Texas on Good Friday, one of the holiest of days for us as Christians, a fact that was not lost on those of us working to protect these persecuted Christians.** This effort - the ability to stand up for religious freedom and help save individuals from persecution - has been a high point of this job thus far.
---
|
---
|
## Congratulations to our April Minuteman - Artie Erwin
When I think of East Texans, I think of the [Minutemen of the Revolutionary War](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=031d26eeb5&e=bbce4dd6ad). Loyal to country and community, dependable, selfless, and ready at a moment’s notice, the Minutemen were American heroes who helped turn the tide of the Revolutionary War. **Today’s East Texans reflect those traits.** You are patriotic, dependable, and deeply committed to making our communities better. Each month, I will recognize an East Texan who has gone above and beyond in serving our region - someone who epitomizes the identity of a Minuteman. In addition to recognition in the monthly newsletter, we will send the person a Moran Minuteman t-shirt.
---
| **This month’s Minuteman, Artie Erwin, has spent his life serving our community, state, and nation.** He is a retired Army nurse who now resides in Texarkana. In 2018, Artie saw a need facing children in foster care. The children needed beds. **Artie responded to the call, starting a Beds for Kids program as a ministry of Walnut Church of Christ in Texarkana.**
---
|
---
| He now leads an entire team of volunteers to build the beds and works with area businesses to secure donations of lumber, mattresses, and linens. **Artie embodies the Minuteman spirit - ready at a moment’s notice to make our community better.** Thank you, Artie, for your selfless service!
---
| Do you know an East Texan who would be a great next recipient? Please submit their name **[here](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=e6333a921b&e=bbce4dd6ad). **And to be clear, women can receive the Minuteman honor, too. Don’t hold back those suggestions! Our Moran Minuteman team will also be out and about serving at community events and in disaster relief efforts. Look for us, and we’ll toss you a t-shirt!
---
| [Nominate a Minuteman!](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=c0a39f83c6&e=bbce4dd6ad "Nominate a Minuteman!")
---
|
---
|
## Delivering on Promises
When I ran for Congress, I promised to protect our Constitutional rights, including our 2nd Amendment rights. Listen to this clip from a KTBB radio interview on March 21 to hear about one way I’m taking our East Texas values to Washington, DC.
---
| [ ](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=23f0c10a30&e=bbce4dd6ad)
---
| From religious freedom to the right to keep and bear arms, our forefathers established the greatest government in history. It is an incredible honor to play a small role in their grand vision. Thank you again for your continued support.
---
| Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Nathaniel Moran Congressman, First District of Texas
---
|
---
|
---

---

subject: They're mutilating young girls and we have to stop them
body:
I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children

| |
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3150bd0f98924f96ba27f716ed523939&_e=LNLFCzuIhL1KahZNMJGD1-iZUxdSU5GEngPTY5sdM9m-R7HXZCn6jTYgKHGm46an8Ma9DANxvNbGA46MxxIrDbNtkH-4DOnYiXtrGaVmLcEjB0og3hfdb-BFnrEZMFHZm_ydVJKsBwQktrCquS8vNo2-lz9DMPI77qJNUP24XG24hRoXxQAx-OcH0aFWgewTsr2HtWuFz9ft11PjL3jzYjy2zbdE_DRjVVAUyXWEXwkMis34NbJ8pl5N4aP3ZuFCyK2y-54t9wcsf43z3E4oFKQJcRONKSsM3zy1ZqYR4SHpon8ldcjLAPWIzvbk6MRoxm94-Ge5vuUCk35tJ-jZZR2smzJya9cM11Hvx_yEr8gsDjCX71OKt9MoKeP0h6hxe6JLn1-SFyScgsGJeDdM4Q%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria."
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3150bd0f98924f96ba27f716ed523939&_e=LNLFCzuIhL1KahZNMJGD1-iZUxdSU5GEngPTY5sdM9m-R7HXZCn6jTYgKHGm46an8Ma9DANxvNbGA46MxxIrDbNtkH-4DOnYiXtrGaVmLcEjB0og3hfdb-BFnrEZMFHZm_ydVJKsBwQktrCquS8vNo2-lz9DMPI77qJNUP24XG24hRoXxQAx-OcH0aFWgewTsr2HtWuFz9ft11PjL3jzYjy2zbdE_DRjVVAUyXWEXwkMis34NbJ8pl5N4aP3ZuFCZxJICxiTWEl_VaHKYItQi5YPTLNHGpMLXUPf-T50mfm8uemuCFJuymTCBMRhTfitipImD0WQnuu-Vh5N6-wMSz8VqCw20h_Zh-F1BwoZJKHeHcDH3-nZ8N1thbVE0AS2IH9vJfFpDXgVHYlJkFSgaw%3D%3D)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: ** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
"Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?"
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15. How was this allowed to happen? name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: President Biden’s reelection campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for CongressLisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
Team, It's official: President Biden is running for reelection.
Last election, I was proud to stand by my fellow Delewarean and had the honor of serving as the National Co-Chair of the Biden/Harris campaign and helping lead the vice presidential search committee. I'm proud to once again serve as a National Campaign Co-Chair as President Biden seeks a second term.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-biden-em-apr2023?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.04.25_B1_biden-announce_All [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-biden-em-apr2023?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.04.25_B1_biden-announce_All]In just two-and-a-half years, Joe Biden has accomplished more than most presidents accomplish in a lifetime. Over the course of this campaign, we will have plenty of time to talk about President Biden's record: the American Rescue Plan, the PACT Act to help our veterans, the Inflation Reduction Act, CHIPS and Science, and the nomination of Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court. But right now, we need to come out of the gate strong.
With Republicans chomping at the bit to unseat him, demolish all we've accomplished, and install an extreme far-right executive, it's never been more important to reelect the president and reclaim a Democratic House majority. President Biden can't continue his important work without a Congress that supports him. Can you split just $10 between me and President Biden so we can continue to show up for the Democratic Party? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-biden-em-apr2023?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.04.25_B1_biden-announce_All]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC 'Red to Blue' program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.

>
Grassroots donors helped send Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to the White House, and grassroots donors will help keep them in the White House.
During the last election, Americans showed up in record-shattering numbers — even in the middle of a pandemic — to make their voices heard. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris won more votes than any candidate in history.
A few weeks later, on one of the darkest days of our democracy, a violent mob of domestic terrorists — incited by the president of the United States — attacked the Capitol and tried to overturn the results.
This is the type of anti-democratic extremism that we’re still up against. But, in the 2022 midterms, Democrats were able to expand our majority in the Senate, and election deniers lost every statewide race to oversee elections in every presidential battleground — shoring up the freedom of the American people to choose their own leaders in 2024.
But that didn’t happen by chance. It’s because we grew a strong grassroots movement across the country to reject authoritarian extremism. To defend our democracy. To protect our freedoms.
We can win this next election — and continue to make real change — if we link arms and get organized, person to person, starting now.
As a candidate for re-election to the U.S. Senate from Massachusetts, I’d be honored to appear on the same ballot as President Biden and Vice President Harris next year. And I’m going to do everything I can to see them pull off another big win.
[_**If you’re able to, please split a donation of $3 or anything you can today to support Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, and my re-election campaign. Elizabeth

body:
Can you guess how many Democrats voted against this?

|
---
| | | |
---

Friend, House Republicans just passed a bill to keep men out of women's sports. While we should celebrate this major step to protect women, we're shocked and disturbed that **ZERO** **Democrats voted for the bill!**

That means that Democrats don't care that **MEN** could potentially:
* Ruin competition for your daughters and granddaughters
* Use the same shower and locker room as your daughters and granddaughters
* Crush the dreams of top female athletes

While Democrats have gone too woke for their own good, we know that real Americans like you want to protect girls' sports.

That's why if you make a donation of over $10 to House Republicans today, you can claim a "Save Women's Sports" Sticker to show people that you have common sense!

body:

| There are three things you need to know ASAP about our fight to save our Senate majority:

1️⃣ **We’re defending 23 Senate seats** – and if we lose a single one, our Senate majority will collapse!

2️⃣ **Senator Bob Casey is one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for re-election.** _If he starts slipping in the polls, it’s GAME OVER!_ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43982?t=6&akid=7312%2E878179%2E3NMFTh) 3️⃣ **We’re launching our SWING STATE SENATE FUND** to defend Democrats like Bob Casey and keep the Senate out of MAGA Mitch McConnell’s hands!

[States like Pennsylvania are critical to saving our Senate majority – and if we fall behind now, the MAGA machine will run right over us. name: Ron Wyden
subject: The abortion medication mifepristone is protected – for now
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62300804/403016572/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2RkMWJiNC1hMWUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Enfd9MWQa_Es2ZPUv62BRytS9kL2TXoiVgalmUGpX8=&emci=293a518c-82e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=47dd1bb4-a1e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)

| | A few months ago, I stood on the Senate floor and sounded the alarm on the far-right's next target in its war on reproductive freedom: the abortion medication, mifepristone. And earlier this month, a radical right-wing judge in Texas handed anti-abortion fanatics the ruling they'd been hoping for: a nationwide ban on this critical pillar of reproductive care. It's been a confusing few weeks as this case has worked its way through the courts, and Republicans are relishing in the chaos they've created. But we have an update: **last** **Friday, the Supreme Court blocked the lower court's radical and illegitimate decision to ban mifepristone.** This means that for now, the medication remains on the market and accessible to women that need it. **While this ruling is a temporary win for abortion rights, we know that Republicans and radical right-wing judges are not going to stop their attacks on women.** The farthest of the far right has made it clear it will stop at nothing to rip away the right for women to make private health care decisions. This won't be the last time these extremists go after abortion rights, and we need to be ready to defend against any attack on women's reproductive freedom. As this case makes its way through the appeals process, it's more important than ever that we protect and expand abortion access into the future. **Republicans aren't backing down, but neither are The first step to growing this campaign so it can reach its full potential is reaching Virginians in Ibraheem’s district and making sure we can keep building the momentum and excitement for his vision. [**That’s why we’re getting ready to distribute our very first literature piece — door hangers to introduce Ibraheem to folks in Loudoun. But we need your help. name: Joe Biden
subject: If I’m going to win this thing, I’ll need you by my side from the very beginning.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
**Folks, did you hear? I’m officially running for reelection.**
When I ran in 2020, I set out to do three things: Restore the soul of our nation, rebuild the backbone of America -- the middle class -- and create a government to work _for_ us, rather than _against_ us.
Together, we took our economy back from the brink. We took aggressive action to bring costs down for working people -- all while making wealthy and corporations pay their fair share. We passed the first federal gun violence prevention legislation in 30 years. We took the strongest action on climate in the world -- I’m not kidding.
**We’ve got a lot of work to do and a lot of progress we’ve got to make in the second term._But we’ve got to finish the job._ And I can only do that with you behind me.**
[_So, will you chip in a few bucks -- or even $5 -- split between Kirsten Gillibrand's and my reelection campaigns? With Earth Day and Arbor Day falling in the final weeks of April every year, April always marks a key time to recommit ourselves to the fight to protect our planet. But here’s the deal: With climate change already decimating communities across the country, we can’t just live out a commitment to preserving our planet on Earth Day. That has to happen every single day.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62302239/403023326/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.25_b1_te_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODQ3NGY3NS1hNGUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qUKoxKmX7qUD-1tfxTlpXNn5X6ySpy9xgoUEMY7DD6E=)
Peter – With Earth Day and Arbor Day falling in the final weeks of April every year, April always marks a key time to recommit ourselves to the fight to protect our planet.

**But here’s the deal: With climate change already decimating communities across the country, we can’t just live out our commitment to preserving our planet on Earth Day.** That needs to happen every single day – because when it comes to preserving our planet, we don’t have a second chance.

We deserve leaders who are prepared to take action to combat climate change, hold polluters accountable, and protect our environment for future generations. __And in Congress, that is exactly what Emilia is fighting to do.__

Emilia has been leading the charge to increase clean water infrastructure and ensure that everyone across Northeast Ohio and the entire country has access to the clean water and sustainable environment they deserve.

[**Look, Emilia understands that Congress needs to take action with the urgency that this moment demands – but she can’t do it alone. To continue making progress towards protecting our planet, we have to keep pro-environment champions like Emilia in office. Team, **This morning, President Joe Biden officially announced his re-election campaign for 2024!** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62302512/403025202/1626559718?refcode=fl_em_ta_20230425biden_wm_180da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTJhNDA0Yy1hNWUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1xPRZwHkO4ghDVKOSC7pyQP03uQMkPr1amjtvFNCO4I=)
---
Like the President said, “Every generation has a moment where they have had to stand up for democracy. To stand up for their fundamental freedoms. I believe this is ours.”
_This is not only our moment, but our movement, team!_
Our freedom and rights — for a fair shot at life, reproductive choice, free and fair elections, affordable and accessible healthcare, quality education, to love who we love and be who we are — are once again on the line next year.
Together, President Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris have built bridges instead of burning them down, working in a bipartisan manner and leading with empathy, decency, and courage — just like we have.
President Biden stood with me when I was running against a far-right extremist who threatened to rip away our rights and drag Maryland backward last year. Now, let’s stand with him and ensure he can continue to move our country forward and leave no one behind, here in Maryland and nationwide.
[**Let’s show the President that Maryland has his back from Day 1: split a grassroots donation of $10 or more between our campaigns today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62302513/403025203/1626559718?refcode=fl_em_ta_20230425biden_wm_180da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTJhNDA0Yy1hNWUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1xPRZwHkO4ghDVKOSC7pyQP03uQMkPr1amjtvFNCO4I=)

clean_body: | = Team, This morning, President Joe Biden officially announced his re-election campaign for 2024! | = Like the President said, “Every generation has a moment where they have had to stand up for democracy. To stand up for their fundamental freedoms. I believe this is ours.” This is not only our moment, but our movement, team! Our freedom and rights — for a fair shot at life, reproductive choice, free and fair elections, affordable and accessible healthcare, quality education, to love who we love and be who we are — are once again on the line next year. Together, President Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris have built bridges instead of burning them down, working in a bipartisan manner and leading with empathy, decency, and courage — just like we have. President Biden stood with me when I was running against a far-right extremist who threatened to rip away our rights and drag Maryland backward last year. Now, let’s stand with him and ensure he can continue to move our country forward and leave no one behind, here in Maryland and nationwide. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Elevate, Wes | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your Governor! Thanks to supporters like you, we made history by electing Wes the 63rd Governor of Maryland. Support Wes as he works to move our state forward and leave no one behind. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Derek, this is big:

Derek, this is big:

**President Joe Biden just officially announced he’s running for re-election in 2024.**

A proud son of Scranton, Joe Biden has never forgotten where he came from. And from major investments in our infrastructure to steps to lower the cost of health care and prescription drugs, he’s delivered for Pennsylvanians.

There would be no President Biden without Pennsylvania, and it’s up to us to make sure we can continue the work to build a stronger, brighter future for all Americans.

In 2020, Pennsylvania was a make-or-break state in the presidential election. _Joe Biden only won by 1 percentage point._

In 2024, we’ll need to work even harder to organize, communicate, and turn out the vote — so Joe Biden can once again win Pennsylvania’s electoral votes.

But we know the Republican playbook: they’re going to spread misinformation, try to make it harder for Pennsylvanians to vote or even work to overturn the election results again. We beat them in 2020, but we need to get ready for all of the tough fights ahead.

**Chip in to Joe Biden’s campaign and ours to help us keep up the fight in 2024 and beyond. Pennsylvania will be a key swing state again in 2024, so every dollar makes a big difference.**

Peter, when the Supreme Court allowed mifepristone to stay on the market while the case worked its way through the appeals circuit, they gave us the gift of more time. **But we’re not out of the woods yet.** The truth is, conservative judges and anti-choice extremists won’t stop until they see reproductive rights severely rolled back across the country, even in states where abortion is protected, like California. If it’s not this case, it’ll be the next one, or the next one. **SCOTUS gave us a little more time to prepare for the next fight — and now it’s our responsibility to use it.**[_**We’re organizing around the clock to protect reproductive healthcare across the country. clean_body: | = Peter, when the Supreme Court allowed mifepristone to stay on the market while the case worked its way through the appeals circuit, they gave us the gift of more time. But we’re not out of the woods yet. The truth is, conservative judges and anti-choice extremists won’t stop until they see reproductive rights severely rolled back across the country, even in states where abortion is protected, like California. If it’s not this case, it’ll be the next one, or the next one. SCOTUS gave us a little more time to prepare for the next fight — and now it’s our responsibility to use it.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your support, HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Callie Barr
subject: Grandma with a chainsaw
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress
body:
When a tree fell in my 86-year old grandma’s driveway, she didn’t complain — she got out her chainsaw. In Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula we work hard, we aren’t afraid to get our hands dirty, and we know how to take care of ourselves and each other. | **When a tree fell in my 86-year old grandma’s driveway, she didn’t complain — she got out her chainsaw.** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62302953/403026595/556261575?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230425grandma_cb_actives_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGM3NGNlYTctYTdlMy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CKDLk2Jo1N19tnWLNecQlmCVUC0y_5T3GntU8ezwg6I=)
---
She knew it would take days to get a crew out there to clear the driveway, and she had places to be! Grandma took the tree apart herself because folks around here have _grit_.
In Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula we work hard, we aren’t afraid to get our hands dirty, and we know how to take care of ourselves and each other. **Unfortunately, we’re represented by a congressman who doesn’t share our grit.**
While Congressman Jack Bergman is bopping between D.C. and his real home in Louisiana, us here in rural Michigan are being left out to dry.
We deserve to be represented by a _real_ Michigander in Congress — someone who will bring the same grit to the fight to lower health care costs down as we do to plowing our streets.
**I’m Callie Barr. I’m a 5th-generation Northern Michigander raised in Traverse City and Cheboygan.** I’m a military spouse, attorney, and veteran’s advocate. And my grandma with a chainsaw made sure to pass down her grit to me.
**[I’m challenging Republican Rep. Jack Bergman for OUR seat in Congress. If you’re with me, will you chip in $5 or more today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62302954/403026596/556261575?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230425grandma_cb_actives_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGM3NGNlYTctYTdlMy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CKDLk2Jo1N19tnWLNecQlmCVUC0y_5T3GntU8ezwg6I=)**

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: It’s all hands on deck →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
After four years of Trump’s relentless attacks

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62303100/403027165/-342827316?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230425-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDM5YTExYS1hOGUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-WTA-kh1nh7PUnfJoS4leAknAkL84-hkNzpDOcrZb0=)
---
| Peter,

President Biden just announced he is running for re-election in 2024.

**Peter, I’m all in.**

After four years of Trump’s relentless attacks on immigrants and the LGBTQ+ community, and stoking anti-democratic rhetoric, Biden’s leadership came at the right time.

In three years, Biden got to work on:

→ Reducing the unemployment rate
→ Signing the most significant legislation to reduce gun violence in 30 years
→ Prioritizing workers and working families in historic legislation to tackle climate change

**But there’s still much work to be done.** With Republicans peddling the same hateful and divisive rhetoric that led to the January 6th insurrection, we need a leader who knows how to turn the focus back on the issues that matter most.

I look forward to the work we can accomplish in another four years. But if we want to continue on this path to progress, we need all hands on deck.

clean_body: After four years of Trump’s relentless attacks | = | Peter, President Biden just announced he is running for re-election in 2024. Peter, I’m all in. After four years of Trump’s relentless attacks on immigrants and the LGBTQ+ community, and stoking anti-democratic rhetoric, Biden’s leadership came at the right time. In three years, Biden got to work on: → Reducing the unemployment rate → Signing the most significant legislation to reduce gun violence in 30 years → Prioritizing workers and working families in historic legislation to tackle climate change But there’s still much work to be done. With Republicans peddling the same hateful and divisive rhetoric that led to the January 6th insurrection, we need a leader who knows how to turn the focus back on the issues that matter most. I look forward to the work we can accomplish in another four years. But if we want to continue on this path to progress, we need all hands on deck. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Onward, Valerie * | | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States | | ---|--- Email is a critical way for the Foushee campaign to stay in touch with you. | **A staggering 200 million people will be displaced in the next 20 years, climate experts warn.**

_**This is scary.**_

As catastrophic climate disasters become more and more frequent, displacement due to loss of homes, land, and livelihoods is rapidly growing. **More than 11 million people have lost their homes every year over the last 5 years because of extreme weather.**

We don’t have time to sit back and watch as the most vulnerable populations are in distress. We are fighting like hell to elect climate champions across the country. clean_body: We can work together to protect our homes, the planet, and its people. | = | A staggering 200 million people will be displaced in the next 20 years, climate experts warn. This is scary. As catastrophic climate disasters become more and more frequent, displacement due to loss of homes, land, and livelihoods is rapidly growing. More than 11 million people have lost their homes every year over the last 5 years because of extreme weather. We don’t have time to sit back and watch as the most vulnerable populations are in distress. We are fighting like hell to elect climate champions across the country. = | = Fossil fuel emissions are killing our planet, and if we don’t act now to hold the fossil fuel industry accountable, the effects of climate change will become irreversible. We can work together to protect our homes, the planet, and its people. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your support, Jane Fonda Climate PAC * | | = Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. | Peter,

From my first day in office, I’ve been driven to deliver results for our community and nation. I believe it is a representative’s duty to look out for their constituents, not their own interests.

While that may seem obvious, _**it’s not always clear.**_

To support transparency and promote accountability in Congress, I introduced a bill to ban Members of Congress, their spouses, and dependent children from trading individual stocks. No one should use their position to look after their financial portfolios instead of their constituents.

_**My commonsense reform is gaining popularity every day,**_ and a majority of Americans from both parties support it. I’m eager to push it across the finish line, but I need support from people like you to ensure I can continue advocating for important issues like this in Congress.
