name: Jill Biden
subject: I wanted to share something special with you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Four years ago on this very date when Joe announced he was running, I went to school and taught my class. And now, four years later, I am doing the same thing. | | |
---
As we begin this campaign, I've been thinking about how the last one started: Four years ago on this very date when Joe announced he was running, I went to school and taught my class. And now, four years later, I am doing the same thing. **Joe and Kamala have accomplished so much since taking office. But Joe will be the first to tell you that our work is far from finished.** Let’s continue to fight for the soul of our nation. I’m so grateful to have you on this team and to be sharing this fight with you, Peter. Since that day more than four years ago, that's what everything we’ve done has been about -- not Joe or me, not Kamala or Doug. It's been about you, Peter, and every person who believes in a vision of America where we can all thrive. It’s time to finish the job, so I’m asking: **Will you join us with a $25 donation today to support Joe and Kamala’s reelection campaign? Anything you’re able to give will make a real difference in this fight.**

clean_body: Four years ago on this very date when Joe announced he was running, I went to school and taught my class. And now, four years later, I am doing the same thing. | | | As we begin this campaign, I've been thinking about how the last one started: Four years ago on this very date when Joe announced he was running, I went to school and taught my class. And now, four years later, I am doing the same thing. Joe and Kamala have accomplished so much since taking office. But Joe will be the first to tell you that our work is far from finished. Let’s continue to fight for the soul of our nation. I’m so grateful to have you on this team and to be sharing this fight with you, Peter. Since that day more than four years ago, that's what everything we’ve done has been about -- not Joe or me, not Kamala or Doug. It's been about you, Peter, and every person who believes in a vision of America where we can all thrive. It’s time to finish the job, so I’m asking: Will you join us with a $25 donation today to support Joe and Kamala’s reelection campaign? Anything you’re able to give will make a real difference in this fight. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | The hope I felt on Day One of this administration has only grown. I’ve met so many supporters like you these last two years, and you inspire me every day. You’ve done so much to help bring our country together -- and with your support, I know we can give Joe and Kamala four more years in the White House to continue improving the lives of Americans across the country. name: Ro Khanna
subject: Creating an America that works for everyone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

The late, great Congressman John Lewis said that “technology rights are the new civil rights.” He was right.

African Americans were excluded from the agricultural revolution and the industrial revolution. They shouldn’t—and they won’t—be excluded from the digital revolution.

That’s why I’m proud to have brought the TechWise [https://www.washingtonpost.com/opinions/2023/04/13/california-tech-education-jobs-ro-khanna-rural-america/] program, an initiative I helped conceive that unites tech companies, local governments, and educational institutions, to Benedict College, a historically Black college in Columbia, South Carolina.

Through TechWise, Google is partnering with HBCUs such as Benedict; community colleges such as Des Moines Community College; and Hispanic-Serving Institutions such as the University of Nevada, Reno, to prepare students to become the tech leaders of the 21st century. Google is paying a $5,000 stipend to students, who get an 18-month credential and 10 hours a week with a Google mentor to provide them with either advanced STEM (science, technology, engineering, and math) degrees or jobs paying up to $100,000.

WATCH NOW: See how TechWise is changing lives and creating new opportunities. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/techwise-video]

Meeting folks of all backgrounds whose lives have been transformed because of our tech education program has been absolutely inspiring. A key pillar of building our democracy is providing every person in every place with the prospect of a dignified life, which includes the potential to contribute to and shape the digital age. Together, we are creating an America that works for everyone.

In solidarity,
Ro

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ngp-email-footer?refcode=20230425-techwise]

Friend,
Make no mistake, billions and billions of dollars will be spent by the Democrats to try and stop us from winning back the White House in 2024.
**And following Biden’s announcement today, we have just DAYS left until the end-of-month deadline when our fundraising numbers will be compared head-to-head for the _FIRST TIME_.**
But while Biden relies on Hollywood, the Soros Money Machine, and special interest donors to line his coffers, our campaign has something he NEVER will...

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62304186/403030733/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTA0YTYyMy1hY2UzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vfOwz84LvsB3TUpooEKiVDVG_FA4bkdjBWoAG3pI5bQ=&emci=b49f52eb-8ee3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=4504a623-ace3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=17281370)

| | Dear Peter, Last night, I was elected as the new Chair of the Massachusetts Democratic Party. For me, a kid from Central Massachusetts, assuming this post is the honor of a lifetime – because I love the Democratic Party and everything it stands for. I am grateful to have a chance to serve a Party that has given me, my family and our country so much. I’ve always believed that if you have an opportunity to make a difference, you have an obligation to try. I am thrilled to be given this opportunity to serve, and I am honored to do so alongside Governor Maura Healey, Lieutenant Governor Kim Driscoll and our terrific elected leaders at all levels of government – all of whom embody our Party’s values in everything they do. What makes the Democratic Party so great is our Party is not just the names on the ticket, it is all of you. I look forward to working together with the Democratic State Committee, city, ward, and town committees, and Party activists all across Massachusetts to create a Party infrastructure that elects and supports Democrats up and down the ballot. With your ideas and energy, we can best communicate our Party’s principles and values to voters, expand our efforts to make our Party accessible and representative of all our people, and harness the tremendous energy at the grassroots. The success of these ideas depends on you, the activists who do the hard work year after year to win elections and advance our cause. We have always been better when we reach out and bring more people in. We will depend on that passion again in 2024 as we work to support the national ticket of President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris and to ensure the re-election of Senator Elizabeth Warren. Building on a strong foundation, there is more we can do to make the Massachusetts Democratic Party the gold standard for state parties across the country. Senator Kennedy taught us that you never rest on your laurels. You can always get better. Let our work begin today on doing just that. Nothing could be more important. Because when Democrats win, our commonwealth and our nation are better for it. Sincerely,
---
| |
---
| | **Steve Kerrigan** Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Peter, Last night, I was elected as the new Chair of the Massachusetts Democratic Party. For me, a kid from Central Massachusetts, assuming this post is the honor of a lifetime – because I love the Democratic Party and everything it stands for. I am grateful to have a chance to serve a Party that has given me, my family and our country so much. I’ve always believed that if you have an opportunity to make a difference, you have an obligation to try. I am thrilled to be given this opportunity to serve, and I am honored to do so alongside Governor Maura Healey, Lieutenant Governor Kim Driscoll and our terrific elected leaders at all levels of government – all of whom embody our Party’s values in everything they do. What makes the Democratic Party so great is our Party is not just the names on the ticket, it is all of you. I look forward to working together with the Democratic State Committee, city, ward, and town committees, and Party activists all across Massachusetts to create a Party infrastructure that elects and supports Democrats up and down the ballot. With your ideas and energy, we can best communicate our Party’s principles and values to voters, expand our efforts to make our Party accessible and representative of all our people, and harness the tremendous energy at the grassroots. The success of these ideas depends on you, the activists who do the hard work year after year to win elections and advance our cause. We have always been better when we reach out and bring more people in. We will depend on that passion again in 2024 as we work to support the national ticket of President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris and to ensure the re-election of Senator Elizabeth Warren. Building on a strong foundation, there is more we can do to make the Massachusetts Democratic Party the gold standard for state parties across the country. Senator Kennedy taught us that you never rest on your laurels. You can always get better. Let our work begin today on doing just that. Nothing could be more important. Because when Democrats win, our commonwealth and our nation are better for it. Sincerely, | | | | Steve Kerrigan Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee Massachusetts Democratic Party 11 Beacon St Suite 410 Boston, MA 02108 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Major news on the Supreme Court:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, this is
major!

Justice Democrats is joining a progressive coalition to demand and
advocate for much-needed changes to the Supreme Court:

It was recently reported that Justice Clarence Thomas allegedly went on
luxury vacations for years that were funded by a GOP mega-donor and
billionaire — and didn’t disclose or report these vacations. That’s some
pretty major corruption.

Our highest court in the country shouldn’t be a partisan weapon. Right
now, Republicans have a 6-3 super majority and are using the Supreme Court
to attack fundamental rights and freedoms, like reproductive freedom and
student debt cancellation. We need to expand the Supreme Court by adding
four seats to the court and enacting term limits for Supreme Court
justices to depoliticize the court.

We’re taking action by joining with other progressives to organize, demand
action, and enact necessary structural reforms in the Supreme Court.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134135?refcode=em20230425-28653&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=28653%2E1203867%2ECwg4Oh ]Will you make a $3 contribution right now to power our
fight to expand the Supreme Court?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134135?refcode=em20230425-28653&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=28653%2E1203867%2ECwg4Oh ]Contribute $3

Thank you for your support,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. name: Kim Nguyen
subject: Why I’m wearing denim tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
| | _Content Warning: This email discusses sexual violence and assault._ I’m reaching out about something very personal to me and, unfortunately, to far too many people across the country.

April is Sexual Assault Awareness Month, a time for us to educate one another about how sexual violence affects our communities and to support survivors.

I am one of those survivors. I was assaulted when I was 18, and I live with the trauma of that experience every day.

But I am one of _millions_. Statistics show that 1 in 6 women in America will be sexually assaulted – and the vast majority of survivors are under the age of 30.

Tomorrow, as part of Sexual Assault Awareness Month, I will be observing Denim Day, when we wear jeans or other denim to make a visible statement of support for survivors and spread awareness of sexual violence issues.

**I hope you will join me in showing your solidarity with survivors by wearing denim tomorrow, April 26th.**

[Click here to learn more about Denim Day](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62305211/403034114/495710222?refcode=KBN_EM_EN_WL_230425_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQzMGJhMzktYWVlMy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xnH-0NcuBSF7XnQTP0sJlYwJMqxnVb8iloXni_zCURo=&emci=f1486f0b-8ce3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1d30ba39-aee3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971), and if you or someone you love needs help, the National Sexual Assault Hotline is 1-800-656-4673.

Thank you,

Kim

---
|
* * *
---
| **Democrat Kim Bernice Nguyen is running for Congress in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the entire nation.** The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant, Kim's story is the quintessential California tale of sacrifice, hard work, and dedication to community. At just 25, she became the youngest person ever elected to the Garden Grove City Council. clean_body: | | Content Warning: This email discusses sexual violence and assault. I’m reaching out about something very personal to me and, unfortunately, to far too many people across the country. April is Sexual Assault Awareness Month, a time for us to educate one another about how sexual violence affects our communities and to support survivors. I am one of those survivors. I was assaulted when I was 18, and I live with the trauma of that experience every day. But I am one of millions. Statistics show that 1 in 6 women in America will be sexually assaulted – and the vast majority of survivors are under the age of 30. Tomorrow, as part of Sexual Assault Awareness Month, I will be observing Denim Day, when we wear jeans or other denim to make a visible statement of support for survivors and spread awareness of sexual violence issues. I hope you will join me in showing your solidarity with survivors by wearing denim tomorrow, April 26th. , and if you or someone you love needs help, the National Sexual Assault Hotline is 1-800-656-4673. Thank you, Kim | | Democrat Kim Bernice Nguyen is running for Congress in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the entire nation.** The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant, Kim's story is the quintessential California tale of sacrifice, hard work, and dedication to community. At just 25, she became the youngest person ever elected to the Garden Grove City Council. Now, she's running for Congress to reduce prescription drug costs, increase housing affordability, invest in working families, and strengthen our democracy. | Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress Kim Nguyen for Congress 3843 S. Bristol St #604 Santa Ana, CA 92704 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
Vice President Kamala Harris says that “we have a secure border.” But this is a lie.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=e9c8661a9e324dbf9759f95d0bdac774&_t=_LDOZrKmhJjdnIQl20s0IjnGgJ9WLa8C_EzYw4bXUYIjMoWsun6huSutL6ZzLMzreMfRh-b5454P7bohbUyfUh7ty24rO2XXbh0CtHK5zpc%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=e9c8661a9e324dbf9759f95d0bdac774&_t=_LDOZrKmhJjdnIQl20s0IjnGgJ9WLa8C_EzYw4bXUYIjMoWsun6huSutL6ZzLMzreMfRh-b5454P7bohbUyfUh7ty24rO2XXbh0CtHK5zpc%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e9c8661a9e324dbf9759f95d0bdac774&_e=q_FedTfnr7j2C6RuvTb07ZwMY9WSJaq036guGGEm9d2mm63yYJONgG4ijzf2gROAaPV-uA9mRczp1clgTPpaIvnbPw0-iMTnN0ZtgStJaIVY8UPiUjN2NDKSGBnMNJp02pnBlzaRMamepvRlVYZGgREn69NEPQ_W2GmNs9Qh1VLFhgO6XhPveIZcFAYP9Kh4tX7qGWCHgYfZ1GWIcJHHN1Rn82eGb0pv38IspxnyG8yL7ZIlmF4JAlsnCC52ctGZAFRNE-YOVRyuYUVdbSF7IVOdaN3vW9fb-Kx01kr9V7k8zhNwkX5b0zYzerhe_22jU0rtfkdmwB5gKeoFhFGgvovd7LbI3b9jrnzfKb8q2eErgyf8DtY873dtkhcVCUulff6pKpX5wgy2HA14LeIOLRt56-ib7fXf4wkTW16zlnc00BVw5nDB-udL7jDmisRLEuAz3ravkevTLP5XOZFrHMdSAF06M0RFrfpxIAy50Wym035_2kddXBBuicrMr-QqDViel5bkWkL182t9eKEqSbiG0HCDWA2LF6licBMpFiYHBZqhTjErr_2dLQQqoe930lTx3JcCKNdrooL1B2Gd_w%3D%3D)
|
Fellow Conservative,

We emailed last week and the response was tepid, at best. If we’re going to secure our southern border and stop Mexican drug cartels from, **we're going to need your input.**

**Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas says** that our “ _border is secure_.”

**White House Press Secretary Karine Jean Pierre says** that “ _we are securing the border_.”

**Vice President Kamala Harris says** that “ _we have a secure border_.”

**But these are all lies.** There have been 1,029,953 border encounters in fiscal year 2023 so far; in 2022, there were 2,378,944!

**OFFICIAL 2023 BORDER SECURITY QUESTIONNAIRE**

**PREPARED FOR:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**RESPONSE** : **PENDING**

[**IS OUR BORDER SECURE?
SUBMIT YOUR QUESTIONNAIRE TODAY-> **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e9c8661a9e324dbf9759f95d0bdac774&_e=q_FedTfnr7j2C6RuvTb07ZwMY9WSJaq036guGGEm9d2mm63yYJONgG4ijzf2gROAaPV-uA9mRczp1clgTPpaIvnbPw0-iMTnN0ZtgStJaIVY8UPiUjN2NDKSGBnMNJp02pnBlzaRMamepvRlVYZGgREn69NEPQ_W2GmNs9Qh1VLFhgO6XhPveIZcFAYP9Kh4tX7qGWCHgYfZ1GWIcJHHN1Rn82eGb0pv38IspxnyG8yL7ZIlmF4JAlsnCC52ctGZAFRNE-YOVRyuYUVdbSF7IVOdaN3vW9fb-Kx01kr9V7k8zhNwkX5b0zYzerhe_22jU0rtfkdmwB5gKeoFhFGgvovd7LbI3b9jrnzfKb8q2eErgyf8DtY873dtkhcVCUulff6pKpX5wgy2HA14LeIOLRt56-ib7fXf4wkTW16zlnc00BVw5nDB-udL7jDmisRLPcs-k4-xyq1BlTMzZs7OuGALOSTapomJkNYHU19d8IB9WFI5OEtd5hRq57peIs6Keolei9eiAqvyPWbBDq1RJVT6eCJujgjG874UToJNff_oVMR9C8HPtkE83L6hq21IiF5kg7OGtd-C4s22-5sd8w%3D%3D)

My team and I are reaching out to concerned Americans because **the only way to defeat Democrats and remove them from positions of power is at the ballot box**. When the president of the United States is more concerned about visiting Ireland than he is about visiting the southern border, you know we have a problem.

Let me be clear - **[your input is needed by our campaign right now](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e9c8661a9e324dbf9759f95d0bdac774&_e=q_FedTfnr7j2C6RuvTb07ZwMY9WSJaq036guGGEm9d2mm63yYJONgG4ijzf2gROAaPV-uA9mRczp1clgTPpaIvnbPw0-iMTnN0ZtgStJaIVY8UPiUjN2NDKSGBnMNJp02pnBlzaRMamepvRlVYZGgREn69NEPQ_W2GmNs9Qh1VLFhgO6XhPveIZcFAYP9Kh4tX7qGWCHgYfZ1GWIcJHHN1Rn82eGb0pv38IspxnyG8yL7ZIlmF4JAlsnCC52ctGZAFRNE-YOVRyuYUVdbSF7IVOdaN3vW9fb-Kx01kr9V7k8zhNwkX5b0zYzerhe_22jU0rtfkdmwB5gKeoFhFGgvovd7LbI3b9jrnzfKb8q2eErgyf8DtY873dtkhcVCUulff6pKpX5wgy2HA14LeIOLRt56-ib7fXf4wkTW16zlnc00BVw5nDB-udL7jDmisRLik1fU7jxt5eFnPUqi5P_6RWYj7XMLwXxHOMr5mL4sL_SmqRiOVEo4citH9ldOVSM_HLdIspQot5Oh7FGN8333rUtjqk3Dc9wDO83E-_K4Tj-FvRpJF89FN_6urZxEurh5EdNFI5QcVZA1b80Zm5h0w%3D%3D)**. Having just launched my Senate race earlier this month, I’m counting on conservatives like you to help fill me in on where you stand pertaining to the border crisis.

Please complete your **[OFFICIAL 2023 BORDER SECURITY QUESTIONNAIRE by midnight tonight](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e9c8661a9e324dbf9759f95d0bdac774&_e=q_FedTfnr7j2C6RuvTb07ZwMY9WSJaq036guGGEm9d2mm63yYJONgG4ijzf2gROAaPV-uA9mRczp1clgTPpaIvnbPw0-iMTnN0ZtgStJaIVY8UPiUjN2NDKSGBnMNJp02pnBlzaRMamepvRlVYZGgREn69NEPQ_W2GmNs9Qh1VLFhgO6XhPveIZcFAYP9Kh4tX7qGWCHgYfZ1GWIcJHHN1Rn82eGb0pv38IspxnyG8yL7ZIlmF4JAlsnCC52ctGZAFRNE-YOVRyuYUVdbSF7IVOdaN3vW9fb-Kx01kr9V7k8zhNwkX5b0zYzerhe_22jU0rtfkdmwB5gKeoFhFGgvovd7LbI3b9jrnzfKb8q2eErgyf8DtY873dtkhcVCUulff6pKpX5wgy2HA14LeIOLRt56-ib7fXf4wkTW16zlnc00BVw5nDB-udL7jDmisRLwoaDLd5K2f4r9x3RggA-VvK4adxYBaso0gr-_REroneUWALygpHHY8iUdykXEkJpk6DQJsKzg9D2eSM1yyixRJTrCCwd9qz75Lh-1sORM8bdcZhHLcJfGChRCjEi6OGkuqPw27P5DSwcCJOV88kw-A%3D%3D)**.
**
We’re going to stop accepting responses at 12:00 a.m. on the dot. **

If we’re going to secure our southern border and stop Mexican drug cartels from, we're going to need your input. Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas says that our “ border is secure.” White House Press Secretary Karine Jean Pierre says that “ we are securing the border.” Vice President Kamala Harris says that “ we have a secure border.” But these are all lies. There have been 1,029,953 border encounters in fiscal year 2023 so far; in 2022, there were 2,378,944! Peter, I am ticked off.

Last week, Tate Reeves had the nerve to say that Medicaid expansion is "not the right path" for our state.

_Now, I could tell you that it wasn't “the right path” for Tate to help funnel over a million taxpayer dollars to his personal trainer. Or that 220,000 hardworking Mississippians don’t have access to healthcare because of him._

[But here’s what I’ll do instead: I’m asking you to donate to make sure my campaign has the resources to win and expand Medicaid in Mississippi. Any amount makes a major difference ahead of our public deadline this month.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62305568/403035757/960250762?refcode=ea.49804355-b0e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.49804355-b0e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDk4MDQzNTUtYjBlMy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Nytz1eIAoVtAz2xEYNhH8YgNzjP_vtVz1KnGjQHV9w8=)

What about our rural hospitals? They're on life support, and Reeves couldn't do more than give them a cheap, dollar-store Band-Aid.

When Tate Reeves finally wakes up and wonders why rural hospitals are closed, he needs to look in the mirror.

As governor, I’ll have the backbone to expand Medicaid so we can end Tate Reeves’ healthcare crisis. We will keep our rural hospitals open, provide healthcare for 220,000 working Mississippians, and create thousands of good-paying jobs.

But here's the thing, I can't do it alone. I need to know that you have my back.

[We're coming up on our first public filing deadline on April 30th, and it could make or break our campaign. It's time to show Reeves that his days in office are numbered. clean_body: Reeves crossed the line again. | = Peter, I am ticked off. Last week, Tate Reeves had the nerve to say that Medicaid expansion is "not the right path" for our state. Now, I could tell you that it wasn't “the right path” for Tate to help funnel over a million taxpayer dollars to his personal trainer. Or that 220,000 hardworking Mississippians don’t have access to healthcare because of him. = What about our rural hospitals? They're on life support, and Reeves couldn't do more than give them a cheap, dollar-store Band-Aid. When Tate Reeves finally wakes up and wonders why rural hospitals are closed, he needs to look in the mirror. As governor, I’ll have the backbone to expand Medicaid so we can end Tate Reeves’ healthcare crisis. We will keep our rural hospitals open, provide healthcare for 220,000 working Mississippians, and create thousands of good-paying jobs. But here's the thing, I can't do it alone. I need to know that you have my back. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Let’s do this, Brandon Presley = | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. Peter, at Emerge we know it’s going to take strong leadership at _every level of our government_ to defeat far-right extremism for good. That’s why we commend the work that the Biden-Harris Administration and Democrats in state and local offices have achieved these past two years.
**From fighting to protect abortion access to defending the right to vote, every political office has a role to play in deciding the direction of our country.** We’re grateful for President Biden’s leadership and Vice President Harris’s trailblazing example, and we remain committed to getting more bold Democratic women in office to realize a progressive agenda that puts our communities first!
**Because here's the fact, Peter:** The Biden-Harris Administration cannot accomplish their vision without the broad support of Democrats at the local and state level. That’s why Emerge’s work to recruit, train, and empower Democratic women to run and win is critical to turning our country around and delivering big for all Americans. But we can’t do it alone – we’re working tirelessly to empower women who can shake up politics, energize our movement, and rally our communities for real and lasting change, but we need you with us.
**That’s why, at this crucial moment, we’re counting on committed supporters like you to stay in this fight. We urgently need 137 more responses before our deadline at midnight tonight. Tell us now: **
**Will you stand with Democrats in 2024?**

name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: The reason Jim Jordan brought last week’s Judiciary Committee hearing to Manhattan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Fox News host Sean Hannity is amplifying the heckler’s insults to incite more right-wing fury against Adam and distract from Trump’s case.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=2138%2E5257348%2Es5VR3k)
Derek —
Last week, House Judiciary Committee chairman Jim Jordan brought the committee to Lower Manhattan for a field hearing — **and got exactly what he wanted when a heckler repeatedly interrupted Adam to call him a “scumbag” as Adam was standing up to the committee’s Republican majority for acting as Trump’s criminal defense counsel.**
Just take a look:
**"Man removed from NYC crime hearing after shouting insults at Schiff"** _—The Hill_
**"'YOU'RE A SCUMBAG!' Hecklers Derail House Judiciary Hearing in NYC By Screaming at Adam Schiff"** _—Mediaite_
**"Hecklers Derail House Judiciary Hearing By Shouting At Democratic Congressman Adam Schiff: 'You're A Scumbag!'"** _—MSN_
This is exactly what Jordan wanted, to create a spectacle. He hopes to undermine the Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg’s efforts to hold Trump accountable. He must not succeed. The Congress has no business interfering in a local prosecution or trying to place Donald Trump above the law.
But the attacks on Adam are getting even worse: **Fox News host Sean Hannity is amplifying the heckler’s insults to incite more right-wing fury against Adam and distract from Trump’s case.**
**[Derek, will you rush an urgent $10 donation to Adam’s campaign right now to help us respond to Jim Jordan and Sean Hannity’s efforts to protect Trump? We cannot let the right wing’s attacks go unanswered:](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=apr2023_abs_em.S8d4Hr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20230425_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=2138%2E5257348%2Es5VR3k)**

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Tucker Out at Fox News
body:
What You Need To Know Today! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-qudciy-trhiujldw-yd/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qudciy-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Tuesday! **
## CaucusRoom's parent company, Ouray Digital Inc., is about to launch an online space for faith-based groups to meet, share, and learn. **[Help us name our Faith-based App!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qudciy-trhiujldw-y/)**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qudciy-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qudciy-trhiujldw-t/) **Tucker Carlson Leaves Fox News** [**FOX News Media and Tucker Carlson have agreed to part ways** ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qudciy-trhiujldw-i/)with his last program airing on Friday, April 21st. **Saudi Government Owns Stake in Dems** The Democratic Party's [**primary election tools are owned by foreign funds** ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qudciy-trhiujldw-d/)that are otherwise fueled by the price of oil. **Susan Rice Steps Down** **[Susan Rice stepped down as Biden's top domestic policy adviser.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qudciy-trhiujldw-h/)** The departure comes just one day before Biden is reportedly set to announce his 2024 reelection campaign. **Deflection** **[Hunter Biden's lawyers have a lot of nerve](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qudciy-trhiujldw-k/)** demanding that Marjorie Taylor Green be the subject of an ethics probe. **Don Lemon Fired by CNN** **[Don Lemon has tweeted that he's been fired](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qudciy-trhiujldw-u/)** by CNN via his agent after 17 years with the network.

**Social Security Depletion** Social Security Trustees' Report has confirmed that the Social Security Trust Fund will be depleted by 2033. **[This will result in a cut in benefits to all retirees.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qudciy-trhiujldw-o/)** **Bud Light Blowback** Another **[Anheuser-Busch marketing executive has taken a leave of absence](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qudciy-trhiujldw-x/)** amid backlash over Bud Light's creative collaboration with transgender influencer Dylan Mulvaney. **Embracing Spirituality** **[Gen Zers are not turning their backs on religion](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qudciy-trhiujldw-m/)** , and the growing number of young adults who embrace spirituality cope better with the mental health challenges from Covid-19. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qudciy-trhiujldw-c/)!**
* **[Hold My Beer](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qudciy-trhiujldw-q/).**
* I can't**[believe it.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qudciy-trhiujldw-a/)**
* [**Back in the day.**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qudciy-trhiujldw-f/)

**[We are looking for your feedback](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qudciy-trhiujldw-z/)** to understand your first impression of our messaging. [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qudciy-trhiujldw-v/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qudciy-trhiujldw-e/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qudciy-trhiujldw-s/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qudciy-trhiujldw-g/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qudciy-trhiujldw-w/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Helping Ruben win
body:
We’re the only national PAC dedicated entirely to holding Kyrsten Sinema accountable and replacing her with a real Democrat | | | Peter – Based on multiple polls (and general vibes), it’s clear we’re not the only ones who are ready to oust Kyrsten Sinema in 2024. But **we are the only national PAC dedicated****entirely****to holding Sinema accountable for her obstruction and replacing her with a real Democrat.** **And we have a great Democratic candidate in Ruben Gallego, so we’re doing everything we can to make sure he succeeds.[_Help us win._](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wbtoFN1u-QDazYBJJ_azE2btfiwdUU_mnSDDdEB1HupVQTh7Y9ZM1lpTYDrho4m5l2FzvbkgPuGrX6acOo9plVFcPzBETu1o3hkd84lwi6Kd24VhDci-6_mjjZlBQ2WmxWTPeoHm5mEic33thFoUHO5vvDj9-WfO1E-FG4z_XzSYzk85rD9f8nn2KB_TffufWj14HlRLsTqkCRrD49Wr_TZUoiEzKLGdyS1-1QjHM1rmj3Mv5D0aUSjMm-mxyxcvy7NlmHZB730O5CQhY9fyHMfLGxAOt_xJeXzv5fpEULqj-xs65UNHcuH2nCKp-cXcbMGp4SXnEAitwB09P1WZVyEuAuOHoS1nk2Lzih2loR3RWXNn1jQEhk0ESYu7ikzdw/3vn/uTA_fhd4Rm6Ta0zlw5UoQA/h0/587rUMfT1iNZ-2v0FlGBL7ZUkOFHtmod4txIQGa7sok)** Since we launched in 2021, we’ve put in the work to build a top-notch research and communications operation that has made media outlets in Arizona and across the country take notice. Just last week, **a TV reporter in Phoenix asked Sinema about research we uncovered related to her campaign spending** on high-end restaurants, hotels, and European vacations. Of course, she dodged the question. Through our work, we’ve educated Arizonans about Sinema’s ties to Wall Street, her private equity donors, and even her abusive treatment of staff, which has led to an ethics complaint. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wbtoFN1u-QDazYBJJ_azE2WeazZMuWYQlnPH9us_AnedzzfhOC6C6xpz70TXaxlq797qXHC99RmdNx0zXHZTXPSD2poWsoHPNuoFjKKtXqgAtYPirU2ERVYUQZUxZ5i4V57dxKLuGNK0_C75cDVz9VtUeGiW-1FtvWZ_YY5bi3xo1H7qm9nXgq1NxwkLS6P7Kn0uMxwGgEvHklposZNWrdyoAXGkXbNl6TMwfuwYJCvHufEVvc5z3NyEeu_7flsH74Vydwt3UavaLjiS75kUCmnb4c1GfFOZiHMtacpWuSoIwMaQ82dmgvYwJPLbv0APJhR-5nTgE9LrkyCeho6YMXvr9NeGqmRQb7S_jSo2PsTJf_xToUrZGngEuOcmM3oTo/3vn/uTA_fhd4Rm6Ta0zlw5UoQA/h1/7sbYQn94VTk_If3y9jiJn5sG0SkJ_FUGw9r4FYvmr3U)In addition, we’ve worked with grassroots partners on the ground across Arizona to hold Sinema accountable, and we formed an advisory council of leaders from respected groups like LUCHA, Progress Arizona, Our Voice Our Vote, Rural Arizona Action, and others. First, we were called the Primary Sinema PAC, and we did the work to make sure Sinema couldn’t win a Democratic primary. So, when Sinema quit the party (because she knew she couldn’t win), we changed our name to Replace Sinema because now we have to defeat her in a three-way race. **This work hasn’t always been easy, and it takes a lot of people power plus resources.** We couldn’t do it without thousands of supporters like you. **We're in this because the stakes are SO high.** First of all, Arizona deserves a Senator who will answer to constituents, not Wall Street and corporate donors. Arizona deserves a Senator who holds more town hall meetings than “donor retreats” and who is more concerned about Arizona families than planning their next donor-funded European vacation or booking their weekly massage.

And of course, winning this seat is critical not only for Arizona but for Democrats across the country.**We absolutely must win this seat if we’re going to save the Senate Majority for Democrats.** But Sinema is forcing a three-way race that could jeopardize Democrats’ chances and hand the seat to the Republicans.

**In a three-way race between Ruben Gallego, Kyrsten Sinema, and Kari Lake or Mark Lamb – we need to make sure that Ruben wins!**
That’s why we’re continuing to work hard every day to weaken Sinema’s standing in the polls, and why we’ve **intentionally chosen to work with and invest in grassroots groups in Arizona** who are already experts at organizing and voter outreach. Together, we’re building the infrastructure we need in order to win.
**_[Give today to defeat Kyrsten Sinema.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wbtoFN1u-QDazYBJJ_azE2zXTFB34ZsaLT30nNd1_gojOQOn2R_bEGwMWolipXoQ7KDUNLCsORsqo64UUyBa5CAnWSt4LD1y8l6HM3zBa_ROEltJfqop8TPq9gYxijC2IgdWGgXKJEkKmM_v0DOXXj8DM7Jf_ZA6tgDRavl4-KhUWnk_CbuF7R8265ecNAU1_F1fK3YnF8cPiPXGRWoUbbi6k6ANJ8fU2Llr2qEwkjJfC3-3ysHm9EqXkEaJX9LcLYA637H7yyJMCZkhzFyo-atzfMLYToTPDxJ2XbMJNNHdIPfeGR0T9phwEox80PtCd_zJHDWZjnGUudO9zvdMLGL6o-htJnNApz5q1h1SBpt9pwYaVLCtsYwocCwhmCl_c/3vn/uTA_fhd4Rm6Ta0zlw5UoQA/h9/xozJIur2buDE5aVkes4Ji-sbnc3AqIweMqkwkOdvWyY)_**

clean_body: We’re the only national PAC dedicated entirely to holding Kyrsten Sinema accountable and replacing her with a real Democrat | | | Peter – Based on multiple polls (and general vibes), it’s clear we’re not the only ones who are ready to oust Kyrsten Sinema in 2024. But we are the only national PAC dedicatedentirelyto holding Sinema accountable for her obstruction and replacing her with a real Democrat. And we have a great Democratic candidate in Ruben Gallego, so we’re doing everything we can to make sure he succeeds. Since we launched in 2021, we’ve put in the work to build a top-notch research and communications operation that has made media outlets in Arizona and across the country take notice. Just last week, a TV reporter in Phoenix asked Sinema about research we uncovered related to her campaign spending on high-end restaurants, hotels, and European vacations. Of course, she dodged the question. Through our work, we’ve educated Arizonans about Sinema’s ties to Wall Street, her private equity donors, and even her abusive treatment of staff, which has led to an ethics complaint. addition, we’ve worked with grassroots partners on the ground across Arizona to hold Sinema accountable, and we formed an advisory council of leaders from respected groups like LUCHA, Progress Arizona, Our Voice Our Vote, Rural Arizona Action, and others. First, we were called the Primary Sinema PAC, and we did the work to make sure Sinema couldn’t win a Democratic primary. So, when Sinema quit the party (because she knew she couldn’t win), we changed our name to Replace Sinema because now we have to defeat her in a three-way race. This work hasn’t always been easy, and it takes a lot of people power plus resources. We couldn’t do it without thousands of supporters like you. We’re proud that over 17,000 people have donated to us, and our average grassroots donation is just $17. [ stdin# ][IMG]

Senator Kyrsten Sinema and other corporate-funded Democrats have recently made a series of arguments to try to explain why they are personally standing in the way of passing critical voting rights legislation.

Her insane intellectual gymnastics to defend the filibuster — a racist tool that has historically been used to block civil rights — continue even as Republicans openly attack the right to vote with draconian state laws.

Senator Sinema thinks she can gaslight all of us into forgetting that she is defending a filibuster that has been a tool of racism to block progress since its inception.

Peter Willis, the bottom line is this: we can’t let Senator Sinema and other corporate Democrats act as the agent of big money in politics and block the For the People Act.

The filibuster is a threat to the continuation of American democracy and our core values as a country. Can you rush a donation now to help us double down on our organizing in Arizona to expose Krysten Sinema’s unpatriotic attack on American democracy for what it truly is? subject: Did you see George's recent TedTalk?

body:
georgewhitesidesforcongress.com [georgewhitesidesforcongress.com]
Last week, George had the opportunity to give a TedTalk in Vancouver about his experience in the fight against our growing wildfire crisis.
In an era of climate change, George is working to make mega fires a manageable challenge. In Congress, he will continue to work with experts in order to build fire-adapted communities. Can you help make that happen by donating today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw4cemail?refcode=X_042523_TedTalk_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw4cemail?refcode=X_042523_TedTalk_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw4cemail?refcode=X_042523_TedTalk_act]
The challenges associated with extreme wildfires in California may feel unsolvable. However, George lays out three emerging solutions to this growing problem.
1.
We
must
build
resilient
communities
that
are
designed
with
fire
safety
in
mind.
2.
It's
critical
that
we
take
measures
to
control
fire
spread,
like
reducing
the
amount
of
overgrowth
in
landscapes.
3.
We
must
innovate
fire-management
technologies
that
can
rapidly
detect
and
put
out
fires.
In Congress, George will work with other policymakers, scientists, and tribal communities to create tangible opportunities to keep our communities safe from the wildfire crisis.
However, he needs your help to make that happen. Donate now and help elect a leader like George who will work to solve the growing climate and mega fire crisis >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw4cemail?refcode=X_042523_TedTalk_act]
Thank you for taking action,
— Team Whitesides
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90153/images/George%20Bio.png] It’s time we have bold, new leadership in this district. As a former NASA Chief of Staff and community leader of wildfire mitigation efforts, George Whitesides is ready to deliver.

name: Fair Fight
subject: re: President Biden’s announcement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
We’re doing everything in our power now to ensure that voters can make their voices heard in this critical race. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62307160/403041090/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230425_f_POTUSannounce_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmJiNzM5Yi1iN2UzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=03VO-JEW2ThVIdO9QuigXBxFlR9fUE6ckx8-H44n7Qs=&emci=0abb739b-b7e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=0bbb739b-b7e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | | **_BREAKING NEWS:_**
**President Biden announces re-election campaign for president**
---
It’s official — President Biden and Vice President Harris just announced they’re running for re-election in 2024! While some details of next year’s election are uncertain, **here’s what we do know:**
1. The future of the freedom to vote is on the ballot.
2. The last election solidified Georgia’s position as a swing state. It remains on the frontlines of attempts to undermine our democracy.
3. Anti-voter extremists have historically relied on voter suppression and intimidation tactics in their attempts to win elections, especially in Georgia.
4. We’re less than 300 days away from the first primary election of the 2024 cycle.

[_**We must do everything we can NOW to protect the freedom to vote and make sure every eligible voter can register to vote, cast a ballot, and have that ballot counted in this critical election. body:
Veterans 100% deserve our full support.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62307174/403041160/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWU3NGJiZC1iN2UzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1bC71-JO2er1R88qtDVhD3fnhsto8bhkp2kip68VViw=)

Peter, I can’t believe Republicans would go this far.

They _claim_ to be the party that supports our servicemembers and veterans – but they’re actions show the opposite. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62307175/403041161/1772472877?refcode=MTFC_20230425_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWU3NGJiZC1iN2UzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1bC71-JO2er1R88qtDVhD3fnhsto8bhkp2kip68VViw=&emci=923ebe31-8ae3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7ae74bbd-b7e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=18839602) **In their newest budget proposal, I am horrified to see Republicans taking aim at funding for the most basic and critical veteran benefits.**

These cuts could completely undo the progress we made since I led the passing of the PACT Act, which was a hugely needed boost to the VA and veteran benefits.

In fact, they’re proposing cutting nearly _25% of funding for the Veteran Affairs Department!_

It would be laughable if it wasn’t so egregious.

This will mean longer wait times, fewer staff, and dwindling benefits for veterans.

**How can we expect veterans to risk their lives in service to our country – to protect our rights – only to strip away they’re promised benefits??**

[**Peter, that’s why I’m sounding the alarm and _I need your help._ Will you sign this petition demanding House Republicans reinstate funding for veterans benefits _immediately?_ This is truly as urgent as it gets. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62307176/403041162/1772472877?refcode=MTFC_20230425_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWU3NGJiZC1iN2UzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1bC71-JO2er1R88qtDVhD3fnhsto8bhkp2kip68VViw=&emci=923ebe31-8ae3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7ae74bbd-b7e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=18839602) | [10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: SIGN THE PETITION NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62307177/403041163/1772472877?refcode=MTFC_20230425_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWU3NGJiZC1iN2UzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1bC71-JO2er1R88qtDVhD3fnhsto8bhkp2kip68VViw=&emci=923ebe31-8ae3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7ae74bbd-b7e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=18839602)

clean_body: Veterans 100% deserve our full support. | = Peter, I can’t believe Republicans would go this far. They claim to be the party that supports our servicemembers and veterans – but they’re actions show the opposite. In their newest budget proposal, I am horrified to see Republicans taking aim at funding for the most basic and critical veteran benefits. These cuts could completely undo the progress we made since I led the passing of the PACT Act, which was a hugely needed boost to the VA and veteran benefits. In fact, they’re proposing cutting nearly 25% of funding for the Veteran Affairs Department! It would be laughable if it wasn’t so egregious. This will mean longer wait times, fewer staff, and dwindling benefits for veterans. How can we expect veterans to risk their lives in service to our country – to protect our rights – only to strip away they’re promised benefits?? | Thank you for your help, Peter. – Rep. Mark Takano (CA-39) | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. subject: Peter, I’m officially running for reelection:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
If you’re with me, I hope you’ll let me explain exactly why this campaign matters so much and then consider pitching in to support it. | | |

There’s a choice ahead of us. Do we continue to build a future full of opportunities for you and families like yours? Or will we turn the clock back? But here’s the honest truth: I’m more optimistic than I’ve ever been. And it’s because I’ve seen what this team can do when it comes together.
**In 2020, more than 6 million grassroots supporters just like you helped propel our campaign to victory.**
I’m so proud of the progress we made. We took our economy back from the brink, helping create more than 12 million jobs. We took aggressive action to bring costs down for working people -- all while making corporations pay their fair share. We took the strongest action on climate in our nation’s history -- I’m not kidding.
But there’s still so much left to be done. Where we passed the first major federal legislation on gun violence in decades, we now need to finish the job and ban assault weapons. Where we capped insulin at $35 for Medicare recipients, we need to cap it for everyone. And where we finally made the wealthiest corporations pay their fair share, we need to do the same for billionaires.
**We’ve got a lot of work to do and a lot of progress we’ve got to make in the second term._W_ _e’ve got to finish the job._ And I can only do that with you behind me. **
**[It’d mean the world to me to have you with me in this fight. body:
Did you see this?

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62307272/403041476/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230425Pollsnews_N_TEAM_90DO_3_G_A_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyNTlmOTc5LWI4ZTMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wdgnbxazPy_px5Ou9LNX7nMWTxfX_bVYzxMib_Sa0MU=)
| Fellow activist, there are more than **1.2 million Pennsylvanians eligible to vote but not registered.**

Among Pennsylvania’s Black, Latino, Indigenous, and other communities of color, that problem is particularly pronounced, due to far too many years of disenfranchisement and neglect.

Our work to address that has once again put us in the news: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62307273/403041477/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230425Pollsnews_N_TEAM_90DO_3_G_A_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyNTlmOTc5LWI4ZTMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wdgnbxazPy_px5Ou9LNX7nMWTxfX_bVYzxMib_Sa0MU=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62307274/403041478/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230425Pollsnews_N_TEAM_90DO_3_G_A_G2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyNTlmOTc5LWI4ZTMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wdgnbxazPy_px5Ou9LNX7nMWTxfX_bVYzxMib_Sa0MU=) “I will tell you that of all of the black folks here in the commonwealth who are eligible to vote, twenty one percent of all black folks who are eligible to vote are not registered. That number jumps to thirty five percent for Latinos eligible to vote in the commonwealth, but not registered. And that number is even greater in the Asian Pacific Islander community, forty one percent of the Asian Pacific Islander community here in Pennsylvania eligible to vote and not registered.” - Kadida Kenner

“We want to make sure that we're getting people an opportunity to get out there and vote." - Dyneco Gibson, Regional Organizing Director (Chester and Delaware counties) **[We collected 20,000 voter registration forms in our first full year of operation, and for our second, despite the challenges of an underappreciated “off-year” election, we’re aiming to register 25,000 Pennsylvanians centering Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth. | | Save America, Save Virginia Weekly Roundup
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | This past week the fight to save Virginia and save America continued. On April 15, my article, “Supreme Court Rules Constitutional Challenges to Agencies May 1 Be Brought in Federal Court,” concerning the landmark Axon decision, appeared on Townhall.com. See that article [here](https://www.emordforva.com/so/d4OUnJmb3/c?w=jgSnKO-65UcUiTyQGUkWlzWQuYDQ96COQncadmvofXQ.)..On April 17 and 18, production was completed on a series of campaign advertisements, the first in our series of media to bring our Save Virginia, Save America message to every Virginian. As of yesterday, one of these new ads is airing in every county, city, and town of the Commonwealth, reaching millions. You can see the ad on Fox during the Fox and Friends show in the morning and during the 8 pm - 9 pm hour, Monday, April 24, through Friday, April 28.
---
| | [](https://www.emordforva.com/so/d4OUnJmb3/c?w=PHGom4bEFuegq49GU32_Hyx2ausC96w0PoOAis6mCKc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZW1vcmRmb3J2YS5jb20vc28vZDRPVW5KbWIzP2xhbmd1YWdlVGFnPWVuIiwiciI6ImM2NGI2NGJlLTU4OWQtNGNmNi1iY2RiLTVlMmJhMzAzMTJkZiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjgxMDAxZWYyLTE4OTEtNDBmMC1iZjdkLWIyYTZjNmY1Y2VlMiJ9)
---
| | On April 19 and 20, I appeared on Frank Gaffney’s radio and TV programs to discuss Tim Kaine’s recent support for efforts to violate the Constitution’s Treaty Clause. Kaine rose in opposition to a bill by Senator Ron Johnson that would require President Biden to refrain from entering into a new agreement with the World Health Organization (giving WHO greater influence and control over future domestic, U.S.pandemic and public health emergency responses) unless Biden first satisfied the Treaty Clause of the Constitution (requiring Senate advice and consent). I also discussed Tim Kaine’s recent public defense of the FBI against the First and Fourth Amendment rights of Catholic parishioners. Kaine defended a leaked memo by the Richmond Division of the FBI that called for informants to be placed in Richmond area Catholic churches, endeavoring to identify white supremacists. These two major violations of the Constitution endorsed by Kaine were the subject of an [article](https://www.emordforva.com/so/d4OUnJmb3/c?w=Cno4-xLa63N2O4tRDoqCCtOM6d88j21EqsoDi116nOs.) I wrote entitled, “Kaine Supports Authoritarian Violations of Patient and Catholic Parishioners’ Rights,” that appeared in Townhall.com on April 21.
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| | On April 21, I appeared at the Republican Party of Virginia’s Advance meeting in Richmond. It was great to see so many Republicans united in purpose and driven to ensure a Republican majority in the state Senate and Tim Kaine’s retirement in 2024. I was privileged to meet dozens of Virginia patriots at our Advance suite from across, pledging their support for our campaign to save Virginia and save America!
---
| | On April 22, I joined my great patriotic friend Tricia Stall (the candidate for Mathews County Board of Supervisors, who I have endorsed) as the Keynote Speaker at a fundraiser for our two campaigns in North, Virginia (Mathews County).I had the distinct opportunity to voice my support for Tricia publicly and to explain in detail the legislation I will introduce to save Virginia and save America.Some 80 great patriots joined us for a remarkable evening in defense of individual liberty and against the socialist resurgence and woke indoctrination in our schools and military.
---
| |
---
|
---
| | On April 23, Tricia and Mark Stall and my beautiful wife Sheryl and I attended Sunday services at Gwynn’s Island Church of the Nazarene. We were given warm greetings and the privilege of attending a wonderful service by Pastor Dave McKnight and the entire congregation.I am incredibly grateful for the blessings on our campaign delivered by congregants during the service.
---
| | See you on the campaign trail, Jonathan

clean_body: This past week the fight to save Virginia and save America continued. On April 15, my article, “Supreme Court Rules Constitutional Cha | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | Save America, Save Virginia Weekly Roundup | | | | | | | This past week the fight to save Virginia and save America continued. On April 15, my article, “Supreme Court Rules Constitutional Challenges to Agencies May 1 Be Brought in Federal Court,” concerning the landmark Axon decision, appeared on Townhall.com. See that article April 17 and 18, production was completed on a series of campaign advertisements, the first in our series of media to bring our Save Virginia, Save America message to every Virginian. As of yesterday, one of these new ads is airing in every county, city, and town of the Commonwealth, reaching millions. You can see the ad on Fox during the Fox and Friends show in the morning and during the 8 pm - 9 pm hour, Monday, April 24, through Friday, April 28. | | | | On April 19 and 20, I appeared on Frank Gaffney’s radio and TV programs to discuss Tim Kaine’s recent support for efforts to violate the Constitution’s Treaty Clause. Kaine rose in opposition to a bill by Senator Ron Johnson that would require President Biden to refrain from entering into a new agreement with the World Health Organization (giving WHO greater influence and control over future domestic, U.S.pandemic and public health emergency responses) unless Biden first satisfied the Treaty Clause of the Constitution (requiring Senate advice and consent). I also discussed Tim Kaine’s recent public defense of the FBI against the First and Fourth Amendment rights of Catholic parishioners. Kaine defended a leaked memo by the Richmond Division of the FBI that called for informants to be placed in Richmond area Catholic churches, endeavoring to identify white supremacists. These two major violations of the Constitution endorsed by Kaine were the subject of an I wrote entitled, “Kaine Supports Authoritarian Violations of Patient and Catholic Parishioners’ Rights,” that appeared in Townhall.com on April 21. | | | | | | On April 21, I appeared at the Republican Party of Virginia’s Advance meeting in Richmond. It was great to see so many Republicans united in purpose and driven to ensure a Republican majority in the state Senate and Tim Kaine’s retirement in 2024. I was privileged to meet dozens of Virginia patriots at our Advance suite from across, pledging their support for our campaign to save Virginia and save America! | | On April 22, I joined my great patriotic friend Tricia Stall (the candidate for Mathews County Board of Supervisors, who I have endorsed) as the Keynote Speaker at a fundraiser for our two campaigns in North, Virginia (Mathews County).I had the distinct opportunity to voice my support for Tricia publicly and to explain in detail the legislation I will introduce to save Virginia and save America.Some 80 great patriots joined us for a remarkable evening in defense of individual liberty and against the socialist resurgence and woke indoctrination in our schools and military. | | | | | On April 23, Tricia and Mark Stall and my beautiful wife Sheryl and I attended Sunday services at Gwynn’s Island Church of the Nazarene. We were given warm greetings and the privilege of attending a wonderful service by Pastor Dave McKnight and the entire congregation.I am incredibly grateful for the blessings on our campaign delivered by congregants during the service. | | See you on the campaign trail, Jonathan | | | | | | | | | | | PRESS RELEASE Veteran constitutional and administrative attorney Jonathan Emord announced today he is a candidate for the U.S. Senate in 2024. | | | Get our latest updates | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . For years, Sherrod has fought to make our government work _for the people_ and stood up to corruption in Washington. **He's not backing down anytime soon, but he needs to know that folks like you are with him.**
**[Please, will you add your name now to help end corrupt stock trading in Congress? We're counting on your signature by midnight tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62308608/403045435/-2030690909?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=100,50,25,5&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fbrown-2023-ethics-act&code=jtk149-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDhlN2I5NS1iZGUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KnMAWRRx87Zt_noNPDJfdlPPsTqBrzwkyPniWogN1yk=&emci=3033e3ae-79e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=448e7b95-bde3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)**

Team SB
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Sherrod Brown**
Date: Mon, Apr 24, 2023
Subject: Friend, help me end corrupt stock trading in Congress
---
| | |
---
Friend,

Ohioans and Americans deserve accountability and transparency in government. It's what ensures that our elected officials are working _for the people_ – not corporations, special interests, or themselves.**But right now, we have a problem:**
Lawmakers often have access to private information about individual companies and entire industries – information that can directly impact stock prices – and right now, they have free reign to buy and sell stocks.**I don't own individual stocks because my job is to serve Ohioans, not a personal stock portfolio – but many members of Congress do, and it's a practice we need to end.**
That's why, for years I’ve led the fight to ban members from stock trading, and I just introduced the Ending Trading and Holdings in Congressional Stocks (ETHICS) Act. This act will strengthen government accountability and prevent members of Congress, their spouses, and dependent children from profiting off of their positions for personal gain.
**I'm fighting as hard as I can to pass this important legislation and stand up to corruption in Washington – and I need to know you're with me. I'm looking for 20,000 folks to add their voices to this fight by midnight, but your name is still missing, friend. So please:**
**[Will you sign on to my petition right now to help end corrupt stock trading in Congress? I'm counting on you to speak out before midnight tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62308609/403045436/-2030690909?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=100,50,25,5&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fbrown-2023-ethics-act&code=jtk149-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDhlN2I5NS1iZGUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KnMAWRRx87Zt_noNPDJfdlPPsTqBrzwkyPniWogN1yk=&emci=3033e3ae-79e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=448e7b95-bde3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)**

**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Sherrod Brown: **Friend – thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement and for sharing our commitment to the Dignity of Work.

Fighting for workers means building an economy that prioritizes the needs of workers over tax breaks for billionaires and corporations. No matter who you are or what kind of work you do, I promise to fight for you. But I need your help: Experts say I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection and Senate control could come down to Ohio. name: Kurt Kroemer
subject: leadership and service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kroemer for Congress
body:
More than anything else, my deep passion for helping others has driven me as I’ve navigated through life.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62308651/403045498/215821870?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230425-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDUwNTZlMmEtYmVlMy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=98gdNQbAgS5iXnqM1ba7re9SDA4VcF1ZOiqCDuCQqK0=)
---
| Peter,

Throughout my career, I’ve been proudly dedicated to leadership and service, holding senior positions at organizations like the Make-A-Wish Foundation and the American Red Cross.

More than anything else, my deep passion for helping others has driven me as I’ve navigated through life. From being on the ground coordinating first-response efforts after natural disasters to supporting families during their most difficult times of crisis, I’ve been able to cross paths with so many people and play a small role in lifting them up when they need it most.

[_**Now, I’m running for Congress because our community is in need. Can I count on you to fuel our efforts by making a grassroots contribution right now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62308652/403045499/215821870?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230425-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDUwNTZlMmEtYmVlMy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=98gdNQbAgS5iXnqM1ba7re9SDA4VcF1ZOiqCDuCQqK0=)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62308653/403045500/215821870?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230425-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDUwNTZlMmEtYmVlMy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=98gdNQbAgS5iXnqM1ba7re9SDA4VcF1ZOiqCDuCQqK0=)
---
Our representative in Congress has held office for over 10 years, yet there have been no improvements made in our district. Instead of working for the great people he’s been elected to serve, David Schweikert has disrespected us by succumbing to special interests and extremist agendas.

I know my experience, along with my dedication to helping others, will allow me to be an effective voice for Arizonans in Congress. Our residents deserve better than career politicians like David Schweikert, so it’s time for us to come together to flip this seat from red to blue.

In the meantime, Republican state legislators and legal activists are upping their attacks on abortion rights around the country. **But right now,** Senator Warner and the Senate Democrats are fighting back. He’s doing everything in his power to keep the courts from further restricting abortion access and to defend full access to reproductive health care. _[**Add your name right now to join him in calling on Congress to do what it takes to protect abortion rights >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62308833/403045896/112851506?refcode=mw_em_230425_1&ms=mw_em_230425_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmM4ODdiMy1iZWUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CYXCdRa84KKP17uNDlsxnpEJGL21cqVp3Rg2Kr09tjg=&emci=17a3826b-b5e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=5fc887b3-bee3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)_ **Let’s make one thing clear: Medication abortion is safe and should remain legal.** Regardless of what the courts do next, the best defense against this latest attack on abortion rights is to codify _Roe v. body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62308876/403046043/-1839819742?refcode=lee_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzUyNGEwMC1iZmUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aRJkrnYPDQp4BsBxs83zAeqhhC3JHzmDZa9E3Qd8ibo=)

| | **Listen, I won’t sugarcoat it: Republicans are working to eliminate vote-by-mail here in Nevada.** [**I’m going to explain why we can’t overlook this threat, but first, I’m asking for you to take a minute to sign my campaign’s petition to save vote-by-mail in Nevada.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62308877/403046044/-1550143219?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzUyNGEwMC1iZmUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aRJkrnYPDQp4BsBxs83zAeqhhC3JHzmDZa9E3Qd8ibo=&emci=a36be973-9ee3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=33524a00-bfe3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10997957) | | | [Sign your name >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62308878/403046045/-1550143219?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzUyNGEwMC1iZmUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aRJkrnYPDQp4BsBxs83zAeqhhC3JHzmDZa9E3Qd8ibo=&emci=a36be973-9ee3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=33524a00-bfe3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10997957)
---
It’s no secret that Republicans across the country are disenfranchising voters – specifically minority groups and those who predominantly vote Democratic, like students, low-income voters, and even veterans.
I hoped that these anti-American attacks on voting rights would skip Nevada, but here we are. **Nevada is now ground zero for the GOP’s endless assault on voting rights.**
Our new Republican Governor, Joe Lombardo, has submitted legislation that would drastically roll back Nevada’s vote-by-mail process. Let me share a few facts and figures to illustrate just how devastating this would be to voters:
A majority of Nevadans (51.1%, to be exact) voted by mail last year.
Compare that to the share of voters who cast an in-person ballot on Election Day: Just 21%.
Despite our accessible vote-by-mail program, Nevada ranked in the bottom half of states for turnout in 2022. In fact, just 54% of registered voters actually voted last year.
If you’re now thinking, “ _Why on earth would we even consider making it harder to vote?_ ” Let me just say, I’m with you.
**Republicans should celebrate participation in our democracy, not attack it to hoard political power for themselves.**
As public servants, it’s our job to keep our elections as secure and accessible for voters as possible. These voter suppression tactics do the opposite of that, and now it’s up to us to fight back.
[**I need 8,000 supporters to sign our petition before midnight tomorrow. clean_body: | = | | Listen, I won’t sugarcoat it: Republicans are working to eliminate vote-by-mail here in Nevada. | | | It’s no secret that Republicans across the country are disenfranchising voters – specifically minority groups and those who predominantly vote Democratic, like students, low-income voters, and even veterans. I hoped that these anti-American attacks on voting rights would skip Nevada, but here we are. Nevada is now ground zero for the GOP’s endless assault on voting rights. Our new Republican Governor, Joe Lombardo, has submitted legislation that would drastically roll back Nevada’s vote-by-mail process. Let me share a few facts and figures to illustrate just how devastating this would be to voters: A majority of Nevadans (51.1%, to be exact) voted by mail last year. Compare that to the share of voters who cast an in-person ballot on Election Day: Just 21%. Despite our accessible vote-by-mail program, Nevada ranked in the bottom half of states for turnout in 2022. In fact, just 54% of registered voters actually voted last year. If you’re now thinking, “ Why on earth would we even consider making it harder to vote? ” Let me just say, I’m with you. Republicans should celebrate participation in our democracy, not attack it to hoard political power for themselves. As public servants, it’s our job to keep our elections as secure and accessible for voters as possible. These voter suppression tactics do the opposite of that, and now it’s up to us to fight back. | | Thank you for taking action, Susie Lee | | = We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. **This is HUGE NEWS, team:** President Biden **_just_** announced he’s running for another term!

The Biden-Harris administration has done so much in just a few short years, but all that progress will hang in the balance next fall. If we step up to defend President Biden and our Senate majority, we’ll keep America moving forward. But if we stay on the sidelines, **_we could lose it ALL._**

We need to stand with the president from _day one_ \-- that means TODAY -- so we've launched an URGENT live poll to prove that top Democrats are with him. **Please, before midnight, we need you to weigh in:**

**Do you approve of President Biden?**
